verses.translation: If any do seek for glory and power,- to God belong all glory and power. To Him mount up (all) Words of Purity: It is He Who exalts each Deed of Righteousness. Those that lay Plots of Evil,- for them is a Penalty terrible; and the plotting of su ch will be void (of result)

verses.text: وَٱللَّهُ خَلَقَكُم مِّن تُرَابࣲ ثُمَّ مِن نُّطۡفَةࣲ ثُمَّ جَعَلَكُمۡ أَزۡوَٰجࣰ اۚ وَمَا تَحۡمِلُ مِنۡ أُنثَىٰ وَلَا تَضَعُ إِلَّا بِعِلۡمِهِۦۚ وَمَا يُعَمَّرُ مِن مُّعَمَّرࣲ وَلَا يُنقَصُ مِنۡ عُمُرِهِۦٓ إِلَّا فِي كِتَٰبٍۚ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ يَسِيرࣱ‏
verses.translation: And God did create you from dust; then from a sperm-drop; then He made you in pairs. And no female conceives, or lays down (her load), but with His knowledge. Nor is a man long-lived granted length of days, nor is a part cut off from his life, but is in a Decree (ordained). All this is easy to God

verses.text: وَمَا يَسۡتَوِي ٱلۡبَحۡرَانِ هَٰذَا عَذۡبࣱ فُرَاتࣱ سَآئِغࣱ شَرَابُهُۥ وَهَٰذَا مِلۡحٌ أُجَاجࣱۖ وَمِن كُلࣲّ تَأۡكُلُونَ لَحۡمࣰ ا طَرِيࣰّ ا وَتَسۡتَخۡرِجُونَ حِلۡيَةࣰ تَلۡبَسُونَهَاۖ وَتَرَى ٱلۡفُلۡكَ فِيهِ مَوَاخِرَ لِتَبۡتَغُواْ مِن فَضۡلِهِۦ وَلَعَلَّكُمۡ تَشۡكُرُونَ
verses.translation: Nor are the two bodies of flowing water alike,- the one palatable, sweet, and pleasant to drink, and the other, salt and bitter. Yet from each (kind of water) do ye eat flesh fresh and tender, and ye extract ornaments to wear; and thou seest th e ships therein that plough the waves, that ye may seek (thus) of the Bounty of God that ye may be grateful

verses.text: يُولِجُ ٱلَّيۡلَ فِي ٱلنَّهَارِ وَيُولِجُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فِي ٱلَّيۡلِ وَسَخَّرَ ٱلشَّمۡسَ وَٱلۡقَمَرَۖ كُلࣱّ يَجۡرِي لِأَجَلࣲ مُّسَمࣰّ ىۚ ذَٰلِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّكُمۡ لَهُ ٱلۡمُلۡكُۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مَا يَمۡلِكُونَ مِن قِطۡمِيرٍ
verses.translation: He merges Night into Day, and he merges Day into Night, and he has subjected the sun and the moon (to his Law): each one runs its course for a term appointed. Such is God your Lord: to Him belongs all Dominion. And those whom ye invoke besides Him have not the least power

verses.text: إِن تَدۡعُوهُمۡ لَا يَسۡمَعُواْ دُعَآءَكُمۡ وَلَوۡ سَمِعُواْ مَا ٱسۡتَجَابُواْ لَكُمۡۖ وَيَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ يَكۡفُرُونَ بِشِرۡكِكُمۡۚ وَلَا يُنَبِّئُكَ مِثۡلُ خَبِيرࣲ‏
verses.translation: If ye invoke them, they will not listen to your call, and if they were to listen, they cannot answer your (prayer). On the Day of Judgment they will reject your "Partnership". and none, (O man!) can tell thee (the Truth) like the One Who is ac quainted with all things

verses.text: ۞يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ أَنتُمُ ٱلۡفُقَرَآءُ إِلَى ٱللَّهِۖ وَٱللَّهُ هُوَ ٱلۡغَنِيُّ ٱلۡحَمِيدُ
verses.translation: O ye men! It is ye that have need of God: but God is the One Free of all wants, worthy of all praise

verses.text: إِن يَشَأۡ يُذۡهِبۡكُمۡ وَيَأۡتِ بِخَلۡقࣲ جَدِيدࣲ‏
verses.translation: If He so pleased, He could blot you out and bring in a New Creation

verses.text: وَمَا ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ بِعَزِيزࣲ‏
verses.translation: Nor is that (at all) difficult for God

verses.text: وَلَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةࣱ وِزۡرَ أُخۡرَىٰۚ وَإِن تَدۡعُ مُثۡقَلَةٌ إِلَىٰ حِمۡلِهَا لَا يُحۡمَلۡ مِنۡهُ شَيۡءࣱ وَلَوۡ كَانَ ذَا قُرۡبَىٰٓۗ إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخۡشَوۡنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلۡغَيۡبِ وَأَقَامُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَۚ وَمَن تَزَكَّىٰ فَإِنَّمَا يَتَزَكَّىٰ لِنَفۡسِهِۦۚ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
verses.translation: Nor can a bearer of burdens bear another's burdens if one heavily laden should call another to (bear) his load. Not the least portion of it can be carried (by the other). Even though he be nearly related. Thou canst but admonish such as fear th eir Lord unseen and establish regular Prayer. And whoever purifies himself does so for the benefit of his own soul; and the destination (of all) is to God

verses.text: وَمَا يَسۡتَوِي ٱلۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَٱلۡبَصِيرُ
verses.translation: The blind and the seeing are not alike

verses.text: وَلَا ٱلظُّلُمَٰتُ وَلَا ٱلنُّورُ
verses.translation: Nor are the depths of Darkness and the Light

verses.text: وَلَا ٱلظِّلُّ وَلَا ٱلۡحَرُورُ
verses.translation: Nor are the (chilly) shade and the (genial) heat of the sun

verses.text: وَمَا يَسۡتَوِي ٱلۡأَحۡيَآءُ وَلَا ٱلۡأَمۡوَٰتُۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُسۡمِعُ مَن يَشَآءُۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ بِمُسۡمِعࣲ مَّن فِي ٱلۡقُبُورِ
verses.translation: Nor are alike those that are living and those that are dead. God can make any that He wills to hear; but thou canst not make those to hear who are (buried) in graves

verses.text: إِنۡ أَنتَ إِلَّا نَذِيرٌ
verses.translation: Thou art no other than a warner

verses.text: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَٰكَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ بَشِيرࣰ ا وَنَذِيرࣰ اۚ وَإِن مِّنۡ أُمَّةٍ إِلَّا خَلَا فِيهَا نَذِيرࣱ‏
verses.translation: Verily We have sent thee in truth, as a bearer of glad tidings, and as a warner: and there never was a people, without a warner having lived among them (in the past)

verses.text: وَإِن يُكَذِّبُوكَ فَقَدۡ كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ جَآءَتۡهُمۡ رُسُلُهُم بِٱلۡبَيِّنَٰتِ وَبِٱلزُّبُرِ وَبِٱلۡكِتَٰبِ ٱلۡمُنِيرِ
verses.translation: And if they reject thee, so did their predecessors, to whom came their apostles with Clear Signs, Books of dark prophecies, and the Book of Enlightenment

verses.text: ثُمَّ أَخَذۡتُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْۖ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ
verses.translation: In the end did I punish those who rejected Faith: and how (terrible) was My rejection (of them)

verses.text: أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءࣰ فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا بِهِۦ ثَمَرَٰتࣲ مُّخۡتَلِفًا أَلۡوَٰنُهَاۚ وَمِنَ ٱلۡجِبَالِ جُدَدُۢ بِيضࣱ وَحُمۡرࣱ مُّخۡتَلِفٌ أَلۡوَٰنُهَا وَغَرَابِيبُ سُودࣱ‏
verses.translation: Seest thou not that God sends down rain from the sky? With it We then bring out produce of various colours. And in the mountains are tracts white and red, of various shades of colour, and black intense in hue

verses.text: وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ وَٱلدَّوَآبِّ وَٱلۡأَنۡعَٰمِ مُخۡتَلِفٌ أَلۡوَٰنُهُۥ كَذَٰلِكَۗ إِنَّمَا يَخۡشَى ٱللَّهَ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِ ٱلۡعُلَمَٰٓؤُاْۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَزِيزٌ غَفُورٌ
verses.translation: And so amongst men and crawling creatures and cattle, are they of various colours. Those truly fear God, among His Servants, who have knowledge: for God is Exalted in Might, Oft-Forgiving

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَتۡلُونَ كِتَٰبَ ٱللَّهِ وَأَقَامُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَأَنفَقُواْ مِمَّا رَزَقۡنَٰهُمۡ سِرࣰّ ا وَعَلَانِيَةࣰ يَرۡجُونَ تِجَٰرَةࣰ لَّن تَبُورَ
verses.translation: Those who rehearse the Book of God, establish regular Prayer, and spend (in Charity) out of what We have provided for them, secretly and openly, hope for a commerce that will never fail

verses.text: لِيُوَفِّيَهُمۡ أُجُورَهُمۡ وَيَزِيدَهُم مِّن فَضۡلِهِۦٓۚ إِنَّهُۥ غَفُورࣱ شَكُورࣱ‏
verses.translation: For He will pay them their meed, nay, He will give them (even) more out of His Bounty: for He is Oft-Forgiving, Most Ready to appreciate (service)

verses.text: وَٱلَّذِيٓ أَوۡحَيۡنَآ إِلَيۡكَ مِنَ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ هُوَ ٱلۡحَقُّ مُصَدِّقࣰ ا لِّمَا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡهِۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِعِبَادِهِۦ لَخَبِيرُۢ بَصِيرࣱ‏
verses.translation: That which We have revealed to thee of the Book is the Truth,- confirming what was (revealed) before it: for God is assuredly- with respect to His Servants - well acquainted and Fully Observant

verses.text: ثُمَّ أَوۡرَثۡنَا ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصۡطَفَيۡنَا مِنۡ عِبَادِنَاۖ فَمِنۡهُمۡ ظَالِمࣱ لِّنَفۡسِهِۦ وَمِنۡهُم مُّقۡتَصِدࣱ وَمِنۡهُمۡ سَابِقُۢ بِٱلۡخَيۡرَٰتِ بِإِذۡنِ ٱللَّهِۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلۡفَضۡلُ ٱلۡكَبِيرُ
verses.translation: Then We have given the Book for inheritance to such of Our Servants as We have chosen: but there are among them some who wrong their own souls; some who follow a middle course; and some who are, by God's leave, foremost in good deeds; that is the highest Grace

verses.text: جَنَّٰتُ عَدۡنࣲ يَدۡخُلُونَهَا يُحَلَّوۡنَ فِيهَا مِنۡ أَسَاوِرَ مِن ذَهَبࣲ وَلُؤۡلُؤࣰ اۖ وَلِبَاسُهُمۡ فِيهَا حَرِيرࣱ‏
verses.translation: Gardens of Eternity will they enter: therein will they be adorned with bracelets of gold and pearls; and their garments there will be of silk

verses.text: وَقَالُواْ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَذۡهَبَ عَنَّا ٱلۡحَزَنَۖ إِنَّ رَبَّنَا لَغَفُورࣱ شَكُورٌ
verses.translation: And they will say: "Praise be to God, Who has removed from us (all) sorrow: for our Lord is indeed Oft-Forgiving Ready to appreciate (service)

verses.text: ٱلَّذِيٓ أَحَلَّنَا دَارَ ٱلۡمُقَامَةِ مِن فَضۡلِهِۦ لَا يَمَسُّنَا فِيهَا نَصَبࣱ وَلَا يَمَسُّنَا فِيهَا لُغُوبࣱ‏
verses.translation: Who has, out of His Bounty, settled us in a Home that will last: no toil nor sense of weariness shall touch us therein

verses.text: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لَهُمۡ نَارُ جَهَنَّمَ لَا يُقۡضَىٰ عَلَيۡهِمۡ فَيَمُوتُواْ وَلَا يُخَفَّفُ عَنۡهُم مِّنۡ عَذَابِهَاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي كُلَّ كَفُورࣲ‏
verses.translation: But those who reject (God) - for them will be the Fire of Hell: No term shall be determined for them, so they should die, nor shall its Penalty be lightened for them. Thus do We reward every ungrateful one

verses.text: وَهُمۡ يَصۡطَرِخُونَ فِيهَا رَبَّنَآ أَخۡرِجۡنَا نَعۡمَلۡ صَٰلِحًا غَيۡرَ ٱلَّذِي كُنَّا نَعۡمَلُۚ أَوَلَمۡ نُعَمِّرۡكُم مَّا يَتَذَكَّرُ فِيهِ مَن تَذَكَّرَ وَجَآءَكُمُ ٱلنَّذِيرُۖ فَذُوقُواْ فَمَا لِلظَّٰلِمِينَ مِن نَّصِيرٍ
verses.translation: Therein will they cry aloud (for assistance): "Our Lord! Bring us out: we shall work righteousness, not the (deeds) we used to do!" - "Did We not give you long enough life so that he that would should receive admonition? and (moreover) the war ner came to you. So taste ye (the fruits of your deeds): for the wrong-doers there is no helper

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَٰلِمُ غَيۡبِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمُۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.translation: Verily God knows (all) the hidden things of the heavens and the earth: verily He has full knowledge of all that is in (men's) hearts

verses.text: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَكُمۡ خَلَٰٓئِفَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ فَمَن كَفَرَ فَعَلَيۡهِ كُفۡرُهُۥۖ وَلَا يَزِيدُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ كُفۡرُهُمۡ عِندَ رَبِّهِمۡ إِلَّا مَقۡتࣰ اۖ وَلَا يَزِيدُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ كُفۡرُهُمۡ إِلَّا خَسَارࣰ ا
verses.translation: He it is That has made you inheritors in the earth: if, then, any do reject (God), their rejection (works) against themselves: their rejection but adds to the odium for the Unbelievers in the sight of their Lord: their rejection but adds to (th eir own) undoing

verses.text: قُلۡ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ شُرَكَآءَكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَرُونِي مَاذَا خَلَقُواْ مِنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ أَمۡ لَهُمۡ شِرۡكࣱ فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ أَمۡ ءَاتَيۡنَٰهُمۡ كِتَٰبࣰ ا فَهُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَتࣲ مِّنۡهُۚ بَلۡ إِن يَعِدُ ٱلظَّٰلِمُونَ بَعۡضُهُم بَعۡضًا إِلَّا غُرُورًا
verses.translation: Say: "Have ye seen (these) 'Partners' of yours whom ye call upon besides God? Show Me what it is they have created in the (wide) earth. Or have they a share in the heavens? Or have We given them a Book from which they (can derive) clear (evide nce)?- Nay, the wrong-doers promise each other nothing but delusions

verses.text: ۞إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُمۡسِكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ أَن تَزُولَاۚ وَلَئِن زَالَتَآ إِنۡ أَمۡسَكَهُمَا مِنۡ أَحَدࣲ مِّنۢ بَعۡدِهِۦٓۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ حَلِيمًا غَفُورࣰ ا
verses.translation: It is God Who sustains the heavens and the earth, lest they cease (to function): and if they should fail, there is none - not one - can sustain them thereafter: Verily He is Most Forbearing, Oft-Forgiving

verses.text: وَأَقۡسَمُواْ بِٱللَّهِ جَهۡدَ أَيۡمَٰنِهِمۡ لَئِن جَآءَهُمۡ نَذِيرࣱ لَّيَكُونُنَّ أَهۡدَىٰ مِنۡ إِحۡدَى ٱلۡأُمَمِۖ فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡ نَذِيرࣱ مَّا زَادَهُمۡ إِلَّا نُفُورًا
verses.translation: They swore their strongest oaths by God that if a warner came to them, they would follow his guidance better than any (other) of the Peoples: But when a warner came to them, it has only increased their flight (from righteousness)

verses.text: ٱسۡتِكۡبَارࣰ ا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَكۡرَ ٱلسَّيِّيِٕۚ وَلَا يَحِيقُ ٱلۡمَكۡرُ ٱلسَّيِّئُ إِلَّا بِأَهۡلِهِۦۚ فَهَلۡ يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا سُنَّتَ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَۚ فَلَن تَجِدَ لِسُنَّتِ ٱللَّهِ تَبۡدِيلࣰ اۖ وَلَن تَجِدَ لِسُنَّتِ ٱللَّهِ تَحۡوِيلًا
verses.translation: On account of their arrogance in the land and their plotting of Evil, but the plotting of Evil will hem in only the authors thereof. Now are they but looking for the way the ancients were dealt with? But no change wilt thou find in God's way (o f dealing): no turning off wilt thou find in God's way (of dealing)

verses.text: أَوَلَمۡ يَسِيرُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَيَنظُرُواْ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ وَكَانُوٓاْ أَشَدَّ مِنۡهُمۡ قُوَّةࣰۚ وَمَا كَانَ ٱللَّهُ لِيُعۡجِزَهُۥ مِن شَيۡءࣲ فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَلَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَلِيمࣰ ا قَدِيرࣰ ا
verses.translation: Do they not travel through the earth, and see what was the End of those before them,- though they were superior to them in strength? Nor is God to be frustrated by anything whatever in the heavens or on earth: for He is All-Knowing. All-Powerf ul

verses.text: وَلَوۡ يُؤَاخِذُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلنَّاسَ بِمَا كَسَبُواْ مَا تَرَكَ عَلَىٰ ظَهۡرِهَا مِن دَآبَّةࣲ وَلَٰكِن يُؤَخِّرُهُمۡ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلࣲ مُّسَمࣰّ ىۖ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهُمۡ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ بِعِبَادِهِۦ بَصِيرَۢا
verses.translation: If God were to punish men according to what they deserve. He would not leave on the back of the (earth) a single living creature: but He gives them respite for a stated Term: when their Term expires, verily God has in His sight all His Servants

verses.text: يسٓ
verses.translation: Ya Sin

verses.text: وَٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ ٱلۡحَكِيمِ
verses.translation: By the Qur'an, full of Wisdom

verses.text: إِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.translation: Thou art indeed one of the apostles

verses.text: عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطࣲ مُّسۡتَقِيمࣲ‏
verses.translation: On a Straight Way

verses.text: تَنزِيلَ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
verses.translation: It is a Revelation sent down by (Him), the Exalted in Might, Most Merciful

verses.text: لِتُنذِرَ قَوۡمࣰ ا مَّآ أُنذِرَ ءَابَآؤُهُمۡ فَهُمۡ غَٰفِلُونَ
verses.translation: In order that thou mayest admonish a people, whose fathers had received no admonition, and who therefore remain heedless (of the Signs of God)

verses.text: لَقَدۡ حَقَّ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ عَلَىٰٓ أَكۡثَرِهِمۡ فَهُمۡ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.translation: The Word is proved true against the greater part of them: for they do not believe

verses.text: إِنَّا جَعَلۡنَا فِيٓ أَعۡنَٰقِهِمۡ أَغۡلَٰلࣰ ا فَهِيَ إِلَى ٱلۡأَذۡقَانِ فَهُم مُّقۡمَحُونَ
verses.translation: We have put yokes round their necks right up to their chins, so that their heads are forced up (and they cannot see)

verses.text: وَجَعَلۡنَا مِنۢ بَيۡنِ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ سَدࣰّ ا وَمِنۡ خَلۡفِهِمۡ سَدࣰّ ا فَأَغۡشَيۡنَٰهُمۡ فَهُمۡ لَا يُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.translation: And We have put a bar in front of them and a bar behind them, and further, We have covered them up; so that they cannot see

verses.text: وَسَوَآءٌ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ءَأَنذَرۡتَهُمۡ أَمۡ لَمۡ تُنذِرۡهُمۡ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.translation: The same is it to them whether thou admonish them or thou do not admonish them: they will not believe

verses.text: إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلذِّكۡرَ وَخَشِيَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنَ بِٱلۡغَيۡبِۖ فَبَشِّرۡهُ بِمَغۡفِرَةࣲ وَأَجۡرࣲ كَرِيمٍ
verses.translation: Thou canst but admonish such a one as follows the Message and fears the (Lord) Most Gracious, unseen: give such a one, therefore, good tidings, of Forgiveness and a Reward most generous

verses.text: إِنَّا نَحۡنُ نُحۡيِ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ وَنَكۡتُبُ مَا قَدَّمُواْ وَءَاثَٰرَهُمۡۚ وَكُلَّ شَيۡءٍ أَحۡصَيۡنَٰهُ فِيٓ إِمَامࣲ مُّبِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: Verily We shall give life to the dead, and We record that which they send before and that which they leave behind, and of all things have We taken account in a clear Book (of evidence)

verses.text: وَٱضۡرِبۡ لَهُم مَّثَلًا أَصۡحَٰبَ ٱلۡقَرۡيَةِ إِذۡ جَآءَهَا ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
verses.translation: Set forth to them, by way of a parable, the (story of) the Companions of the City. Behold!, there came apostles to it

verses.text: إِذۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡهِمُ ٱثۡنَيۡنِ فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَعَزَّزۡنَا بِثَالِثࣲ فَقَالُوٓاْ إِنَّآ إِلَيۡكُم مُّرۡسَلُونَ
verses.translation: When We (first) sent to them two apostles, they rejected them: But We strengthened them with a third: they said, "Truly, we have been sent on a mission to you

verses.text: قَالُواْ مَآ أَنتُمۡ إِلَّا بَشَرࣱ مِّثۡلُنَا وَمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ مِن شَيۡءٍ إِنۡ أَنتُمۡ إِلَّا تَكۡذِبُونَ
verses.translation: The (people) said: "Ye are only men like ourselves; and (God) Most Gracious sends no sort of revelation: ye do nothing but lie

verses.text: قَالُواْ رَبُّنَا يَعۡلَمُ إِنَّآ إِلَيۡكُمۡ لَمُرۡسَلُونَ
verses.translation: They said: "Our Lord doth know that we have been sent on a mission to you

verses.text: وَمَا عَلَيۡنَآ إِلَّا ٱلۡبَلَٰغُ ٱلۡمُبِينُ
verses.translation: And our duty is only to proclaim the clear Message

verses.text: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا تَطَيَّرۡنَا بِكُمۡۖ لَئِن لَّمۡ تَنتَهُواْ لَنَرۡجُمَنَّكُمۡ وَلَيَمَسَّنَّكُم مِّنَّا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: The (people) said: "for us, we augur an evil omen from you: if ye desist not, we will certainly stone you. And a grievous punishment indeed will be inflicted on you by us

verses.text: قَالُواْ طَٰٓئِرُكُم مَّعَكُمۡ أَئِن ذُكِّرۡتُمۚ بَلۡ أَنتُمۡ قَوۡمࣱ مُّسۡرِفُونَ
verses.translation: They said: "Your evil omens are with yourselves: (deem ye this an evil omen). If ye are admonished? Nay, but ye are a people transgressing all bounds

verses.text: وَجَآءَ مِنۡ أَقۡصَا ٱلۡمَدِينَةِ رَجُلࣱ يَسۡعَىٰ قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ ٱتَّبِعُواْ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.translation: Then there came running, from the farthest part of the City, a man, saying, "O my people! Obey the apostles

verses.text: ٱتَّبِعُواْ مَن لَّا يَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ أَجۡرࣰ ا وَهُم مُّهۡتَدُونَ
verses.translation: Obey those who ask no reward of you (for themselves), and who have themselves received Guidance

verses.text: وَمَالِيَ لَآ أَعۡبُدُ ٱلَّذِي فَطَرَنِي وَإِلَيۡهِ تُرۡجَعُونَ
verses.translation: It would not be reasonable in me if I did not serve Him Who created me, and to Whom ye shall (all) be brought back

verses.text: ءَأَتَّخِذُ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ ءَالِهَةً إِن يُرِدۡنِ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ بِضُرࣲّ لَّا تُغۡنِ عَنِّي شَفَٰعَتُهُمۡ شَيۡـࣰٔ ا وَلَا يُنقِذُونِ
verses.translation: Shall I take (other) gods besides Him? If (God) Most Gracious should intend some adversity for me, of no use whatever will be their intercession for me, nor can they deliver me

verses.text: إِنِّيٓ إِذࣰ ا لَّفِي ضَلَٰلࣲ مُّبِينٍ
verses.translation: I would indeed, if I were to do so, be in manifest Error

verses.text: إِنِّيٓ ءَامَنتُ بِرَبِّكُمۡ فَٱسۡمَعُونِ
verses.translation: For me, I have faith in the Lord of you (all): listen, then, to me

verses.text: قِيلَ ٱدۡخُلِ ٱلۡجَنَّةَۖ قَالَ يَٰلَيۡتَ قَوۡمِي يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: It was said: "Enter thou the Garden." He said: "Ah me! Would that my People knew (what I know)

verses.text: بِمَا غَفَرَ لِي رَبِّي وَجَعَلَنِي مِنَ ٱلۡمُكۡرَمِينَ
verses.translation: For that my Lord has granted me Forgiveness and has enrolled me among those held in honour

verses.text: ۞وَمَآ أَنزَلۡنَا عَلَىٰ قَوۡمِهِۦ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِۦ مِن جُندࣲ مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا كُنَّا مُنزِلِينَ
verses.translation: And We sent not down against his People, after him, any hosts from heaven, nor was it needful for Us so to do

verses.text: إِن كَانَتۡ إِلَّا صَيۡحَةࣰ وَٰحِدَةࣰ فَإِذَا هُمۡ خَٰمِدُونَ
verses.translation: It was no more than a single mighty Blast, and behold! they were (like ashes) quenched and silent

verses.text: يَٰحَسۡرَةً عَلَى ٱلۡعِبَادِۚ مَا يَأۡتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُواْ بِهِۦ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُونَ
verses.translation: Ah! Alas for (My) Servants! There comes not an apostle to them but they mock him

verses.text: أَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ كَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمۡ إِلَيۡهِمۡ لَا يَرۡجِعُونَ
verses.translation: See they not how many generations before them we destroyed? Not to them will they return

verses.text: وَإِن كُلࣱّ لَّمَّا جَمِيعࣱ لَّدَيۡنَا مُحۡضَرُونَ
verses.translation: But each one of them all - will be brought before Us (for judgment)

verses.text: وَءَايَةࣱ لَّهُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ ٱلۡمَيۡتَةُ أَحۡيَيۡنَٰهَا وَأَخۡرَجۡنَا مِنۡهَا حَبࣰّ ا فَمِنۡهُ يَأۡكُلُونَ
verses.translation: A Sign for them is the earth that is dead: We do give it life, and produce grain therefrom, of which ye do eat

verses.text: وَجَعَلۡنَا فِيهَا جَنَّٰتࣲ مِّن نَّخِيلࣲ وَأَعۡنَٰبࣲ وَفَجَّرۡنَا فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلۡعُيُونِ
verses.translation: And We produce therein orchard with date-palms and vines, and We cause springs to gush forth therein

verses.text: لِيَأۡكُلُواْ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتۡهُ أَيۡدِيهِمۡۚ أَفَلَا يَشۡكُرُونَ
verses.translation: That they may enjoy the fruits of this (artistry): It was not their hands that made this: will they not then give thanks

verses.text: سُبۡحَٰنَ ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ ٱلۡأَزۡوَٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَمِنۡ أَنفُسِهِمۡ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: Glory to God, Who created in pairs all things that the earth produces, as well as their own (human) kind and (other) things of which they have no knowledge

verses.text: وَءَايَةࣱ لَّهُمُ ٱلَّيۡلُ نَسۡلَخُ مِنۡهُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فَإِذَا هُم مُّظۡلِمُونَ
verses.translation: And a Sign for them is the Night: We withdraw therefrom the Day, and behold they are plunged in darkness

verses.text: وَٱلشَّمۡسُ تَجۡرِي لِمُسۡتَقَرࣲّ لَّهَاۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَقۡدِيرُ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلۡعَلِيمِ
verses.translation: And the sun runs his course for a period determined for him: that is the decree of (Him), the Exalted in Might, the All-Knowing

verses.text: وَٱلۡقَمَرَ قَدَّرۡنَٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلۡعُرۡجُونِ ٱلۡقَدِيمِ
verses.translation: And the Moon,- We have measured for her mansions (to traverse) till she returns like the old (and withered) lower part of a date-stalk

verses.text: لَا ٱلشَّمۡسُ يَنۢبَغِي لَهَآ أَن تُدۡرِكَ ٱلۡقَمَرَ وَلَا ٱلَّيۡلُ سَابِقُ ٱلنَّهَارِۚ وَكُلࣱّ فِي فَلَكࣲ يَسۡبَحُونَ
verses.translation: It is not permitted to the Sun to catch up the Moon, nor can the Night outstrip the Day: Each (just) swims along in (its own) orbit (according to Law)

verses.text: وَءَايَةࣱ لَّهُمۡ أَنَّا حَمَلۡنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡفُلۡكِ ٱلۡمَشۡحُونِ
verses.translation: And a Sign for them is that We bore their race (through the Flood) in the loaded Ark

verses.text: وَخَلَقۡنَا لَهُم مِّن مِّثۡلِهِۦ مَا يَرۡكَبُونَ
verses.translation: And We have created for them similar (vessels) on which they ride

verses.text: وَإِن نَّشَأۡ نُغۡرِقۡهُمۡ فَلَا صَرِيخَ لَهُمۡ وَلَا هُمۡ يُنقَذُونَ
verses.translation: If it were Our Will, We could drown them: then would there be no helper (to hear their cry), nor could they be delivered

verses.text: إِلَّا رَحۡمَةࣰ مِّنَّا وَمَتَٰعًا إِلَىٰ حِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: Except by way of Mercy from Us, and by way of (world) convenience (to serve them) for a time

verses.text: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱتَّقُواْ مَا بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِيكُمۡ وَمَا خَلۡفَكُمۡ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُرۡحَمُونَ
verses.translation: When they are told, "Fear ye that which is before you and that which will be after you, in order that ye may receive Mercy," (they turn back)

verses.text: وَمَا تَأۡتِيهِم مِّنۡ ءَايَةࣲ مِّنۡ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ إِلَّا كَانُواْ عَنۡهَا مُعۡرِضِينَ
verses.translation: Not a Sign comes to them from among the Signs of their Lord, but they turn away therefrom

verses.text: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمۡ أَنفِقُواْ مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ أَنُطۡعِمُ مَن لَّوۡ يَشَآءُ ٱللَّهُ أَطۡعَمَهُۥٓ إِنۡ أَنتُمۡ إِلَّا فِي ضَلَٰلࣲ مُّبِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: And when they are told, "Spend ye of (the bounties) with which God has provided you," the Unbelievers say to those who believe: "Shall we then feed those whom, if God had so willed, He would have fed, (Himself)?- Ye are in nothing but manifest error

verses.text: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا ٱلۡوَعۡدُ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.translation: Further, they say, "When will this promise (come to pass), if what ye say is true

verses.text: مَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا صَيۡحَةࣰ وَٰحِدَةࣰ تَأۡخُذُهُمۡ وَهُمۡ يَخِصِّمُونَ
verses.translation: They will not (have to) wait for aught but a single Blast: it will seize them while they are yet disputing among themselves

verses.text: فَلَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ تَوۡصِيَةࣰ وَلَآ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِمۡ يَرۡجِعُونَ
verses.translation: No (chance) will they then have, by will, to dispose (of their affairs), nor to return to their own people

verses.text: وَنُفِخَ فِي ٱلصُّورِ فَإِذَا هُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَجۡدَاثِ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمۡ يَنسِلُونَ
verses.translation: The trumpet shall be sounded, when behold! from the sepulchres (men) will rush forth to their Lord

verses.text: قَالُواْ يَٰوَيۡلَنَا مَنۢ بَعَثَنَا مِن مَّرۡقَدِنَاۜۗ هَٰذَا مَا وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وَصَدَقَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
verses.translation: They will say: "Ah! Woe unto us! Who hath raised us up from our beds of repose?"... (A voice will say:) "This is what (God) Most Gracious had promised. And true was the word of the apostles

verses.text: إِن كَانَتۡ إِلَّا صَيۡحَةࣰ وَٰحِدَةࣰ فَإِذَا هُمۡ جَمِيعࣱ لَّدَيۡنَا مُحۡضَرُونَ
verses.translation: It will be no more than a single Blast, when lo! they will all be brought up before Us

verses.text: فَٱلۡيَوۡمَ لَا تُظۡلَمُ نَفۡسࣱ شَيۡـࣰٔ ا وَلَا تُجۡزَوۡنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.translation: Then, on that Day, not a soul will be wronged in the least, and ye shall but be repaid the meeds of your past Deeds

verses.text: إِنَّ أَصۡحَٰبَ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ فِي شُغُلࣲ فَٰكِهُونَ
verses.translation: Verily the Companions of the Garden shall that Day have joy in all that they do

verses.text: هُمۡ وَأَزۡوَٰجُهُمۡ فِي ظِلَٰلٍ عَلَى ٱلۡأَرَآئِكِ مُتَّكِـُٔونَ
verses.translation: They and their associates will be in groves of (cool) shade, reclining on Thrones (of dignity)

verses.text: لَهُمۡ فِيهَا فَٰكِهَةࣱ وَلَهُم مَّا يَدَّعُونَ
verses.translation: (Every) fruit (enjoyment) will be there for them; they shall have whatever they call for

verses.text: سَلَٰمࣱ قَوۡلࣰ ا مِّن رَّبࣲّ رَّحِيمࣲ‏
verses.translation: Peace!" - a word (of salutation) from a Lord Most Merciful

verses.text: وَٱمۡتَٰزُواْ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ أَيُّهَا ٱلۡمُجۡرِمُونَ
verses.translation: And O ye in sin! Get ye apart this Day

verses.text: ۞أَلَمۡ أَعۡهَدۡ إِلَيۡكُمۡ يَٰبَنِيٓ ءَادَمَ أَن لَّا تَعۡبُدُواْ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنَۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكُمۡ عَدُوࣱّ مُّبِينࣱ‏
verses.translation: Did I not enjoin on you, O ye Children of Adam, that ye should not worship Satan; for that he was to you an enemy avowed

verses.text: وَأَنِ ٱعۡبُدُونِيۚ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطࣱ مُّسۡتَقِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: And that ye should worship Me, (for that) this was the Straight Way

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ أَضَلَّ مِنكُمۡ جِبِلࣰّ ا كَثِيرًاۖ أَفَلَمۡ تَكُونُواْ تَعۡقِلُونَ
verses.translation: But he did lead astray a great multitude of you. Did ye not, then, understand

verses.text: هَٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِي كُنتُمۡ تُوعَدُونَ
verses.translation: This is the Hell of which ye were (repeatedly) warned

verses.text: ٱصۡلَوۡهَا ٱلۡيَوۡمَ بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَكۡفُرُونَ
verses.translation: Embrace ye the (fire) this Day, for that ye (persistently) rejected (Truth)

verses.text: ٱلۡيَوۡمَ نَخۡتِمُ عَلَىٰٓ أَفۡوَٰهِهِمۡ وَتُكَلِّمُنَآ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ وَتَشۡهَدُ أَرۡجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُواْ يَكۡسِبُونَ
verses.translation: That Day shall We set a seal on their mouths. But their hands will speak to us, and their feet bear witness, to all that they did

verses.text: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَطَمَسۡنَا عَلَىٰٓ أَعۡيُنِهِمۡ فَٱسۡتَبَقُواْ ٱلصِّرَٰطَ فَأَنَّىٰ يُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.translation: If it had been our Will, We could surely have blotted out their eyes; then should they have run about groping for the Path, but how could they have seen

verses.text: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخۡنَٰهُمۡ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمۡ فَمَا ٱسۡتَطَٰعُواْ مُضِيࣰّ ا وَلَا يَرۡجِعُونَ
verses.translation: And if it had been Our Will, We could have transformed them (to remain) in their places; then should they have been unable to move about, nor could they have returned (after error)

verses.text: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرۡهُ نُنَكِّسۡهُ فِي ٱلۡخَلۡقِۚ أَفَلَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
verses.translation: If We grant long life to any, We cause him to be reversed in nature: Will they not then understand

verses.text: وَمَا عَلَّمۡنَٰهُ ٱلشِّعۡرَ وَمَا يَنۢبَغِي لَهُۥٓۚ إِنۡ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكۡرࣱ وَقُرۡءَانࣱ مُّبِينࣱ‏
verses.translation: We have not instructed the (Prophet) in Poetry, nor is it meet for him: this is no less than a Message and a Qur'an making things clear

verses.text: لِّيُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيࣰّ ا وَيَحِقَّ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.translation: That it may give admonition to any (who are) alive, and that the charge may be proved against those who reject (Truth)

verses.text: أَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ أَنَّا خَلَقۡنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتۡ أَيۡدِينَآ أَنۡعَٰمࣰ ا فَهُمۡ لَهَا مَٰلِكُونَ
verses.translation: See they not that it is We Who have created for them - among the things which Our hands have fashioned - cattle, which are under their dominion

verses.text: وَذَلَّلۡنَٰهَا لَهُمۡ فَمِنۡهَا رَكُوبُهُمۡ وَمِنۡهَا يَأۡكُلُونَ
verses.translation: And that We have subjected them to their (use)? of them some do carry them and some they eat

verses.text: وَلَهُمۡ فِيهَا مَنَٰفِعُ وَمَشَارِبُۚ أَفَلَا يَشۡكُرُونَ
verses.translation: And they have (other) profits from them (besides), and they get (milk) to drink. Will they not then be grateful

verses.text: وَٱتَّخَذُواْ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةࣰ لَّعَلَّهُمۡ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.translation: Yet they take (for worship) gods other than God, (hoping) that they might be helped

verses.text: لَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ نَصۡرَهُمۡ وَهُمۡ لَهُمۡ جُندࣱ مُّحۡضَرُونَ
verses.translation: They have not the power to help them: but they will be brought up (before Our Judgment-seat) as a troop (to be condemned)

verses.text: فَلَا يَحۡزُنكَ قَوۡلُهُمۡۘ إِنَّا نَعۡلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُونَ
verses.translation: Let not their speech, then, grieve thee. Verily We know what they hide as well as what they disclose

verses.text: أَوَلَمۡ يَرَ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقۡنَٰهُ مِن نُّطۡفَةࣲ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمࣱ مُّبِينࣱ‏
verses.translation: Doth not man see that it is We Who created him from sperm? yet behold! he (stands forth) as an open adversary

verses.text: وَضَرَبَ لَنَا مَثَلࣰ ا وَنَسِيَ خَلۡقَهُۥۖ قَالَ مَن يُحۡيِ ٱلۡعِظَٰمَ وَهِيَ رَمِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: And he makes comparisons for Us, and forgets his own (origin and) Creation: He says, "Who can give life to (dry) bones and decomposed ones (at that)

verses.text: قُلۡ يُحۡيِيهَا ٱلَّذِيٓ أَنشَأَهَآ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةࣲۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ خَلۡقٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.translation: Say, "He will give them life Who created them for the first time! for He is Well-versed in every kind of creation

verses.text: ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلشَّجَرِ ٱلۡأَخۡضَرِ نَارࣰ ا فَإِذَآ أَنتُم مِّنۡهُ تُوقِدُونَ
verses.translation: The same Who produces for you fire out of the green tree, when behold! ye kindle therewith (your own fires)

verses.text: أَوَلَيۡسَ ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ بِقَٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يَخۡلُقَ مِثۡلَهُمۚ بَلَىٰ وَهُوَ ٱلۡخَلَّٰقُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
verses.translation: Is not He Who created the heavens and the earth able to create the like thereof?" - Yea, indeed! for He is the Creator Supreme, of skill and knowledge (infinite)

verses.text: إِنَّمَآ أَمۡرُهُۥٓ إِذَآ أَرَادَ شَيۡـًٔا أَن يَقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
verses.translation: Verily, when He intends a thing, His Command is, "be", and it is

verses.text: فَسُبۡحَٰنَ ٱلَّذِي بِيَدِهِۦ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَيۡءࣲ وَإِلَيۡهِ تُرۡجَعُونَ
verses.translation: So glory to Him in Whose hands is the dominion of all things: and to Him will ye be all brought back

verses.text: وَٱلصَّٰٓفَّٰتِ صَفࣰّ ا
verses.translation: By those who range themselves in ranks

verses.text: فَٱلزَّٰجِرَٰتِ زَجۡرࣰ ا
verses.translation: And so are strong in repelling (evil)

verses.text: فَٱلتَّٰلِيَٰتِ ذِكۡرًا
verses.translation: And thus proclaim the Message (of God)
Verily, verily, your God is one

verses.text: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا وَرَبُّ ٱلۡمَشَٰرِقِ
verses.translation: Lord of the heavens and of the earth and all between them, and Lord of every point at the rising of the sun

verses.text: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا بِزِينَةٍ ٱلۡكَوَاكِبِ
verses.translation: We have indeed decked the lower heaven with beauty (in) the stars

verses.text: وَحِفۡظࣰ ا مِّن كُلِّ شَيۡطَٰنࣲ مَّارِدࣲ‏
verses.translation: (For beauty) and for guard against all obstinate rebellious evil spirits

verses.text: لَّا يَسَّمَّعُونَ إِلَى ٱلۡمَلَإِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰ وَيُقۡذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبࣲ‏
verses.translation: (So) they should not strain their ears in the direction of the Exalted Assembly but be cast away from every side

verses.text: دُحُورࣰ اۖ وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابࣱ وَاصِبٌ
verses.translation: Repulsed, for they are under a perpetual penalty

verses.text: إِلَّا مَنۡ خَطِفَ ٱلۡخَطۡفَةَ فَأَتۡبَعَهُۥ شِهَابࣱ ثَاقِبࣱ‏
verses.translation: Except such as snatch away something by stealth, and they are pursued by a flaming fire, of piercing brightness

verses.text: فَٱسۡتَفۡتِهِمۡ أَهُمۡ أَشَدُّ خَلۡقًا أَم مَّنۡ خَلَقۡنَآۚ إِنَّا خَلَقۡنَٰهُم مِّن طِينࣲ لَّازِبِۭ
verses.translation: Just ask their opinion: are they the more difficult to create, or the (other) beings We have created? Them have We created out of a sticky clay

verses.text: بَلۡ عَجِبۡتَ وَيَسۡخَرُونَ
verses.translation: Truly dost thou marvel, while they ridicule

verses.text: وَإِذَا ذُكِّرُواْ لَا يَذۡكُرُونَ
verses.translation: And, when they are admonished, pay no heed

verses.text: وَإِذَا رَأَوۡاْ ءَايَةࣰ يَسۡتَسۡخِرُونَ
verses.translation: And, when they see a Sign, turn it to mockery

verses.text: وَقَالُوٓاْ إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحۡرࣱ مُّبِينٌ
verses.translation: And say, "This is nothing but evident sorcery

verses.text: أَءِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابࣰ ا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبۡعُوثُونَ
verses.translation: What! when we die, and become dust and bones, shall we (then) be raised up (again)

verses.text: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا ٱلۡأَوَّلُونَ
verses.translation: And also our fathers of old

verses.text: قُلۡ نَعَمۡ وَأَنتُمۡ دَٰخِرُونَ
verses.translation: Say thou: "Yea, and ye shall then be humiliated (on account of your evil)

verses.text: فَإِنَّمَا هِيَ زَجۡرَةࣱ وَٰحِدَةࣱ فَإِذَا هُمۡ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.translation: Then it will be a single (compelling) cry; and behold, they will begin to see

verses.text: وَقَالُواْ يَٰوَيۡلَنَا هَٰذَا يَوۡمُ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.translation: They will say, "Ah! Woe to us! This is the Day of Judgment

verses.text: هَٰذَا يَوۡمُ ٱلۡفَصۡلِ ٱلَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.translation: (A voice will say,) "This is the Day of Sorting Out, whose truth ye (once) denied

verses.text: ۞ٱحۡشُرُواْ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ وَأَزۡوَٰجَهُمۡ وَمَا كَانُواْ يَعۡبُدُونَ
verses.translation: Bring ye up", it shall be said, "The wrong-doers and their wives, and the things they worshipped

verses.text: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ فَٱهۡدُوهُمۡ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطِ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.translation: Besides God, and lead them to the Way to the (Fierce) Fire

verses.text: وَقِفُوهُمۡۖ إِنَّهُم مَّسۡـُٔولُونَ
verses.translation: But stop them, for they must be asked

verses.text: مَا لَكُمۡ لَا تَنَاصَرُونَ
verses.translation: What is the matter with you that ye help not each other

verses.text: بَلۡ هُمُ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ مُسۡتَسۡلِمُونَ
verses.translation: Nay, but that day they shall submit (to Judgment)

verses.text: وَأَقۡبَلَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضࣲ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.translation: And they will turn to one another, and question one another

verses.text: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّكُمۡ كُنتُمۡ تَأۡتُونَنَا عَنِ ٱلۡيَمِينِ
verses.translation: They will say: "It was ye who used to come to us from the right hand (of power and authority)

verses.text: قَالُواْ بَل لَّمۡ تَكُونُواْ مُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.translation: They will reply: "Nay, ye yourselves had no Faith

verses.text: وَمَا كَانَ لَنَا عَلَيۡكُم مِّن سُلۡطَٰنِۭۖ بَلۡ كُنتُمۡ قَوۡمࣰ ا طَٰغِينَ
verses.translation: Nor had we any authority over you. Nay, it was ye who were a people in obstinate rebellion

verses.text: فَحَقَّ عَلَيۡنَا قَوۡلُ رَبِّنَآۖ إِنَّا لَذَآئِقُونَ
verses.translation: So now has been proved true, against us, the word of our Lord that we shall indeed (have to) taste (the punishment of our sins)

verses.text: فَأَغۡوَيۡنَٰكُمۡ إِنَّا كُنَّا غَٰوِينَ
verses.translation: We led you astray: for truly we were ourselves astray

verses.text: فَإِنَّهُمۡ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ فِي ٱلۡعَذَابِ مُشۡتَرِكُونَ
verses.translation: Truly, that Day, they will (all) share in the Penalty

verses.text: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَفۡعَلُ بِٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
verses.translation: Verily that is how We shall deal with Sinners

verses.text: إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوٓاْ إِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمۡ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ يَسۡتَكۡبِرُونَ
verses.translation: For they, when they were told that there is no god except God, would puff themselves up with Pride

verses.text: وَيَقُولُونَ أَئِنَّا لَتَارِكُوٓاْ ءَالِهَتِنَا لِشَاعِرࣲ مَّجۡنُونِۭ
verses.translation: And say: "What! shall we give up our gods for the sake of a Poet possessed

verses.text: بَلۡ جَآءَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَصَدَّقَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.translation: Nay! he has come with the (very) Truth, and he confirms (the Message of) the apostles (before him)

verses.text: إِنَّكُمۡ لَذَآئِقُواْ ٱلۡعَذَابِ ٱلۡأَلِيمِ
verses.translation: Ye shall indeed taste of the Grievous Penalty

verses.text: وَمَا تُجۡزَوۡنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.translation: But it will be no more than the retribution of (the Evil) that ye have wrought

verses.text: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
verses.translation: But the sincere (and devoted) Servants of God

verses.text: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ رِزۡقࣱ مَّعۡلُومࣱ‏
verses.translation: For them is a Sustenance determined

verses.text: فَوَٰكِهُ وَهُم مُّكۡرَمُونَ
verses.translation: Fruits (Delights); and they (shall enjoy) honour and dignity

verses.text: فِي جَنَّٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.translation: In Gardens of Felicity

verses.text: عَلَىٰ سُرُرࣲ مُّتَقَٰبِلِينَ
verses.translation: Facing each other on Thrones (of Dignity)

verses.text: يُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِم بِكَأۡسࣲ مِّن مَّعِينِۭ
verses.translation: Round will be passed to them a Cup from a clear-flowing fountain

verses.text: بَيۡضَآءَ لَذَّةࣲ لِّلشَّٰرِبِينَ
verses.translation: Crystal-white, of a taste delicious to those who drink (thereof)

verses.text: لَا فِيهَا غَوۡلࣱ وَلَا هُمۡ عَنۡهَا يُنزَفُونَ
verses.translation: Free from headiness; nor will they suffer intoxication therefrom

verses.text: وَعِندَهُمۡ قَٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرۡفِ عِينࣱ‏
verses.translation: And besides them will be chaste women, restraining their glances, with big eyes (of wonder and beauty)

verses.text: كَأَنَّهُنَّ بَيۡضࣱ مَّكۡنُونࣱ‏
verses.translation: As if they were (delicate) eggs closely guarded

verses.text: فَأَقۡبَلَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضࣲ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.translation: Then they will turn to one another and question one another

verses.text: قَالَ قَآئِلࣱ مِّنۡهُمۡ إِنِّي كَانَ لِي قَرِينࣱ‏
verses.translation: One of them will start the talk and say: "I had an intimate companion (on the earth)

verses.text: يَقُولُ أَءِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلۡمُصَدِّقِينَ
verses.translation: Who used to say, 'what! art thou amongst those who bear witness to the Truth (of the Message)

verses.text: أَءِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابࣰ ا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَدِينُونَ
verses.translation: When we die and become dust and bones, shall we indeed receive rewards and punishments

verses.text: قَالَ هَلۡ أَنتُم مُّطَّلِعُونَ
verses.translation: (A voice) said: "Would ye like to look down

verses.text: فَٱطَّلَعَ فَرَءَاهُ فِي سَوَآءِ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.translation: He looked down and saw him in the midst of the Fire

verses.text: قَالَ تَٱللَّهِ إِن كِدتَّ لَتُرۡدِينِ
verses.translation: He said: "By God! thou wast little short of bringing me to perdition

verses.text: وَلَوۡلَا نِعۡمَةُ رَبِّي لَكُنتُ مِنَ ٱلۡمُحۡضَرِينَ
verses.translation: Had it not been for the Grace of my Lord, I should certainly have been among those brought (there)

verses.text: أَفَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَيِّتِينَ
verses.translation: Is it (the case) that we shall not die

verses.text: إِلَّا مَوۡتَتَنَا ٱلۡأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ
verses.translation: Except our first death, and that we shall not be punished

verses.text: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلۡفَوۡزُ ٱلۡعَظِيمُ
verses.translation: Verily this is the supreme achievement

verses.text: لِمِثۡلِ هَٰذَا فَلۡيَعۡمَلِ ٱلۡعَٰمِلُونَ
verses.translation: For the like of this let all strive, who wish to strive

verses.text: أَذَٰلِكَ خَيۡرࣱ نُّزُلًا أَمۡ شَجَرَةُ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
verses.translation: Is that the better entertainment or the Tree of Zaqqum

verses.text: إِنَّا جَعَلۡنَٰهَا فِتۡنَةࣰ لِّلظَّٰلِمِينَ
verses.translation: For We have truly made it (as) a trial for the wrong-doers

verses.text: إِنَّهَا شَجَرَةࣱ تَخۡرُجُ فِيٓ أَصۡلِ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.translation: For it is a tree that springs out of the bottom of Hell-Fire

verses.text: طَلۡعُهَا كَأَنَّهُۥ رُءُوسُ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينِ
verses.translation: The shoots of its fruit-stalks are like the heads of devils

verses.text: فَإِنَّهُمۡ لَأٓكِلُونَ مِنۡهَا فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنۡهَا ٱلۡبُطُونَ
verses.translation: Truly they will eat thereof and fill their bellies therewith

verses.text: ثُمَّ إِنَّ لَهُمۡ عَلَيۡهَا لَشَوۡبࣰ ا مِّنۡ حَمِيمࣲ‏
verses.translation: Then on top of that they will be given a mixture made of boiling water

verses.text: ثُمَّ إِنَّ مَرۡجِعَهُمۡ لَإِلَى ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.translation: Then shall their return be to the (Blazing) Fire

verses.text: إِنَّهُمۡ أَلۡفَوۡاْ ءَابَآءَهُمۡ ضَآلِّينَ
verses.translation: Truly they found their fathers on the wrong Path

verses.text: فَهُمۡ عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَٰرِهِمۡ يُهۡرَعُونَ
verses.translation: So they (too) were rushed down on their footsteps

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ ضَلَّ قَبۡلَهُمۡ أَكۡثَرُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.translation: And truly before them, many of the ancients went astray

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا فِيهِم مُّنذِرِينَ
verses.translation: But We sent aforetime, among them, (apostles) to admonish them

verses.text: فَٱنظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلۡمُنذَرِينَ
verses.translation: Then see what was the end of those who were admonished (but heeded not)

verses.text: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
verses.translation: Except the sincere (and devoted) Servants of God

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ نَادَىٰنَا نُوحࣱ فَلَنِعۡمَ ٱلۡمُجِيبُونَ
verses.translation: (In the days of old), Noah cried to Us, and We are the best to hear prayer

verses.text: وَنَجَّيۡنَٰهُ وَأَهۡلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلۡكَرۡبِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.translation: And We delivered him and his people from the Great Calamity

verses.text: وَجَعَلۡنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُۥ هُمُ ٱلۡبَاقِينَ
verses.translation: And made his progeny to endure (on this earth)

verses.text: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
verses.translation: And We left (this blessing) for him among generations to come in later times

verses.text: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ نُوحࣲ فِي ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translation: Peace and salutation to Noah among the nations

verses.text: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.translation: Thus indeed do we reward those who do right

verses.text: إِنَّهُۥ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.translation: For he was one of our believing Servants

verses.text: ثُمَّ أَغۡرَقۡنَا ٱلۡأٓخَرِينَ
verses.translation: Then the rest we overwhelmed in the Flood

verses.text: ۞وَإِنَّ مِن شِيعَتِهِۦ لَإِبۡرَٰهِيمَ
verses.translation: Verily among those who followed his Way was Abraham

verses.text: إِذۡ جَآءَ رَبَّهُۥ بِقَلۡبࣲ سَلِيمٍ
verses.translation: Behold! he approached his Lord with a sound heart

verses.text: إِذۡ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوۡمِهِۦ مَاذَا تَعۡبُدُونَ
verses.translation: Behold! he said to his father and to his people, "What is that which ye worship

verses.text: أَئِفۡكًا ءَالِهَةࣰ دُونَ ٱللَّهِ تُرِيدُونَ
verses.translation: Is it a falsehood- gods other than God- that ye desire

verses.text: فَمَا ظَنُّكُم بِرَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translation: Then what is your idea about the Lord of the worlds

verses.text: فَنَظَرَ نَظۡرَةࣰ فِي ٱلنُّجُومِ
verses.translation: Then did he cast a glance at the Stars

verses.text: فَقَالَ إِنِّي سَقِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: And he said, "I am indeed sick (at heart)

verses.text: فَتَوَلَّوۡاْ عَنۡهُ مُدۡبِرِينَ
verses.translation: So they turned away from him, and departed

verses.text: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِهِمۡ فَقَالَ أَلَا تَأۡكُلُونَ
verses.translation: Then did he turn to their gods and said, "will ye not eat (of the offerings before you)

verses.text: مَا لَكُمۡ لَا تَنطِقُونَ
verses.translation: What is the matter with you that ye speak not (intelligently)

verses.text: فَرَاغَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ضَرۡبَۢا بِٱلۡيَمِينِ
verses.translation: Then did he turn upon them, striking (them) with the right hand

verses.text: فَأَقۡبَلُوٓاْ إِلَيۡهِ يَزِفُّونَ
verses.translation: Then came (the worshippers) with hurried steps, and faced (him)

verses.text: قَالَ أَتَعۡبُدُونَ مَا تَنۡحِتُونَ
verses.translation: He said: "Worship ye that which ye have (yourselves) carved

verses.text: وَٱللَّهُ خَلَقَكُمۡ وَمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.translation: But God has created you and your handwork

verses.text: قَالُواْ ٱبۡنُواْ لَهُۥ بُنۡيَٰنࣰ ا فَأَلۡقُوهُ فِي ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.translation: They said, "Build him a furnace, and throw him into the blazing fire

verses.text: فَأَرَادُواْ بِهِۦ كَيۡدࣰ ا فَجَعَلۡنَٰهُمُ ٱلۡأَسۡفَلِينَ
verses.translation: (This failing), they then sought a stratagem against him, but We made them the ones most humiliated

verses.text: وَقَالَ إِنِّي ذَاهِبٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّي سَيَهۡدِينِ
verses.translation: He said: "I will go to my Lord! He will surely guide me

verses.text: رَبِّ هَبۡ لِي مِنَ ٱلصَّٰلِحِينَ
verses.translation: O my Lord! Grant me a righteous (son)

verses.text: فَبَشَّرۡنَٰهُ بِغُلَٰمٍ حَلِيمࣲ‏
verses.translation: So We gave him the good news of a boy ready to suffer and forbear

verses.text: فَلَمَّا بَلَغَ مَعَهُ ٱلسَّعۡيَ قَالَ يَٰبُنَيَّ إِنِّيٓ أَرَىٰ فِي ٱلۡمَنَامِ أَنِّيٓ أَذۡبَحُكَ فَٱنظُرۡ مَاذَا تَرَىٰۚ قَالَ يَٰٓأَبَتِ ٱفۡعَلۡ مَا تُؤۡمَرُۖ سَتَجِدُنِيٓ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰبِرِينَ
verses.translation: Then, when (the son) reached (the age of) (serious) work with him, he said: "O my son! I see in vision that I offer thee in sacrifice: Now see what is thy view!" (The son) said: "O my father! Do as thou art commanded: thou will find me, if God so wills one practising Patience and Constancy

verses.text: فَلَمَّآ أَسۡلَمَا وَتَلَّهُۥ لِلۡجَبِينِ
verses.translation: So when they had both submitted their wills (to God), and he had laid him prostrate on his forehead (for sacrifice)

verses.text: وَنَٰدَيۡنَٰهُ أَن يَٰٓإِبۡرَٰهِيمُ
verses.translation: We called out to him "O Abraham

verses.text: قَدۡ صَدَّقۡتَ ٱلرُّءۡيَآۚ إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.translation: Thou hast already fulfilled the vision!" - thus indeed do We reward those who do right

verses.text: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلۡبَلَٰٓؤُاْ ٱلۡمُبِينُ
verses.translation: For this was obviously a trial

verses.text: وَفَدَيۡنَٰهُ بِذِبۡحٍ عَظِيمࣲ‏
verses.translation: And We ransomed him with a momentous sacrifice

verses.text: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
verses.translation: And We left (this blessing) for him among generations (to come) in later times

verses.text: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰٓ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ
verses.translation: Peace and salutation to Abraham

verses.text: كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.translation: Thus indeed do We reward those who do right

verses.text: إِنَّهُۥ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.translation: For he was one of our believing Servants

verses.text: وَبَشَّرۡنَٰهُ بِإِسۡحَٰقَ نَبِيࣰّ ا مِّنَ ٱلصَّٰلِحِينَ
verses.translation: And We gave him the good news of Isaac - a prophet,- one of the Righteous

verses.text: وَبَٰرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ وَعَلَىٰٓ إِسۡحَٰقَۚ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا مُحۡسِنࣱ وَظَالِمࣱ لِّنَفۡسِهِۦ مُبِينࣱ‏
verses.translation: We blessed him and Isaac: but of their progeny are (some) that do right, and (some) that obviously do wrong, to their own souls

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ مَنَنَّا عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ وَهَٰرُونَ
verses.translation: Again (of old) We bestowed Our favour on Moses and Aaron

verses.text: وَنَجَّيۡنَٰهُمَا وَقَوۡمَهُمَا مِنَ ٱلۡكَرۡبِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.translation: And We delivered them and their people from (their) Great Calamity

verses.text: وَنَصَرۡنَٰهُمۡ فَكَانُواْ هُمُ ٱلۡغَٰلِبِينَ
verses.translation: And We helped them, so they overcame (their troubles)

verses.text: وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُمَا ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ ٱلۡمُسۡتَبِينَ
verses.translation: And We gave them the Book which helps to make things clear

verses.text: وَهَدَيۡنَٰهُمَا ٱلصِّرَٰطَ ٱلۡمُسۡتَقِيمَ
verses.translation: And We guided them to the Straight Way

verses.text: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمَا فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
verses.translation: And We left (this blessing) for them among generations (to come) in later times

verses.text: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ وَهَٰرُونَ
verses.translation: Peace and salutation to Moses and Aaron

verses.text: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.translation: Thus indeed do We reward those who do right

verses.text: إِنَّهُمَا مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.translation: For they were two of our believing Servants

verses.text: وَإِنَّ إِلۡيَاسَ لَمِنَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.translation: So also was Elias among those sent (by Us)

verses.text: إِذۡ قَالَ لِقَوۡمِهِۦٓ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.translation: Behold, he said to his people, "Will ye not fear (God)

verses.text: أَتَدۡعُونَ بَعۡلࣰ ا وَتَذَرُونَ أَحۡسَنَ ٱلۡخَٰلِقِينَ
verses.translation: Will ye call upon Baal and forsake the Best of Creators

verses.text: ٱللَّهَ رَبَّكُمۡ وَرَبَّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.translation: God, your Lord and Cherisher and the Lord and Cherisher of your fathers of old

verses.text: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَإِنَّهُمۡ لَمُحۡضَرُونَ
verses.translation: But they rejected him, and they will certainly be called up (for punishment)

verses.text: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
verses.translation: Except the sincere and devoted Servants of God (among them)

verses.text: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
verses.translation: And We left (this blessing) for him among generations (to come) in later times

verses.text: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰٓ إِلۡ يَاسِينَ
verses.translation: Peace and salutation to such as Elias

verses.text: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.translation: Thus indeed do We reward those who do right

verses.text: إِنَّهُۥ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.translation: For he was one of our believing Servants

verses.text: وَإِنَّ لُوطࣰ ا لَّمِنَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.translation: So also was Lut among those sent (by Us)

verses.text: إِذۡ نَجَّيۡنَٰهُ وَأَهۡلَهُۥٓ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.translation: Behold, We delivered him and his adherents, all

verses.text: إِلَّا عَجُوزࣰ ا فِي ٱلۡغَٰبِرِينَ
verses.translation: Except an old woman who was among those who lagged behind

verses.text: ثُمَّ دَمَّرۡنَا ٱلۡأٓخَرِينَ
verses.translation: Then We destroyed the rest

verses.text: وَإِنَّكُمۡ لَتَمُرُّونَ عَلَيۡهِم مُّصۡبِحِينَ
verses.translation: Verily, ye pass by their (sites), by day

verses.text: وَبِٱلَّيۡلِۚ أَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُونَ
verses.translation: And by night: will ye not understand

verses.text: وَإِنَّ يُونُسَ لَمِنَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.translation: So also was Jonah among those sent (by Us)

verses.text: إِذۡ أَبَقَ إِلَى ٱلۡفُلۡكِ ٱلۡمَشۡحُونِ
verses.translation: When he ran away (like a slave from captivity) to the ship (fully) laden

verses.text: فَسَاهَمَ فَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُدۡحَضِينَ
verses.translation: He (agreed to) cast lots, and he was condemned

verses.text: فَٱلۡتَقَمَهُ ٱلۡحُوتُ وَهُوَ مُلِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: Then the big Fish did swallow him, and he had done acts worthy of blame

verses.text: فَلَوۡلَآ أَنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُسَبِّحِينَ
verses.translation: Had it not been that he (repented and) glorified God

verses.text: لَلَبِثَ فِي بَطۡنِهِۦٓ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ يُبۡعَثُونَ
verses.translation: He would certainly have remained inside the Fish till the Day of Resurrection

verses.text: ۞فَنَبَذۡنَٰهُ بِٱلۡعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ سَقِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: But We cast him forth on the naked shore in a state of sickness

verses.text: وَأَنۢبَتۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ شَجَرَةࣰ مِّن يَقۡطِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: And We caused to grow, over him, a spreading plant of the gourd kind

verses.text: وَأَرۡسَلۡنَٰهُ إِلَىٰ مِاْئَةِ أَلۡفٍ أَوۡ يَزِيدُونَ
verses.translation: And We sent him (on a mission) to a hundred thousand (men) or more

verses.text: فَـَٔامَنُواْ فَمَتَّعۡنَٰهُمۡ إِلَىٰ حِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: And they believed; so We permitted them to enjoy (their life) for a while

verses.text: فَٱسۡتَفۡتِهِمۡ أَلِرَبِّكَ ٱلۡبَنَاتُ وَلَهُمُ ٱلۡبَنُونَ
verses.translation: Now ask them their opinion: Is it that thy Lord has (only) daughters, and they have sons

verses.text: أَمۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ إِنَٰثࣰ ا وَهُمۡ شَٰهِدُونَ
verses.translation: Or that We created the angels female, and they are witnesses (thereto)

verses.text: أَلَآ إِنَّهُم مِّنۡ إِفۡكِهِمۡ لَيَقُولُونَ
verses.translation: Is it not that they say, from their own invention

verses.text: وَلَدَ ٱللَّهُ وَإِنَّهُمۡ لَكَٰذِبُونَ
verses.translation: God has begotten children"? but they are liars

verses.text: أَصۡطَفَى ٱلۡبَنَاتِ عَلَى ٱلۡبَنِينَ
verses.translation: Did He (then) choose daughters rather than sons

verses.text: مَا لَكُمۡ كَيۡفَ تَحۡكُمُونَ
verses.translation: What is the matter with you? How judge ye

verses.text: أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.translation: Will ye not then receive admonition

verses.text: أَمۡ لَكُمۡ سُلۡطَٰنࣱ مُّبِينࣱ‏
verses.translation: Or have ye an authority manifest

verses.text: فَأۡتُواْ بِكِتَٰبِكُمۡ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.translation: Then bring ye your Book (of authority) if ye be truthful

verses.text: وَجَعَلُواْ بَيۡنَهُۥ وَبَيۡنَ ٱلۡجِنَّةِ نَسَبࣰ اۚ وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمَتِ ٱلۡجِنَّةُ إِنَّهُمۡ لَمُحۡضَرُونَ
verses.translation: And they have invented a blood-relationship between Him and the Jinns: but the Jinns know (quite well) that they have indeed to appear (before his Judgment- Seat)

verses.text: سُبۡحَٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
verses.translation: Glory to God! (He is free) from the things they ascribe (to Him)

verses.text: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
verses.translation: Not (so do) the Servants of God, sincere and devoted

verses.text: فَإِنَّكُمۡ وَمَا تَعۡبُدُونَ
verses.translation: For, verily, neither ye nor those ye worship

verses.text: مَآ أَنتُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ بِفَٰتِنِينَ
verses.translation: Can lead (any) into temptation concerning God

verses.text: إِلَّا مَنۡ هُوَ صَالِ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.translation: Except such as are (themselves) going to the blazing Fire

verses.text: وَمَا مِنَّآ إِلَّا لَهُۥ مَقَامࣱ مَّعۡلُومࣱ‏
verses.translation: (Those ranged in ranks say): "Not one of us but has a place appointed

verses.text: وَإِنَّا لَنَحۡنُ ٱلصَّآفُّونَ
verses.translation: And we are verily ranged in ranks (for service)

verses.text: وَإِنَّا لَنَحۡنُ ٱلۡمُسَبِّحُونَ
verses.translation: And we are verily those who declare (God's) glory

verses.text: وَإِن كَانُواْ لَيَقُولُونَ
verses.translation: And there were those who said

verses.text: لَوۡ أَنَّ عِندَنَا ذِكۡرࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.translation: If only we had had before us a Message from those of old

verses.text: لَكُنَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
verses.translation: We should certainly have been Servants of God, sincere (and devoted)

verses.text: فَكَفَرُواْ بِهِۦۖ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: But (now that the Qur'an has come), they reject it: But soon will they know

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ سَبَقَتۡ كَلِمَتُنَا لِعِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.translation: Already has Our Word been passed before (this) to our Servants sent (by Us)

verses.text: إِنَّهُمۡ لَهُمُ ٱلۡمَنصُورُونَ
verses.translation: That they would certainly be assisted

verses.text: وَإِنَّ جُندَنَا لَهُمُ ٱلۡغَٰلِبُونَ
verses.translation: And that Our forces,- they surely must conquer

verses.text: فَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ حَتَّىٰ حِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: So turn thou away from them for a little while

verses.text: وَأَبۡصِرۡهُمۡ فَسَوۡفَ يُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.translation: And watch them (how they fare), and they soon shall see (how thou farest)

verses.text: أَفَبِعَذَابِنَا يَسۡتَعۡجِلُونَ
verses.translation: Do they wish (indeed) to hurry on our Punishment

verses.text: فَإِذَا نَزَلَ بِسَاحَتِهِمۡ فَسَآءَ صَبَاحُ ٱلۡمُنذَرِينَ
verses.translation: But when it descends into the open space before them, evil will be the morning for those who were warned (and heeded not)

verses.text: وَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ حَتَّىٰ حِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: So turn thou away from them for a little while

verses.text: وَأَبۡصِرۡ فَسَوۡفَ يُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.translation: And watch (how they fare) and they soon shall see (how thou farest)

verses.text: سُبۡحَٰنَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ ٱلۡعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
verses.translation: Glory to thy Lord, the Lord of Honour and Power! (He is free) from what they ascribe (to Him)

verses.text: وَسَلَٰمٌ عَلَى ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.translation: And Peace on the apostles

verses.text: وَٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translation: And Praise to God, the Lord and Cherisher of the Worlds

verses.text: صٓۚ وَٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ ذِي ٱلذِّكۡرِ
verses.translation: Sad: By the Qur'an, Full of Admonition: (This is the Truth)

verses.text: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ فِي عِزَّةࣲ وَشِقَاقࣲ‏
verses.translation: But the Unbelievers (are steeped) in self-glory and Separatism

verses.text: كَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا مِن قَبۡلِهِم مِّن قَرۡنࣲ فَنَادَواْ وَّلَاتَ حِينَ مَنَاصࣲ‏
verses.translation: How many generations before them did We destroy? In the end they cried (for mercy)- when there was no longer time for being saved

verses.text: وَعَجِبُوٓاْ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرࣱ مِّنۡهُمۡۖ وَقَالَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا سَٰحِرࣱ كَذَّابٌ
verses.translation: So they wonder that a Warner has come to them from among themselves! and the Unbelievers say, "This is a sorcerer telling lies

verses.text: أَجَعَلَ ٱلۡأٓلِهَةَ إِلَٰهࣰ ا وَٰحِدًاۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَشَيۡءٌ عُجَابࣱ‏
verses.translation: Has he made the gods (all) into one God? Truly this is a wonderful thing

verses.text: وَٱنطَلَقَ ٱلۡمَلَأُ مِنۡهُمۡ أَنِ ٱمۡشُواْ وَٱصۡبِرُواْ عَلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِكُمۡۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَشَيۡءࣱ يُرَادُ
verses.translation: And the leader among them go away (impatiently), (saying), "Walk ye away, and remain constant to your gods! For this is truly a thing designed (against you)

verses.text: مَا سَمِعۡنَا بِهَٰذَا فِي ٱلۡمِلَّةِ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا ٱخۡتِلَٰقٌ
verses.translation: We never heard (the like) of this among the people of these latter days: this is nothing but a made-up tale

verses.text: أَءُنزِلَ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلذِّكۡرُ مِنۢ بَيۡنِنَاۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِي شَكࣲّ مِّن ذِكۡرِيۚ بَل لَّمَّا يَذُوقُواْ عَذَابِ
verses.translation: What! has the Message been sent to him - (Of all persons) among us?"...but they are in doubt concerning My (Own) Message! Nay, they have not yet tasted My Punishment

verses.text: أَمۡ عِندَهُمۡ خَزَآئِنُ رَحۡمَةِ رَبِّكَ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلۡوَهَّابِ
verses.translation: Or have they the treasures of the mercy of thy Lord,- the Exalted in Power, the Grantor of Bounties without measure

verses.text: أَمۡ لَهُم مُّلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَاۖ فَلۡيَرۡتَقُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَسۡبَٰبِ
verses.translation: Or have they the dominion of the heavens and the earth and all between? If so, let them mount up with the ropes and means (to reach that end)

verses.text: جُندࣱ مَّا هُنَالِكَ مَهۡزُومࣱ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَحۡزَابِ
verses.translation: But there - will be put to flight even a host of confederates

verses.text: كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوحࣲ وَعَادࣱ وَفِرۡعَوۡنُ ذُو ٱلۡأَوۡتَادِ
verses.translation: Before them (were many who) rejected apostles,- the people of Noah, and 'Ad, and Pharaoh, the Lord of Stakes

verses.text: وَثَمُودُ وَقَوۡمُ لُوطࣲ وَأَصۡحَٰبُ لۡـَٔيۡكَةِۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلۡأَحۡزَابُ
verses.translation: And Thamud, and the people of Lut, and the Companions of the Wood; - such were the Confederates

verses.text: إِن كُلٌّ إِلَّا كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ عِقَابِ
verses.translation: Not one (of them) but rejected the apostles, but My punishment came justly and inevitably (on them)

verses.text: وَمَا يَنظُرُ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِلَّا صَيۡحَةࣰ وَٰحِدَةࣰ مَّا لَهَا مِن فَوَاقࣲ‏
verses.translation: These (today) only wait for a single mighty Blast, which (when it comes) will brook no delay

verses.text: وَقَالُواْ رَبَّنَا عَجِّل لَّنَا قِطَّنَا قَبۡلَ يَوۡمِ ٱلۡحِسَابِ
verses.translation: They say: "Our Lord! hasten to us our sentence (even) before the Day of Account

verses.text: ٱصۡبِرۡ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱذۡكُرۡ عَبۡدَنَا دَاوُۥدَ ذَا ٱلۡأَيۡدِۖ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
verses.translation: Have patience at what they say, and remember our servant David, the man of strength: for he ever turned (to God)

verses.text: إِنَّا سَخَّرۡنَا ٱلۡجِبَالَ مَعَهُۥ يُسَبِّحۡنَ بِٱلۡعَشِيِّ وَٱلۡإِشۡرَاقِ
verses.translation: It was We that made the hills declare, in unison with him, Our Praises, at eventide and at break of day

verses.text: وَٱلطَّيۡرَ مَحۡشُورَةࣰۖ كُلࣱّ لَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابࣱ‏
verses.translation: And the birds gathered (in assemblies): all with him did turn (to God)

verses.text: وَشَدَدۡنَا مُلۡكَهُۥ وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُ ٱلۡحِكۡمَةَ وَفَصۡلَ ٱلۡخِطَابِ
verses.translation: We strengthened his kingdom, and gave him wisdom and sound judgment in speech and decision

verses.text: ۞وَهَلۡ أَتَىٰكَ نَبَؤُاْ ٱلۡخَصۡمِ إِذۡ تَسَوَّرُواْ ٱلۡمِحۡرَابَ
verses.translation: Has the Story of the Disputants reached thee? Behold, they climbed over the wall of the private chamber

verses.text: إِذۡ دَخَلُواْ عَلَىٰ دَاوُۥدَ فَفَزِعَ مِنۡهُمۡۖ قَالُواْ لَا تَخَفۡۖ خَصۡمَانِ بَغَىٰ بَعۡضُنَا عَلَىٰ بَعۡضࣲ فَٱحۡكُم بَيۡنَنَا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَا تُشۡطِطۡ وَٱهۡدِنَآ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلصِّرَٰطِ
verses.translation: When they entered the presence of David, and he was terrified of them, they said: "Fear not: we are two disputants, one of whom has wronged the other: Decide now between us with truth, and treat us not with injustice, but guide us to the even Path

verses.text: إِنَّ هَٰذَآ أَخِي لَهُۥ تِسۡعࣱ وَتِسۡعُونَ نَعۡجَةࣰ وَلِيَ نَعۡجَةࣱ وَٰحِدَةࣱ فَقَالَ أَكۡفِلۡنِيهَا وَعَزَّنِي فِي ٱلۡخِطَابِ
verses.translation: This man is my brother: He has nine and ninety ewes, and I have (but) one: Yet he says, 'commit her to my care,' and is (moreover) harsh to me in speech

verses.text: قَالَ لَقَدۡ ظَلَمَكَ بِسُؤَالِ نَعۡجَتِكَ إِلَىٰ نِعَاجِهِۦۖ وَإِنَّ كَثِيرࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱلۡخُلَطَآءِ لَيَبۡغِي بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٍ إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَقَلِيلࣱ مَّا هُمۡۗ وَظَنَّ دَاوُۥدُ أَنَّمَا فَتَنَّٰهُ فَٱسۡتَغۡفَرَ رَبَّهُۥ وَخَرَّۤ رَاكِعࣰ اۤ وَأَنَابَ۩
verses.translation: (David) said: "He has undoubtedly wronged thee in demanding thy (single) ewe to be added to his (flock of) ewes: truly many are the partners (in business) who wrong each other: Not so do those who believe and work deeds of righteousness, and h ow few are they?"...and David gathered that We had tried him: he asked forgiveness of his Lord, fell down, bowing (in prostration), and turned (to God in repentance)

verses.text: فَغَفَرۡنَا لَهُۥ ذَٰلِكَۖ وَإِنَّ لَهُۥ عِندَنَا لَزُلۡفَىٰ وَحُسۡنَ مَـَٔابࣲ‏
verses.translation: So We forgave him this (lapse): he enjoyed, indeed, a Near Approach to Us, and a beautiful place of (Final) Return

verses.text: يَٰدَاوُۥدُ إِنَّا جَعَلۡنَٰكَ خَلِيفَةࣰ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَٱحۡكُم بَيۡنَ ٱلنَّاسِ بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَا تَتَّبِعِ ٱلۡهَوَىٰ فَيُضِلَّكَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِۚ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَضِلُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ لَهُمۡ عَذَابࣱ شَدِيدُۢ بِمَا نَسُواْ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡحِسَابِ
verses.translation: O David! We did indeed make thee a vicegerent on earth: so judge thou between men in truth (and justice): Nor follow thou the lusts (of thy heart), for they will mislead thee from the Path of God: for those who wander astray from the Path of G od, is a Penalty Grievous, for that they forget the Day of Account

verses.text: وَمَا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا بَٰطِلࣰ اۚ ذَٰلِكَ ظَنُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْۚ فَوَيۡلࣱ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.translation: Not without purpose did We create heaven and earth and all between! that were the thought of Unbelievers! but woe to the Unbelievers because of the Fire (of Hell)

verses.text: أَمۡ نَجۡعَلُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ كَٱلۡمُفۡسِدِينَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ أَمۡ نَجۡعَلُ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ كَٱلۡفُجَّارِ
verses.translation: Shall We treat those who believe and work deeds of righteousness, the same as those who do mischief on earth? Shall We treat those who guard against evil, the same as those who turn aside from the right

verses.text: كِتَٰبٌ أَنزَلۡنَٰهُ إِلَيۡكَ مُبَٰرَكࣱ لِّيَدَّبَّرُوٓاْ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُوْلُواْ ٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِ
verses.translation: (Here is) a Book which We have sent down unto thee, full of blessings, that they may mediate on its Signs, and that men of understanding may receive admonition

verses.text: وَوَهَبۡنَا لِدَاوُۥدَ سُلَيۡمَٰنَۚ نِعۡمَ ٱلۡعَبۡدُ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
verses.translation: To David We gave Solomon (for a son),- How excellent in Our service! Ever did he turn (to Us)

verses.text: إِذۡ عُرِضَ عَلَيۡهِ بِٱلۡعَشِيِّ ٱلصَّٰفِنَٰتُ ٱلۡجِيَادُ
verses.translation: Behold, there were brought before him, at eventide coursers of the highest breeding, and swift of foot

verses.text: فَقَالَ إِنِّيٓ أَحۡبَبۡتُ حُبَّ ٱلۡخَيۡرِ عَن ذِكۡرِ رَبِّي حَتَّىٰ تَوَارَتۡ بِٱلۡحِجَابِ
verses.translation: And he said, "Truly do I love the love of good, with a view to the glory of my Lord,"- until (the sun) was hidden in the veil (of night)

verses.text: رُدُّوهَا عَلَيَّۖ فَطَفِقَ مَسۡحَۢا بِٱلسُّوقِ وَٱلۡأَعۡنَاقِ
verses.translation: Bring them back to me." then began he to pass his hand over (their) legs and their necks

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ فَتَنَّا سُلَيۡمَٰنَ وَأَلۡقَيۡنَا عَلَىٰ كُرۡسِيِّهِۦ جَسَدࣰ ا ثُمَّ أَنَابَ
verses.translation: And We did try Solomon: We placed on his throne a body (without life); but he did turn (to Us in true devotion)

verses.text: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱغۡفِرۡ لِي وَهَبۡ لِي مُلۡكࣰ ا لَّا يَنۢبَغِي لِأَحَدࣲ مِّنۢ بَعۡدِيٓۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلۡوَهَّابُ
verses.translation: He said, "O my Lord! Forgive me, and grant me a kingdom which, (it may be), suits not another after me: for Thou art the Grantor of Bounties (without measure)

verses.text: فَسَخَّرۡنَا لَهُ ٱلرِّيحَ تَجۡرِي بِأَمۡرِهِۦ رُخَآءً حَيۡثُ أَصَابَ
verses.translation: Then We subjected the wind to his power, to flow gently to his order, Whithersoever he willed

verses.text: وَٱلشَّيَٰطِينَ كُلَّ بَنَّآءࣲ وَغَوَّاصࣲ‏
verses.translation: As also the evil ones, (including) every kind of builder and diver

verses.text: وَءَاخَرِينَ مُقَرَّنِينَ فِي ٱلۡأَصۡفَادِ
verses.translation: As also others bound together in fetters

verses.text: هَٰذَا عَطَآؤُنَا فَٱمۡنُنۡ أَوۡ أَمۡسِكۡ بِغَيۡرِ حِسَابࣲ‏
verses.translation: Such are Our Bounties: whether thou bestow them (on others) or withhold them, no account will be asked

verses.text: وَإِنَّ لَهُۥ عِندَنَا لَزُلۡفَىٰ وَحُسۡنَ مَـَٔابࣲ‏
verses.translation: And he enjoyed, indeed, a Near Approach to Us, and a beautiful Place of (Final) Return

verses.text: وَٱذۡكُرۡ عَبۡدَنَآ أَيُّوبَ إِذۡ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّي مَسَّنِيَ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنُ بِنُصۡبࣲ وَعَذَابٍ
verses.translation: Commemorate Our Servant Job. Behold he cried to his Lord: "The Evil One has afflicted me with distress and suffering

verses.text: ٱرۡكُضۡ بِرِجۡلِكَۖ هَٰذَا مُغۡتَسَلُۢ بَارِدࣱ وَشَرَابࣱ‏
verses.translation: (The command was given:) "Strike with thy foot: here is (water) wherein to wash, cool and refreshing, and (water) to drink

verses.text: وَوَهَبۡنَا لَهُۥٓ أَهۡلَهُۥ وَمِثۡلَهُم مَّعَهُمۡ رَحۡمَةࣰ مِّنَّا وَذِكۡرَىٰ لِأُوْلِي ٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِ
verses.translation: And We gave him (back) his people, and doubled their number,- as a Grace from Ourselves, and a thing for commemoration, for all who have Understanding

verses.text: وَخُذۡ بِيَدِكَ ضِغۡثࣰ ا فَٱضۡرِب بِّهِۦ وَلَا تَحۡنَثۡۗ إِنَّا وَجَدۡنَٰهُ صَابِرࣰ اۚ نِّعۡمَ ٱلۡعَبۡدُ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابࣱ‏
verses.translation: And take in thy hand a little grass, and strike therewith: and break not (thy oath)." Truly We found him full of patience and constancy. How excellent in Our service! ever did he turn (to Us)

verses.text: وَٱذۡكُرۡ عِبَٰدَنَآ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسۡحَٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوبَ أُوْلِي ٱلۡأَيۡدِي وَٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرِ
verses.translation: And commemorate Our Servants Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob, possessors of Power and Vision

verses.text: إِنَّآ أَخۡلَصۡنَٰهُم بِخَالِصَةࣲ ذِكۡرَى ٱلدَّارِ
verses.translation: Verily We did choose them for a special (purpose)- proclaiming the Message of the Hereafter

verses.text: وَإِنَّهُمۡ عِندَنَا لَمِنَ ٱلۡمُصۡطَفَيۡنَ ٱلۡأَخۡيَارِ
verses.translation: They were, in Our sight, truly, of the company of the Elect and the Good

verses.text: وَٱذۡكُرۡ إِسۡمَٰعِيلَ وَٱلۡيَسَعَ وَذَا ٱلۡكِفۡلِۖ وَكُلࣱّ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَخۡيَارِ
verses.translation: And commemorate Isma'il, Elisha, and Zul-Kifl: Each of them was of the Company of the Good

verses.text: هَٰذَا ذِكۡرࣱۚ وَإِنَّ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ لَحُسۡنَ مَـَٔابࣲ‏
verses.translation: This is a Message (of admonition): and verily, for the righteous, is a beautiful Place of (Final) Return

verses.text: جَنَّٰتِ عَدۡنࣲ مُّفَتَّحَةࣰ لَّهُمُ ٱلۡأَبۡوَٰبُ
verses.translation: Gardens of Eternity, whose doors will (ever) be open to them

verses.text: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا يَدۡعُونَ فِيهَا بِفَٰكِهَةࣲ كَثِيرَةࣲ وَشَرَابࣲ‏
verses.translation: Therein will they recline (at ease): Therein can they call (at pleasure) for fruit in abundance, and (delicious) drink

verses.text: ۞وَعِندَهُمۡ قَٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرۡفِ أَتۡرَابٌ
verses.translation: And beside them will be chaste women restraining their glances, (companions) of equal age

verses.text: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِيَوۡمِ ٱلۡحِسَابِ
verses.translation: Such is the Promise made, to you for the Day of Account

verses.text: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَرِزۡقُنَا مَا لَهُۥ مِن نَّفَادٍ
verses.translation: Truly such will be Our Bounty (to you); it will never fail

verses.text: هَٰذَاۚ وَإِنَّ لِلطَّٰغِينَ لَشَرَّ مَـَٔابࣲ‏
verses.translation: Yea, such! but - for the wrong-doers will be an evil place of (Final) Return

verses.text: جَهَنَّمَ يَصۡلَوۡنَهَا فَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡمِهَادُ
verses.translation: Hell!- they will burn therein, - an evil bed (indeed, to lie on)

verses.text: هَٰذَا فَلۡيَذُوقُوهُ حَمِيمࣱ وَغَسَّاقࣱ‏
verses.translation: Yea, such! - then shall they taste it,- a boiling fluid, and a fluid dark, murky, intensely cold

verses.text: وَءَاخَرُ مِن شَكۡلِهِۦٓ أَزۡوَٰجٌ
verses.translation: And other Penalties of a similar kind, to match them

verses.text: هَٰذَا فَوۡجࣱ مُّقۡتَحِمࣱ مَّعَكُمۡ لَا مَرۡحَبَۢا بِهِمۡۚ إِنَّهُمۡ صَالُواْ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.translation: Here is a troop rushing headlong with you! No welcome for them! truly, they shall burn in the Fire

verses.text: قَالُواْ بَلۡ أَنتُمۡ لَا مَرۡحَبَۢا بِكُمۡۖ أَنتُمۡ قَدَّمۡتُمُوهُ لَنَاۖ فَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡقَرَارُ
verses.translation: (The followers shall cry to the misleaders:) "Nay, ye (too)! No welcome for you! It is ye who have brought this upon us! Now evil is (this) place to stay in

verses.text: قَالُواْ رَبَّنَا مَن قَدَّمَ لَنَا هَٰذَا فَزِدۡهُ عَذَابࣰ ا ضِعۡفࣰ ا فِي ٱلنَّارِ
verses.translation: They will say: "Our Lord! whoever brought this upon us,- Add to him a double Penalty in the Fire

verses.text: وَقَالُواْ مَا لَنَا لَا نَرَىٰ رِجَالࣰ ا كُنَّا نَعُدُّهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَشۡرَارِ
verses.translation: And they will say: "What has happened to us that we see not men whom we used to number among the bad ones

verses.text: أَتَّخَذۡنَٰهُمۡ سِخۡرِيًّا أَمۡ زَاغَتۡ عَنۡهُمُ ٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرُ
verses.translation: Did we treat them (as such) in ridicule, or have (our) eyes failed to perceive them

verses.text: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقࣱّ تَخَاصُمُ أَهۡلِ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.translation: Truly that is just and fitting,- the mutual recriminations of the People of the Fire

verses.text: قُلۡ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مُنذِرࣱۖ وَمَا مِنۡ إِلَٰهٍ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡوَٰحِدُ ٱلۡقَهَّارُ
verses.translation: Say: "Truly am I a Warner: no god is there but the one God, Supreme and Irresistible

verses.text: رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡغَفَّٰرُ
verses.translation: The Lord of the heavens and the earth, and all between,- Exalted in Might, able to enforce His Will, forgiving again and again

verses.text: قُلۡ هُوَ نَبَؤٌاْ عَظِيمٌ
verses.translation: Say: "That is a Message Supreme (above all)

verses.text: أَنتُمۡ عَنۡهُ مُعۡرِضُونَ
verses.translation: From which ye do turn away

verses.text: مَا كَانَ لِيَ مِنۡ عِلۡمِۭ بِٱلۡمَلَإِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰٓ إِذۡ يَخۡتَصِمُونَ
verses.translation: No knowledge have I of the Chiefs on high, when they discuss (matters) among themselves

verses.text: إِن يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَيَّ إِلَّآ أَنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرࣱ مُّبِينٌ
verses.translation: Only this has been revealed to me: that I am to give warning plainly and publicly

verses.text: إِذۡ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّي خَٰلِقُۢ بَشَرࣰ ا مِّن طِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: Behold, thy Lord said to the angels: "I am about to create man from clay

verses.text: فَإِذَا سَوَّيۡتُهُۥ وَنَفَخۡتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِي فَقَعُواْ لَهُۥ سَٰجِدِينَ
verses.translation: When I have fashioned him (in due proportion) and breathed into him of My spirit, fall ye down in obeisance unto him

verses.text: فَسَجَدَ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعُونَ
verses.translation: So the angels prostrated themselves, all of them together

verses.text: إِلَّآ إِبۡلِيسَ ٱسۡتَكۡبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.translation: Not so Iblis: he was haughty, and became one of those who reject Faith

verses.text: قَالَ يَٰٓإِبۡلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسۡجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقۡتُ بِيَدَيَّۖ أَسۡتَكۡبَرۡتَ أَمۡ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلۡعَالِينَ
verses.translation: (God) said: "O Iblis! What prevents thee from prostrating thyself to one whom I have created with my hands? Art thou haughty? Or art thou one of the high (and mighty) ones

verses.text: قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيۡرࣱ مِّنۡهُ خَلَقۡتَنِي مِن نَّارࣲ وَخَلَقۡتَهُۥ مِن طِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: (Iblis) said: "I am better than he: thou createdst me from fire, and him thou createdst from clay

verses.text: قَالَ فَٱخۡرُجۡ مِنۡهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: (God) said: "Then get thee out from here: for thou art rejected, accursed

verses.text: وَإِنَّ عَلَيۡكَ لَعۡنَتِيٓ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.translation: And My curse shall be on thee till the Day of Judgment

verses.text: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرۡنِيٓ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ يُبۡعَثُونَ
verses.translation: (Iblis) said: "O my Lord! Give me then respite till the Day the (dead) are raised

verses.text: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُنظَرِينَ
verses.translation: (God) said: "Respite then is granted thee

verses.text: إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلۡوَقۡتِ ٱلۡمَعۡلُومِ
verses.translation: Till the Day of the Time Appointed

verses.text: قَالَ فَبِعِزَّتِكَ لَأُغۡوِيَنَّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.translation: (Iblis) said: "Then, by Thy power, I will put them all in the wrong

verses.text: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنۡهُمُ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
verses.translation: Except Thy Servants amongst them, sincere and purified (by Thy Grace)

verses.text: قَالَ فَٱلۡحَقُّ وَٱلۡحَقَّ أَقُولُ
verses.translation: (God) said: "Then it is just and fitting- and I say what is just and fitting

verses.text: لَأَمۡلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنۡهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.translation: That I will certainly fill Hell with thee and those that follow thee,- every one

verses.text: قُلۡ مَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرࣲ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلۡمُتَكَلِّفِينَ
verses.translation: Say: "No reward do I ask of you for this (Qur'an), nor am I a pretender

verses.text: إِنۡ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكۡرࣱ لِّلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translation: This is no less than a Message to (all) the Worlds

verses.text: وَلَتَعۡلَمُنَّ نَبَأَهُۥ بَعۡدَ حِينِۭ
verses.translation: And ye shall certainly know the truth of it (all) after a while

verses.text: تَنزِيلُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلۡحَكِيمِ
verses.translation: The revelation of this Book is from God, the Exalted in Power, full of Wisdom

verses.text: إِنَّآ أَنزَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡكَ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ فَٱعۡبُدِ ٱللَّهَ مُخۡلِصࣰ ا لَّهُ ٱلدِّينَ
verses.translation: Verily it is We Who have revealed the Book to thee in Truth: so serve God, offering Him sincere devotion

verses.text: أَلَا لِلَّهِ ٱلدِّينُ ٱلۡخَالِصُۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّخَذُواْ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوۡلِيَآءَ مَا نَعۡبُدُهُمۡ إِلَّا لِيُقَرِّبُونَآ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ زُلۡفَىٰٓ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَحۡكُمُ بَيۡنَهُمۡ فِي مَا هُمۡ فِيهِ يَخۡتَلِفُونَۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهۡدِي مَنۡ هُوَ كَٰذِبࣱ كَفَّارࣱ‏
verses.translation: Is it not to God that sincere devotion is due? But those who take for protectors other than God (say): "We only serve them in order that they may bring us nearer to God." Truly God will judge between them in that wherein they differ. But God g uides not such as are false and ungrateful

verses.text: لَّوۡ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدࣰ ا لَّٱصۡطَفَىٰ مِمَّا يَخۡلُقُ مَا يَشَآءُۚ سُبۡحَٰنَهُۥۖ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡوَٰحِدُ ٱلۡقَهَّارُ
verses.translation: Had God wished to take to Himself a son, He could have chosen whom He pleased out of those whom He doth create: but Glory be to Him! (He is above such things.) He is God, the One, the Irresistible

verses.text: خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ بِٱلۡحَقِّۖ يُكَوِّرُ ٱلَّيۡلَ عَلَى ٱلنَّهَارِ وَيُكَوِّرُ ٱلنَّهَارَ عَلَى ٱلَّيۡلِۖ وَسَخَّرَ ٱلشَّمۡسَ وَٱلۡقَمَرَۖ كُلࣱّ يَجۡرِي لِأَجَلࣲ مُّسَمًّىۗ أَلَا هُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡغَفَّٰرُ
verses.translation: He created the heavens and the earth in true (proportions): He makes the Night overlap the Day, and the Day overlap the Night: He has subjected the sun and the moon (to His law): Each one follows a course for a time appointed. Is not He the Ex alted in Power - He Who forgives again and again

verses.text: خَلَقَكُم مِّن نَّفۡسࣲ وَٰحِدَةࣲ ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِنۡهَا زَوۡجَهَا وَأَنزَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَنۡعَٰمِ ثَمَٰنِيَةَ أَزۡوَٰجࣲۚ يَخۡلُقُكُمۡ فِي بُطُونِ أُمَّهَٰتِكُمۡ خَلۡقࣰ ا مِّنۢ بَعۡدِ خَلۡقࣲ فِي ظُلُمَٰتࣲ ثَلَٰثࣲۚ ذَٰلِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّكُمۡ لَهُ ٱلۡمُلۡكُۖ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَۖ فَأَنَّىٰ تُصۡرَفُونَ
verses.translation: He created you (all) from a single person: then created, of like nature, his mate; and he sent down for you eight head of cattle in pairs: He makes you, in the wombs of your mothers, in stages, one after another, in three veils of darkness. suc h is God, your Lord and Cherisher: to Him belongs (all) dominion. There is no god but He: then how are ye turned away (from your true Centre)

verses.text: إِن تَكۡفُرُواْ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَنِيٌّ عَنكُمۡۖ وَلَا يَرۡضَىٰ لِعِبَادِهِ ٱلۡكُفۡرَۖ وَإِن تَشۡكُرُواْ يَرۡضَهُ لَكُمۡۗ وَلَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةࣱ وِزۡرَ أُخۡرَىٰۚ ثُمَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكُم مَّرۡجِعُكُمۡ فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَۚ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمُۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.translation: If ye reject (God), Truly God hath no need of you; but He liketh not ingratitude from His servants: if ye are grateful, He is pleased with you. No bearer of burdens can bear the burden of another.
