verses.translation: That He may admit the men and women who believe, to Gardens beneath which rivers flow, to dwell therein for aye, and remove their ills from them;- and that is, in the sight of God, the highest achievement (for man)

verses.text: وَيُعَذِّبَ ٱلۡمُنَٰفِقِينَ وَٱلۡمُنَٰفِقَٰتِ وَٱلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ وَٱلۡمُشۡرِكَٰتِ ٱلظَّآنِّينَ بِٱللَّهِ ظَنَّ ٱلسَّوۡءِۚ عَلَيۡهِمۡ دَآئِرَةُ ٱلسَّوۡءِۖ وَغَضِبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَلَعَنَهُمۡ وَأَعَدَّ لَهُمۡ جَهَنَّمَۖ وَسَآءَتۡ مَصِيرࣰ ا
verses.translation: And that He may punish the Hypocrites, men and women, and the Polytheists men and women, who imagine an evil opinion of God. On them is a round of Evil: the Wrath of God is on them: He has cursed them and got Hell ready for them: and evil is i t for a destination

verses.text: وَلِلَّهِ جُنُودُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَزِيزًا حَكِيمًا
verses.translation: For to God belong the Forces of the heavens and the earth; and God is Exalted in Power, Full of Wisdom

verses.text: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَٰكَ شَٰهِدࣰ ا وَمُبَشِّرࣰ ا وَنَذِيرࣰ ا
verses.translation: We have truly sent thee as a witness, as a bringer of Glad Tidings, and as a Warner

verses.text: لِّتُؤۡمِنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَتُعَزِّرُوهُ وَتُوَقِّرُوهُۚ وَتُسَبِّحُوهُ بُكۡرَةࣰ وَأَصِيلًا
verses.translation: In order that ye (O men) may believe in God and His Apostle, that ye may assist and honour Him, and celebrate His praise morning and evening

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُبَايِعُونَكَ إِنَّمَا يُبَايِعُونَ ٱللَّهَ يَدُ ٱللَّهِ فَوۡقَ أَيۡدِيهِمۡۚ فَمَن نَّكَثَ فَإِنَّمَا يَنكُثُ عَلَىٰ نَفۡسِهِۦۖ وَمَنۡ أَوۡفَىٰ بِمَا عَٰهَدَ عَلَيۡهُ ٱللَّهَ فَسَيُؤۡتِيهِ أَجۡرًا عَظِيمࣰ ا
verses.translation: Verily those who plight their fealty to thee do no less than plight their fealty to God: the Hand of God is over their hands: then any one who violates his oath, does so to the harm of his own soul, and any one who fulfils what he has covenante d with God,- God will soon grant him a great Reward

verses.text: سَيَقُولُ لَكَ ٱلۡمُخَلَّفُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡأَعۡرَابِ شَغَلَتۡنَآ أَمۡوَٰلُنَا وَأَهۡلُونَا فَٱسۡتَغۡفِرۡ لَنَاۚ يَقُولُونَ بِأَلۡسِنَتِهِم مَّا لَيۡسَ فِي قُلُوبِهِمۡۚ قُلۡ فَمَن يَمۡلِكُ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيۡـًٔا إِنۡ أَرَادَ بِكُمۡ ضَرًّا أَوۡ أَرَادَ بِكُمۡ نَفۡعَۢاۚ بَلۡ كَانَ ٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرَۢا
verses.translation: The desert Arabs who lagged behind will say to thee: "We were engaged in (looking after) our flocks and herds, and our families: do thou then ask forgiveness for us." They say with their tongues what is not in their hearts. Say: "Who then has any power at all (to intervene) on your behalf with God, if His Will is to give you some loss or to give you some profit? But God is well acquainted with all that ye do

verses.text: بَلۡ ظَنَنتُمۡ أَن لَّن يَنقَلِبَ ٱلرَّسُولُ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِيهِمۡ أَبَدࣰ ا وَزُيِّنَ ذَٰلِكَ فِي قُلُوبِكُمۡ وَظَنَنتُمۡ ظَنَّ ٱلسَّوۡءِ وَكُنتُمۡ قَوۡمَۢا بُورࣰ ا
verses.translation: Nay, ye thought that the Apostle and the Believers would never return to their families; this seemed pleasing in your hearts, and ye conceived an evil thought, for ye are a people lost (in wickedness)

verses.text: وَمَن لَّمۡ يُؤۡمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ فَإِنَّآ أَعۡتَدۡنَا لِلۡكَٰفِرِينَ سَعِيرࣰ ا
verses.translation: And if any believe not in God and His Apostle, We have prepared, for those who reject God, a Blazing Fire

verses.text: وَلِلَّهِ مُلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ يَغۡفِرُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيُعَذِّبُ مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ غَفُورࣰ ا رَّحِيمࣰ ا
verses.translation: To God belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth: He forgives whom He wills, and He punishes whom He wills: but God is Oft-Forgiving, Most Merciful

verses.text: سَيَقُولُ ٱلۡمُخَلَّفُونَ إِذَا ٱنطَلَقۡتُمۡ إِلَىٰ مَغَانِمَ لِتَأۡخُذُوهَا ذَرُونَا نَتَّبِعۡكُمۡۖ يُرِيدُونَ أَن يُبَدِّلُواْ كَلَٰمَ ٱللَّهِۚ قُل لَّن تَتَّبِعُونَا كَذَٰلِكُمۡ قَالَ ٱللَّهُ مِن قَبۡلُۖ فَسَيَقُولُونَ بَلۡ تَحۡسُدُونَنَاۚ بَلۡ كَانُواْ لَا يَفۡقَهُونَ إِلَّا قَلِيلࣰ ا
verses.translation: Those who lagged behind (will say), when ye (are free to) march and take booty (in war): "Permit us to follow you." They wish to change God's decree: Say: "Not thus will ye follow us: God has already declared (this) beforehand": then they will say, "But ye are jealous of us." Nay, but little do they understand (such things)

verses.text: قُل لِّلۡمُخَلَّفِينَ مِنَ ٱلۡأَعۡرَابِ سَتُدۡعَوۡنَ إِلَىٰ قَوۡمٍ أُوْلِي بَأۡسࣲ شَدِيدࣲ تُقَٰتِلُونَهُمۡ أَوۡ يُسۡلِمُونَۖ فَإِن تُطِيعُواْ يُؤۡتِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ أَجۡرًا حَسَنࣰ اۖ وَإِن تَتَوَلَّوۡاْ كَمَا تَوَلَّيۡتُم مِّن قَبۡلُ يُعَذِّبۡكُمۡ عَذَابًا أَلِيمࣰ ا
verses.translation: Say to the desert Arabs who lagged behind: "Ye shall be summoned (to fight) against a people given to vehement war: then shall ye fight, or they shall submit. Then if ye show obedience, God will grant you a goodly reward, but if ye turn back a s ye did before, He will punish you with a grievous Penalty

verses.text: لَّيۡسَ عَلَى ٱلۡأَعۡمَىٰ حَرَجࣱ وَلَا عَلَى ٱلۡأَعۡرَجِ حَرَجࣱ وَلَا عَلَى ٱلۡمَرِيضِ حَرَجࣱۗ وَمَن يُطِعِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ يُدۡخِلۡهُ جَنَّٰتࣲ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُۖ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ يُعَذِّبۡهُ عَذَابًا أَلِيمࣰ ا
verses.translation: No blame is there on the blind, nor is there blame on the lame, nor on one ill (if he joins not the war): But he that obeys God and his Apostle,- (God) will admit him to Gardens beneath which rivers flow; and he who turns back, (God) will punis h him with a grievous Penalty

verses.text: ۞لَّقَدۡ رَضِيَ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ إِذۡ يُبَايِعُونَكَ تَحۡتَ ٱلشَّجَرَةِ فَعَلِمَ مَا فِي قُلُوبِهِمۡ فَأَنزَلَ ٱلسَّكِينَةَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَأَثَٰبَهُمۡ فَتۡحࣰ ا قَرِيبࣰ ا
verses.translation: God's Good Pleasure was on the Believers when they swore Fealty to thee under the Tree: He knew what was in their hearts, and He sent down Tranquillity to them; and He rewarded them with a speedy Victory

verses.text: وَمَغَانِمَ كَثِيرَةࣰ يَأۡخُذُونَهَاۗ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَزِيزًا حَكِيمࣰ ا
verses.translation: And many gains will they acquire (besides): and God is Exalted in Power, Full of Wisdom

verses.text: وَعَدَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَغَانِمَ كَثِيرَةࣰ تَأۡخُذُونَهَا فَعَجَّلَ لَكُمۡ هَٰذِهِۦ وَكَفَّ أَيۡدِيَ ٱلنَّاسِ عَنكُمۡ وَلِتَكُونَ ءَايَةࣰ لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَيَهۡدِيَكُمۡ صِرَٰطࣰ ا مُّسۡتَقِيمࣰ ا
verses.translation: God has promised you many gains that ye shall acquire, and He has given you these beforehand; and He has restrained the hands of men from you; that it may be a Sign for the Believers, and that He may guide you to a Straight Path

verses.text: وَأُخۡرَىٰ لَمۡ تَقۡدِرُواْ عَلَيۡهَا قَدۡ أَحَاطَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَاۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءࣲ قَدِيرࣰ ا
verses.translation: And other gains (there are), which are not within your power, but which God has compassed: and God has power over all things

verses.text: وَلَوۡ قَٰتَلَكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لَوَلَّوُاْ ٱلۡأَدۡبَٰرَ ثُمَّ لَا يَجِدُونَ وَلِيࣰّ ا وَلَا نَصِيرࣰ ا
verses.translation: If the Unbelievers should fight you, they would certainly turn their backs; then would they find neither protector nor helper

verses.text: سُنَّةَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّتِي قَدۡ خَلَتۡ مِن قَبۡلُۖ وَلَن تَجِدَ لِسُنَّةِ ٱللَّهِ تَبۡدِيلࣰ ا
verses.translation: (Such has been) the practice (approved) of God already in the past: no change wilt thou find in the practice (approved) of God

verses.text: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي كَفَّ أَيۡدِيَهُمۡ عَنكُمۡ وَأَيۡدِيَكُمۡ عَنۡهُم بِبَطۡنِ مَكَّةَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ أَنۡ أَظۡفَرَكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ بَصِيرًا
verses.translation: And it is He Who has restrained their hands from you and your hands from them in the midst of Makka, after that He gave you the victory over them. And God sees well all that ye do

verses.text: هُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَصَدُّوكُمۡ عَنِ ٱلۡمَسۡجِدِ ٱلۡحَرَامِ وَٱلۡهَدۡيَ مَعۡكُوفًا أَن يَبۡلُغَ مَحِلَّهُۥۚ وَلَوۡلَا رِجَالࣱ مُّؤۡمِنُونَ وَنِسَآءࣱ مُّؤۡمِنَٰتࣱ لَّمۡ تَعۡلَمُوهُمۡ أَن تَطَـُٔوهُمۡ فَتُصِيبَكُم مِّنۡهُم مَّعَرَّةُۢ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمࣲۖ لِّيُدۡخِلَ ٱللَّهُ فِي رَحۡمَتِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُۚ لَوۡ تَزَيَّلُواْ لَعَذَّبۡنَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِنۡهُمۡ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
verses.translation: They are the ones who denied Revelation and hindered you from the Sacred Mosque and the sacrificial animals, detained from reaching their place of sacrifice. Had there not been believing men and believing women whom ye did not know that ye wer e trampling down and on whose account a crime would have accrued to you without (your) knowledge, (God would have allowed you to force your way, but He held back your hands) that He may admit to His Mercy whom He will. If they had been apart, We should certainly have punished the Unbelievers among them with a grievous Punishment

verses.text: إِذۡ جَعَلَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ فِي قُلُوبِهِمُ ٱلۡحَمِيَّةَ حَمِيَّةَ ٱلۡجَٰهِلِيَّةِ فَأَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ سَكِينَتَهُۥ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِهِۦ وَعَلَى ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَأَلۡزَمَهُمۡ كَلِمَةَ ٱلتَّقۡوَىٰ وَكَانُوٓاْ أَحَقَّ بِهَا وَأَهۡلَهَاۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيمࣰ ا
verses.translation: While the Unbelievers got up in their hearts heat and cant - the heat and cant of ignorance,- God sent down His Tranquillity to his Apostle and to the Believers, and made them stick close to the command of self-restraint; and well were they en titled to it and worthy of it. And God has full knowledge of all things

verses.text: لَّقَدۡ صَدَقَ ٱللَّهُ رَسُولَهُ ٱلرُّءۡيَا بِٱلۡحَقِّۖ لَتَدۡخُلُنَّ ٱلۡمَسۡجِدَ ٱلۡحَرَامَ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ءَامِنِينَ مُحَلِّقِينَ رُءُوسَكُمۡ وَمُقَصِّرِينَ لَا تَخَافُونَۖ فَعَلِمَ مَا لَمۡ تَعۡلَمُواْ فَجَعَلَ مِن دُونِ ذَٰلِكَ فَتۡحࣰ ا قَرِيبًا
verses.translation: Truly did God fulfil the vision for His Apostle: ye shall enter the Sacred Mosque, if God wills, with minds secure, heads shaved, hair cut short, and without fear. For He knew what ye knew not, and He granted, besides this, a speedy victory

verses.text: هُوَ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَرۡسَلَ رَسُولَهُۥ بِٱلۡهُدَىٰ وَدِينِ ٱلۡحَقِّ لِيُظۡهِرَهُۥ عَلَى ٱلدِّينِ كُلِّهِۦۚ وَكَفَىٰ بِٱللَّهِ شَهِيدࣰ ا
verses.translation: It is He Who has sent His Apostle with Guidance and the Religion of Truth, to proclaim it over all religion: and enough is God for a Witness

verses.text: مُّحَمَّدࣱ رَّسُولُ ٱللَّهِۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥٓ أَشِدَّآءُ عَلَى ٱلۡكُفَّارِ رُحَمَآءُ بَيۡنَهُمۡۖ تَرَىٰهُمۡ رُكَّعࣰ ا سُجَّدࣰ ا يَبۡتَغُونَ فَضۡلࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضۡوَٰنࣰ اۖ سِيمَاهُمۡ فِي وُجُوهِهِم مِّنۡ أَثَرِ ٱلسُّجُودِۚ ذَٰلِكَ مَثَلُهُمۡ فِي ٱلتَّوۡرَىٰةِۚ وَمَثَلُهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡإِنجِيلِ كَزَرۡعٍ أَخۡرَجَ شَطۡـَٔهُۥ فَـَٔازَرَهُۥ فَٱسۡتَغۡلَظَ فَٱسۡتَوَىٰ عَلَىٰ سُوقِهِۦ يُعۡجِبُ ٱلزُّرَّاعَ لِيَغِيظَ بِهِمُ ٱلۡكُفَّارَۗ وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ مِنۡهُم مَّغۡفِرَةࣰ وَأَجۡرًا عَظِيمَۢا
verses.translation: Muhammad is the apostle of God; and those who are with him are strong against Unbelievers, (but) compassionate amongst each other. Thou wilt see them bow and prostrate themselves (in prayer), seeking Grace from God and (His) Good Pleasure. On their faces are their marks, (being) the traces of their prostration. This is their similitude in the Taurat; and their similitude in the Gospel is: like a seed which sends forth its blade, then makes it strong; it then becomes thick, and it stands on its own stem, (filling) the sowers with wonder and delight. As a result, it fills the Unbelievers with rage at them. God has promised those among them who believe and do righteous deeds forgiveness, and a great Reward

verses.text: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَا تُقَدِّمُواْ بَيۡنَ يَدَيِ ٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦۖ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: O Ye who believe! Put not yourselves forward before God and His Apostle; but fear God: for God is He Who hears and knows all things

verses.text: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَا تَرۡفَعُوٓاْ أَصۡوَٰتَكُمۡ فَوۡقَ صَوۡتِ ٱلنَّبِيِّ وَلَا تَجۡهَرُواْ لَهُۥ بِٱلۡقَوۡلِ كَجَهۡرِ بَعۡضِكُمۡ لِبَعۡضٍ أَن تَحۡبَطَ أَعۡمَٰلُكُمۡ وَأَنتُمۡ لَا تَشۡعُرُونَ
verses.translation: O ye who believe! Raise not your voices above the voice of the Prophet, nor speak aloud to him in talk, as ye may speak aloud to one another, lest your deeds become vain and ye perceive not

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَغُضُّونَ أَصۡوَٰتَهُمۡ عِندَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱمۡتَحَنَ ٱللَّهُ قُلُوبَهُمۡ لِلتَّقۡوَىٰۚ لَهُم مَّغۡفِرَةࣱ وَأَجۡرٌ عَظِيمٌ
verses.translation: Those that lower their voices in the presence of God's Apostle,- their hearts has God tested for piety: for them is Forgiveness and a great Reward

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُنَادُونَكَ مِن وَرَآءِ ٱلۡحُجُرَٰتِ أَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
verses.translation: Those who shout out to thee from without the inner apartments - most of them lack understanding

verses.text: وَلَوۡ أَنَّهُمۡ صَبَرُواْ حَتَّىٰ تَخۡرُجَ إِلَيۡهِمۡ لَكَانَ خَيۡرࣰ ا لَّهُمۡۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورࣱ رَّحِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: If only they had patience until thou couldst come out to them, it would be best for them: but God is Oft-Forgiving, Most Merciful

verses.text: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ إِن جَآءَكُمۡ فَاسِقُۢ بِنَبَإࣲ فَتَبَيَّنُوٓاْ أَن تُصِيبُواْ قَوۡمَۢا بِجَهَٰلَةࣲ فَتُصۡبِحُواْ عَلَىٰ مَا فَعَلۡتُمۡ نَٰدِمِينَ
verses.translation: O ye who believe! If a wicked person comes to you with any news, ascertain the truth, lest ye harm people unwittingly, and afterwards become full of repentance for what ye have done

verses.text: وَٱعۡلَمُوٓاْ أَنَّ فِيكُمۡ رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِۚ لَوۡ يُطِيعُكُمۡ فِي كَثِيرࣲ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَمۡرِ لَعَنِتُّمۡ وَلَٰكِنَّ ٱللَّهَ حَبَّبَ إِلَيۡكُمُ ٱلۡإِيمَٰنَ وَزَيَّنَهُۥ فِي قُلُوبِكُمۡ وَكَرَّهَ إِلَيۡكُمُ ٱلۡكُفۡرَ وَٱلۡفُسُوقَ وَٱلۡعِصۡيَانَۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلرَّٰشِدُونَ
verses.translation: And know that among you is God's Apostle: were he, in many matters, to follow your (wishes), ye would certainly fall into misfortune: But God has endeared the Faith to you, and has made it beautiful in your hearts, and He has made hateful to y ou Unbelief, wickedness, and rebellion: such indeed are those who walk in righteousness

verses.text: فَضۡلࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَنِعۡمَةࣰۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: A Grace and Favour from God; and God is full of Knowledge and Wisdom

verses.text: وَإِن طَآئِفَتَانِ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ ٱقۡتَتَلُواْ فَأَصۡلِحُواْ بَيۡنَهُمَاۖ فَإِنۢ بَغَتۡ إِحۡدَىٰهُمَا عَلَى ٱلۡأُخۡرَىٰ فَقَٰتِلُواْ ٱلَّتِي تَبۡغِي حَتَّىٰ تَفِيٓءَ إِلَىٰٓ أَمۡرِ ٱللَّهِۚ فَإِن فَآءَتۡ فَأَصۡلِحُواْ بَيۡنَهُمَا بِٱلۡعَدۡلِ وَأَقۡسِطُوٓاْۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلۡمُقۡسِطِينَ
verses.translation: If two parties among the Believers fall into a quarrel, make ye peace between them: but if one of them transgresses beyond bounds against the other, then fight ye (all) against the one that transgresses until it complies with the command of Allah; But if it complies, then make peace between them with justice, and be fair: For Allah loves those who are fair (and just)

verses.text: إِنَّمَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ إِخۡوَةࣱ فَأَصۡلِحُواْ بَيۡنَ أَخَوَيۡكُمۡۚ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُرۡحَمُونَ
verses.translation: The Believers are but a single Brotherhood: So make peace and reconciliation between your two (contending) brothers; and fear God, that ye may receive Mercy

verses.text: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَا يَسۡخَرۡ قَوۡمࣱ مِّن قَوۡمٍ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونُواْ خَيۡرࣰ ا مِّنۡهُمۡ وَلَا نِسَآءࣱ مِّن نِّسَآءٍ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُنَّ خَيۡرࣰ ا مِّنۡهُنَّۖ وَلَا تَلۡمِزُوٓاْ أَنفُسَكُمۡ وَلَا تَنَابَزُواْ بِٱلۡأَلۡقَٰبِۖ بِئۡسَ ٱلِٱسۡمُ ٱلۡفُسُوقُ بَعۡدَ ٱلۡإِيمَٰنِۚ وَمَن لَّمۡ يَتُبۡ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلظَّٰلِمُونَ
verses.translation: O ye who believe! Let not some men among you laugh at others: It may be that the (latter) are better than the (former): Nor let some women laugh at others: It may be that the (latter are better than the (former): Nor defame nor be sarcastic to each other, nor call each other by (offensive) nicknames: Ill-seeming is a name connoting wickedness, (to be used of one) after he has believed: And those who do not desist are (indeed) doing wrong

verses.text: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ ٱجۡتَنِبُواْ كَثِيرࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱلظَّنِّ إِنَّ بَعۡضَ ٱلظَّنِّ إِثۡمࣱۖ وَلَا تَجَسَّسُواْ وَلَا يَغۡتَب بَّعۡضُكُم بَعۡضًاۚ أَيُحِبُّ أَحَدُكُمۡ أَن يَأۡكُلَ لَحۡمَ أَخِيهِ مَيۡتࣰ ا فَكَرِهۡتُمُوهُۚ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ تَوَّابࣱ رَّحِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: O ye who believe! Avoid suspicion as much (as possible): for suspicion in some cases is a sin: And spy not on each other behind their backs. Would any of you like to eat the flesh of his dead brother? Nay, ye would abhor it...But fear God: For God is Oft-Returning, Most Merciful

verses.text: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ إِنَّا خَلَقۡنَٰكُم مِّن ذَكَرࣲ وَأُنثَىٰ وَجَعَلۡنَٰكُمۡ شُعُوبࣰ ا وَقَبَآئِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوٓاْۚ إِنَّ أَكۡرَمَكُمۡ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ أَتۡقَىٰكُمۡۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرࣱ‏
verses.translation: O mankind! We created you from a single (pair) of a male and a female, and made you into nations and tribes, that ye may know each other (not that ye may despise (each other). Verily the most honoured of you in the sight of God is (he who is) the most righteous of you. And God has full knowledge and is well acquainted (with all things)

verses.text: ۞قَالَتِ ٱلۡأَعۡرَابُ ءَامَنَّاۖ قُل لَّمۡ تُؤۡمِنُواْ وَلَٰكِن قُولُوٓاْ أَسۡلَمۡنَا وَلَمَّا يَدۡخُلِ ٱلۡإِيمَٰنُ فِي قُلُوبِكُمۡۖ وَإِن تُطِيعُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ لَا يَلِتۡكُم مِّنۡ أَعۡمَٰلِكُمۡ شَيۡـًٔاۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورࣱ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.translation: The desert Arabs say, "We believe." Say, "Ye have no faith; but ye (only)say, 'We have submitted our wills to God,' For not yet has Faith entered your hearts. But if ye obey God and His Apostle, He will not belittle aught of your deeds: for Go d is Oft-Forgiving, Most Merciful

verses.text: إِنَّمَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ ثُمَّ لَمۡ يَرۡتَابُواْ وَجَٰهَدُواْ بِأَمۡوَٰلِهِمۡ وَأَنفُسِهِمۡ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصَّٰدِقُونَ
verses.translation: Only those are Believers who have believed in God and His Apostle, and have never since doubted, but have striven with their belongings and their persons in the Cause of God: Such are the sincere ones, Were We then weary with the first Creatio n, that they should be in confused doubt about a new Creation

verses.text: قُلۡ أَتُعَلِّمُونَ ٱللَّهَ بِدِينِكُمۡ وَٱللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: Say: "What! Will ye instruct God about your religion? But God knows all that is in the heavens and on earth: He has full knowledge of all things

verses.text: يَمُنُّونَ عَلَيۡكَ أَنۡ أَسۡلَمُواْۖ قُل لَّا تَمُنُّواْ عَلَيَّ إِسۡلَٰمَكُمۖ بَلِ ٱللَّهُ يَمُنُّ عَلَيۡكُمۡ أَنۡ هَدَىٰكُمۡ لِلۡإِيمَٰنِ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.translation: They impress on thee as a favour that they have embraced Islam. Say, "Count not your Islam as a favour upon me: Nay, God has conferred a favour upon you that He has guided you to the faith, if ye be true and sincere

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعۡلَمُ غَيۡبَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَٱللَّهُ بَصِيرُۢ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.translation: Verily God knows the secrets of the heavens and the earth: and God Sees well all that ye do

verses.text: قٓۚ وَٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ ٱلۡمَجِيدِ
verses.translation: Qaf: By the Glorious Qur'an (Thou art God's Apostle)

verses.text: بَلۡ عَجِبُوٓاْ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرࣱ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَقَالَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا شَيۡءٌ عَجِيبٌ
verses.translation: But they wonder that there has come to them a Warner from among themselves. So the Unbelievers say: "This is a wonderful thing

verses.text: أَءِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابࣰ اۖ ذَٰلِكَ رَجۡعُۢ بَعِيدࣱ‏
verses.translation: What! When we die and become dust, (shall we live again?) That is a (sort of) return far (from our understanding)

verses.text: قَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا مَا تَنقُصُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ مِنۡهُمۡۖ وَعِندَنَا كِتَٰبٌ حَفِيظُۢ
verses.translation: We already know how much of them the earth takes away: With Us is a record guarding (the full account)

verses.text: بَلۡ كَذَّبُواْ بِٱلۡحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡ فَهُمۡ فِيٓ أَمۡرࣲ مَّرِيجٍ
verses.translation: But they deny the Truth when it comes to them: so they are in a confused state

verses.text: أَفَلَمۡ يَنظُرُوٓاْ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَوۡقَهُمۡ كَيۡفَ بَنَيۡنَٰهَا وَزَيَّنَّٰهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِن فُرُوجࣲ‏
verses.translation: Do they not look at the sky above them?- How We have made it and adorned it, and there are no flaws in it

verses.text: وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ مَدَدۡنَٰهَا وَأَلۡقَيۡنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِيَ وَأَنۢبَتۡنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجِۭ بَهِيجࣲ‏
verses.translation: And the earth- We have spread it out, and set thereon mountains standing firm, and produced therein every kind of beautiful growth (in pairs)

verses.text: تَبۡصِرَةࣰ وَذِكۡرَىٰ لِكُلِّ عَبۡدࣲ مُّنِيبࣲ‏
verses.translation: To be observed and commemorated by every devotee turning (to God)

verses.text: وَنَزَّلۡنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءࣰ مُّبَٰرَكࣰ ا فَأَنۢبَتۡنَا بِهِۦ جَنَّٰتࣲ وَحَبَّ ٱلۡحَصِيدِ
verses.translation: And We send down from the sky rain charted with blessing, and We produce therewith gardens and Grain for harvests

verses.text: وَٱلنَّخۡلَ بَاسِقَٰتࣲ لَّهَا طَلۡعࣱ نَّضِيدࣱ‏
verses.translation: And tall (and stately) palm-trees, with shoots of fruit-stalks, piled one over another

verses.text: رِّزۡقࣰ ا لِّلۡعِبَادِۖ وَأَحۡيَيۡنَا بِهِۦ بَلۡدَةࣰ مَّيۡتࣰ اۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡخُرُوجُ
verses.translation: As sustenance for (God's) Servants;- and We give (new) life therewith to land that is dead: Thus will be the Resurrection

verses.text: كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوحࣲ وَأَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلرَّسِّ وَثَمُودُ
verses.translation: Before them was denied (the Hereafter) by the People of Noah, the Companions of the Rass, the Thamud

verses.text: وَعَادࣱ وَفِرۡعَوۡنُ وَإِخۡوَٰنُ لُوطࣲ‏
verses.translation: The 'Ad, Pharaoh, the brethren of Lut

verses.text: وَأَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡأَيۡكَةِ وَقَوۡمُ تُبَّعࣲۚ كُلࣱّ كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ وَعِيدِ
verses.translation: The Companions of the Wood, and the People of Tubba'; each one (of them) rejected the apostles, and My warning was duly fulfilled (in them)

verses.text: أَفَعَيِينَا بِٱلۡخَلۡقِ ٱلۡأَوَّلِۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِي لَبۡسࣲ مِّنۡ خَلۡقࣲ جَدِيدࣲ‏
verses.translation: Were We then weary with the first Creation, that they should be in confused doubt about a new Creation

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ وَنَعۡلَمُ مَا تُوَسۡوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفۡسُهُۥۖ وَنَحۡنُ أَقۡرَبُ إِلَيۡهِ مِنۡ حَبۡلِ ٱلۡوَرِيدِ
verses.translation: It was We Who created man, and We know what dark suggestions his soul makes to him: for We are nearer to him than (his) jugular vein

verses.text: إِذۡ يَتَلَقَّى ٱلۡمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ ٱلۡيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ قَعِيدࣱ‏
verses.translation: Behold, two (guardian angels) appointed to learn (his doings) learn (and noted them), one sitting on the right and one on the left

verses.text: مَّا يَلۡفِظُ مِن قَوۡلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيۡهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدࣱ‏
verses.translation: Not a word does he utter but there is a sentinel by him, ready (to note it)

verses.text: وَجَآءَتۡ سَكۡرَةُ ٱلۡمَوۡتِ بِٱلۡحَقِّۖ ذَٰلِكَ مَا كُنتَ مِنۡهُ تَحِيدُ
verses.translation: And the stupor of death will bring Truth (before his eyes): "This was the thing which thou wast trying to escape

verses.text: وَنُفِخَ فِي ٱلصُّورِۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡوَعِيدِ
verses.translation: And the Trumpet shall be blown: that will be the Day whereof Warning (had been given)

verses.text: وَجَآءَتۡ كُلُّ نَفۡسࣲ مَّعَهَا سَآئِقࣱ وَشَهِيدࣱ‏
verses.translation: And there will come forth every soul: with each will be an (angel) to drive, and an (angel) to bear witness

verses.text: لَّقَدۡ كُنتَ فِي غَفۡلَةࣲ مِّنۡ هَٰذَا فَكَشَفۡنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ حَدِيدࣱ‏
verses.translation: (It will be said:) "Thou wast heedless of this; now have We removed thy veil, and sharp is thy sight this Day

verses.text: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ هَٰذَا مَا لَدَيَّ عَتِيدٌ
verses.translation: And his Companion will say: "Here is (his Record) ready with me

verses.text: أَلۡقِيَا فِي جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيدࣲ‏
verses.translation: (The sentence will be:) "Throw, throw into Hell every contumacious Rejecter (of God)

verses.text: مَّنَّاعࣲ لِّلۡخَيۡرِ مُعۡتَدࣲ مُّرِيبٍ
verses.translation: Who forbade what was good, transgressed all bounds, cast doubts and suspicions

verses.text: ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَأَلۡقِيَاهُ فِي ٱلۡعَذَابِ ٱلشَّدِيدِ
verses.translation: Who set up another god beside God: Throw him into a severe penalty

verses.text: ۞قَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ رَبَّنَا مَآ أَطۡغَيۡتُهُۥ وَلَٰكِن كَانَ فِي ضَلَٰلِۭ بَعِيدࣲ‏
verses.translation: His Companion will say: "Our Lord! I did not make him transgress, but he was (himself) far astray

verses.text: قَالَ لَا تَخۡتَصِمُواْ لَدَيَّ وَقَدۡ قَدَّمۡتُ إِلَيۡكُم بِٱلۡوَعِيدِ
verses.translation: He will say: "Dispute not with each other in My Presence: I had already in advance sent you Warning

verses.text: مَا يُبَدَّلُ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ لَدَيَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِظَلَّٰمࣲ لِّلۡعَبِيدِ
verses.translation: The Word changes not before Me, and I do not the least injustice to My Servants

verses.text: يَوۡمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمۡتَلَأۡتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلۡ مِن مَّزِيدࣲ‏
verses.translation: One Day We will ask Hell, "Art thou filled to the full?" It will say, "Are there any more (to come)

verses.text: وَأُزۡلِفَتِ ٱلۡجَنَّةُ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ غَيۡرَ بَعِيدٍ
verses.translation: And the Garden will be brought nigh to the Righteous,- no more a thing distant

verses.text: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظࣲ‏
verses.translation: (A voice will say:) "This is what was promised for you,- for every one who turned (to God) in sincere repentance, who kept (His Law)

verses.text: مَّنۡ خَشِيَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنَ بِٱلۡغَيۡبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلۡبࣲ مُّنِيبٍ
verses.translation: Who feared (God) Most Gracious Unseen, and brought a heart turned in devotion (to Him)

verses.text: ٱدۡخُلُوهَا بِسَلَٰمࣲۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡخُلُودِ
verses.translation: Enter ye therein in Peace and Security; this is a Day of Eternal Life

verses.text: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيۡنَا مَزِيدࣱ‏
verses.translation: There will be for them therein all that they wish,- and more besides in Our Presence

verses.text: وَكَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُم مِّن قَرۡنٍ هُمۡ أَشَدُّ مِنۡهُم بَطۡشࣰ ا فَنَقَّبُواْ فِي ٱلۡبِلَٰدِ هَلۡ مِن مَّحِيصٍ
verses.translation: But how many generations before them did We destroy (for their sins),- stronger in power than they? Then did they wander through the land: was there any place of escape (for them)

verses.text: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكۡرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلۡبٌ أَوۡ أَلۡقَى ٱلسَّمۡعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدࣱ‏
verses.translation: Verily in this is a Message for any that has a heart and understanding or who gives ear and earnestly witnesses (the truth)

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا فِي سِتَّةِ أَيَّامࣲ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبࣲ‏
verses.translation: We created the heavens and the earth and all between them in Six Days, nor did any sense of weariness touch Us

verses.text: فَٱصۡبِرۡ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ قَبۡلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمۡسِ وَقَبۡلَ ٱلۡغُرُوبِ
verses.translation: Bear, then, with patience, all that they say, and celebrate the praises of thy Lord, before the rising of the sun and before (its) setting

verses.text: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَسَبِّحۡهُ وَأَدۡبَٰرَ ٱلسُّجُودِ
verses.translation: And during part of the night, (also,) celebrate His praises, and (so likewise) after the postures of adoration

verses.text: وَٱسۡتَمِعۡ يَوۡمَ يُنَادِ ٱلۡمُنَادِ مِن مَّكَانࣲ قَرِيبࣲ‏
verses.translation: And listen for the Day when the Caller will call out from a place quiet near

verses.text: يَوۡمَ يَسۡمَعُونَ ٱلصَّيۡحَةَ بِٱلۡحَقِّۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡخُرُوجِ
verses.translation: The Day when they will hear a (mighty) Blast in (very) truth: that will be the Day of Resurrection

verses.text: إِنَّا نَحۡنُ نُحۡيِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيۡنَا ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
verses.translation: Verily it is We Who give Life and Death; and to Us is the Final Goal

verses.text: يَوۡمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ عَنۡهُمۡ سِرَاعࣰ اۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشۡرٌ عَلَيۡنَا يَسِيرࣱ‏
verses.translation: The Day when the Earth will be rent asunder, from (men) hurrying out: that will be a gathering together,- quite easy for Us

verses.text: نَّحۡنُ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيۡهِم بِجَبَّارࣲۖ فَذَكِّرۡ بِٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
verses.translation: We know best what they say; and thou art not one to overawe them by force. So admonish with the Qur'an such as fear My Warning

verses.text: وَٱلذَّٰرِيَٰتِ ذَرۡوࣰ ا
verses.translation: By the (Winds) that scatter broadcast

verses.text: فَٱلۡحَٰمِلَٰتِ وِقۡرࣰ ا
verses.translation: And those that lift and bear away heavy weights

verses.text: فَٱلۡجَٰرِيَٰتِ يُسۡرࣰ ا
verses.translation: And those that flow with ease and gentleness

verses.text: فَٱلۡمُقَسِّمَٰتِ أَمۡرًا
verses.translation: And those that distribute and apportion by Command

verses.text: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقࣱ‏
verses.translation: Verily that which ye are promised is true

verses.text: وَإِنَّ ٱلدِّينَ لَوَٰقِعࣱ‏
verses.translation: And verily Judgment and Justice must indeed come to pass

verses.text: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلۡحُبُكِ
verses.translation: By the Sky with (its) numerous Paths

verses.text: إِنَّكُمۡ لَفِي قَوۡلࣲ مُّخۡتَلِفࣲ‏
verses.translation: Truly ye are in a doctrine discordant

verses.text: يُؤۡفَكُ عَنۡهُ مَنۡ أُفِكَ
verses.translation: Through which are deluded (away from the Truth) such as would be deluded

verses.text: قُتِلَ ٱلۡخَرَّٰصُونَ
verses.translation: Woe to the falsehood-mongers

verses.text: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ فِي غَمۡرَةࣲ سَاهُونَ
verses.translation: Those who (flounder) heedless in a flood of confusion

verses.text: يَسۡـَٔلُونَ أَيَّانَ يَوۡمُ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.translation: They ask, "When will be the Day of Judgment and Justice

verses.text: يَوۡمَ هُمۡ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ يُفۡتَنُونَ
verses.translation: (It will be) a Day when they will be tried (and tested) over the Fire

verses.text: ذُوقُواْ فِتۡنَتَكُمۡ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسۡتَعۡجِلُونَ
verses.translation: Taste ye your trial! This is what ye used to ask to be hastened

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّٰتࣲ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.translation: As to the Righteous, they will be in the midst of Gardens and Springs

verses.text: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَبۡلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.translation: Taking joy in the things which their Lord gives them, because, before then, they lived a good life

verses.text: كَانُواْ قَلِيلࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ مَا يَهۡجَعُونَ
verses.translation: They were in the habit of sleeping but little by night

verses.text: وَبِٱلۡأَسۡحَارِ هُمۡ يَسۡتَغۡفِرُونَ
verses.translation: And in the hour of early dawn, they (were found) praying for Forgiveness

verses.text: وَفِيٓ أَمۡوَٰلِهِمۡ حَقࣱّ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلۡمَحۡرُومِ
verses.translation: And in their wealth and possessions (was remembered) the right of the (needy,) him who asked, and him who (for some reason) was prevented (from asking)

verses.text: وَفِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ ءَايَٰتࣱ لِّلۡمُوقِنِينَ
verses.translation: On the earth are signs for those of assured Faith

verses.text: وَفِيٓ أَنفُسِكُمۡۚ أَفَلَا تُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.translation: As also in your own selves: Will ye not then see

verses.text: وَفِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزۡقُكُمۡ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ
verses.translation: And in heaven is your Sustenance, as (also) that which ye are promised

verses.text: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقࣱّ مِّثۡلَ مَآ أَنَّكُمۡ تَنطِقُونَ
verses.translation: Then, by the Lord of heaven and earth, this is the very Truth, as much as the fact that ye can speak intelligently to each other

verses.text: هَلۡ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيۡفِ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ ٱلۡمُكۡرَمِينَ
verses.translation: Has the story reached thee, of the honoured guests of Abraham

verses.text: إِذۡ دَخَلُواْ عَلَيۡهِ فَقَالُواْ سَلَٰمࣰ اۖ قَالَ سَلَٰمࣱ قَوۡمࣱ مُّنكَرُونَ
verses.translation: Behold, they entered his presence, and said: "Peace!" He said, "Peace!" (and thought, "These seem) unusual people

verses.text: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجۡلࣲ سَمِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: Then he turned quickly to his household, brought out a fatted calf

verses.text: فَقَرَّبَهُۥٓ إِلَيۡهِمۡ قَالَ أَلَا تَأۡكُلُونَ
verses.translation: And placed it before them.. he said, "Will ye not eat

verses.text: فَأَوۡجَسَ مِنۡهُمۡ خِيفَةࣰۖ قَالُواْ لَا تَخَفۡۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَٰمٍ عَلِيمࣲ‏
verses.translation: (When they did not eat), He conceived a fear of them. They said, "Fear not," and they gave him glad tidings of a son endowed with knowledge

verses.text: فَأَقۡبَلَتِ ٱمۡرَأَتُهُۥ فِي صَرَّةࣲ فَصَكَّتۡ وَجۡهَهَا وَقَالَتۡ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: But his wife came forward (laughing) aloud: she smote her forehead and said: "A barren old woman

verses.text: قَالُواْ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
verses.translation: They said, "Even so has thy Lord spoken: and He is full of Wisdom and Knowledge

verses.text: ۞قَالَ فَمَا خَطۡبُكُمۡ أَيُّهَا ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
verses.translation: (Abraham) said: "And what, O ye Messengers, is your errand (now)

verses.text: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّآ أُرۡسِلۡنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوۡمࣲ مُّجۡرِمِينَ
verses.translation: They said, "We have been sent to a people (deep) in sin

verses.text: لِنُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ حِجَارَةࣰ مِّن طِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: To bring on, on them, (a shower of) stones of clay (brimstone)

verses.text: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلۡمُسۡرِفِينَ
verses.translation: Marked as from thy Lord for those who trespass beyond bounds

verses.text: فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.translation: Then We evacuated those of the Believers who were there

verses.text: فَمَا وَجَدۡنَا فِيهَا غَيۡرَ بَيۡتࣲ مِّنَ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِينَ
verses.translation: But We found not there any just (Muslim) persons except in one house

verses.text: وَتَرَكۡنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَةࣰ لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ ٱلۡعَذَابَ ٱلۡأَلِيمَ
verses.translation: And We left there a Sign for such as fear the Grievous Penalty

verses.text: وَفِي مُوسَىٰٓ إِذۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ بِسُلۡطَٰنࣲ مُّبِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: And in Moses (was another Sign): Behold, We sent him to Pharaoh, with authority manifest

verses.text: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكۡنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَٰحِرٌ أَوۡ مَجۡنُونࣱ‏
verses.translation: But (Pharaoh) turned back with his Chiefs, and said, "A sorcerer, or one possessed

verses.text: فَأَخَذۡنَٰهُ وَجُنُودَهُۥ فَنَبَذۡنَٰهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: So We took him and his forces, and threw them into the sea; and his was the blame

verses.text: وَفِي عَادٍ إِذۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلرِّيحَ ٱلۡعَقِيمَ
verses.translation: And in the 'Ad (people) (was another Sign): Behold, We sent against them the devastating Wind

verses.text: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَيۡءٍ أَتَتۡ عَلَيۡهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتۡهُ كَٱلرَّمِيمِ
verses.translation: It left nothing whatever that it came up against, but reduced it to ruin and rottenness

verses.text: وَفِي ثَمُودَ إِذۡ قِيلَ لَهُمۡ تَمَتَّعُواْ حَتَّىٰ حِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: And in the Thamud (was another Sign): Behold, they were told, "Enjoy (your brief day) for a little while

verses.text: فَعَتَوۡاْ عَنۡ أَمۡرِ رَبِّهِمۡ فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلصَّٰعِقَةُ وَهُمۡ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.translation: But they insolently defied the Command of their Lord: So the stunning noise (of an earthquake) seized them, even while they were looking on

verses.text: فَمَا ٱسۡتَطَٰعُواْ مِن قِيَامࣲ وَمَا كَانُواْ مُنتَصِرِينَ
verses.translation: Then they could not even stand (on their feet), nor could they help themselves

verses.text: وَقَوۡمَ نُوحࣲ مِّن قَبۡلُۖ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَوۡمࣰ ا فَٰسِقِينَ
verses.translation: So were the People of Noah before them for they wickedly transgressed

verses.text: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بَنَيۡنَٰهَا بِأَيۡيْدࣲ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ
verses.translation: With power and skill did We construct the Firmament: for it is We Who create the vastness of pace

verses.text: وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ فَرَشۡنَٰهَا فَنِعۡمَ ٱلۡمَٰهِدُونَ
verses.translation: And We have spread out the (spacious) earth: How excellently We do spread out

verses.text: وَمِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.translation: And of every thing We have created pairs: That ye may receive instruction

verses.text: فَفِرُّوٓاْ إِلَى ٱللَّهِۖ إِنِّي لَكُم مِّنۡهُ نَذِيرࣱ مُّبِينࣱ‏
verses.translation: Hasten ye then (at once) to God: I am from Him a Warner to you, clear and open

verses.text: وَلَا تَجۡعَلُواْ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَۖ إِنِّي لَكُم مِّنۡهُ نَذِيرࣱ مُّبِينࣱ‏
verses.translation: And make not another an object of worship with God: I am from Him a Warner to you, clear and open

verses.text: كَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَتَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُواْ سَاحِرٌ أَوۡ مَجۡنُونٌ
verses.translation: Similarly, no apostle came to the Peoples before them, but they said (of him) in like manner, "A sorcerer, or one possessed

verses.text: أَتَوَاصَوۡاْ بِهِۦۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ قَوۡمࣱ طَاغُونَ
verses.translation: Is this the legacy they have transmitted, one to another? Nay, they are themselves a people transgressing beyond bounds

verses.text: فَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِمَلُومࣲ‏
verses.translation: So turn away from them: not thine is the blame

verses.text: وَذَكِّرۡ فَإِنَّ ٱلذِّكۡرَىٰ تَنفَعُ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.translation: But teach (thy Message) for teaching benefits the Believers

verses.text: وَمَا خَلَقۡتُ ٱلۡجِنَّ وَٱلۡإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعۡبُدُونِ
verses.translation: I have only created Jinns and men, that they may serve Me

verses.text: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنۡهُم مِّن رِّزۡقࣲ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطۡعِمُونِ
verses.translation: No Sustenance do I require of them, nor do I require that they should feed Me

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلۡقُوَّةِ ٱلۡمَتِينُ
verses.translation: For God is He Who gives (all) Sustenance,- Lord of Power,- Steadfast (for ever)

verses.text: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ ذَنُوبࣰ ا مِّثۡلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصۡحَٰبِهِمۡ فَلَا يَسۡتَعۡجِلُونِ
verses.translation: For the Wrong-doers, their portion is like unto the portion of their fellows (of earlier generations): then let them not ask Me to hasten (that portion)

verses.text: فَوَيۡلࣱ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِن يَوۡمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِي يُوعَدُونَ
verses.translation: Woe, then, to the Unbelievers, on account of that Day of theirs which they have been promised

verses.text: وَٱلطُّورِ
verses.translation: By the Mount (of Revelation)

verses.text: وَكِتَٰبࣲ مَّسۡطُورࣲ‏
verses.translation: By a Decree inscribed

verses.text: فِي رَقࣲّ مَّنشُورࣲ‏
verses.translation: In a Scroll unfolded

verses.text: وَٱلۡبَيۡتِ ٱلۡمَعۡمُورِ
verses.translation: By the much-frequented Fane

verses.text: وَٱلسَّقۡفِ ٱلۡمَرۡفُوعِ
verses.translation: By the Canopy Raised High

verses.text: وَٱلۡبَحۡرِ ٱلۡمَسۡجُورِ
verses.translation: And by the Ocean filled with Swell

verses.text: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّكَ لَوَٰقِعࣱ‏
verses.translation: Verily, the Doom of thy Lord will indeed come to pass

verses.text: مَّا لَهُۥ مِن دَافِعࣲ‏
verses.translation: There is none can avert it

verses.text: يَوۡمَ تَمُورُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ مَوۡرࣰ ا
verses.translation: On the Day when the firmament will be in dreadful commotion

verses.text: وَتَسِيرُ ٱلۡجِبَالُ سَيۡرࣰ ا
verses.translation: And the mountains will fly hither and thither

verses.text: فَوَيۡلࣱ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.translation: Then woe that Day to those that treat (Truth) as Falsehood

verses.text: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ فِي خَوۡضࣲ يَلۡعَبُونَ
verses.translation: That play (and paddle) in shallow trifles

verses.text: يَوۡمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا
verses.translation: That Day shall they be thrust down to the Fire of Hell, irresistibly

verses.text: هَٰذِهِ ٱلنَّارُ ٱلَّتِي كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.translation: This:, it will be said, "Is the Fire,- which ye were wont to deny

verses.text: أَفَسِحۡرٌ هَٰذَآ أَمۡ أَنتُمۡ لَا تُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.translation: Is this then a fake, or is it ye that do not see

verses.text: ٱصۡلَوۡهَا فَٱصۡبِرُوٓاْ أَوۡ لَا تَصۡبِرُواْ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡۖ إِنَّمَا تُجۡزَوۡنَ مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.translation: Burn ye therein: the same is it to you whether ye bear it with patience, or not: Ye but receive the recompense of your (own) deeds

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّٰتࣲ وَنَعِيمࣲ‏
verses.translation: As to the Righteous, they will be in Gardens, and in Happiness

verses.text: فَٰكِهِينَ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ وَوَقَىٰهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ عَذَابَ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.translation: Enjoying the (Bliss) which their Lord hath bestowed on them, and their Lord shall deliver them from the Penalty of the Fire

verses.text: كُلُواْ وَٱشۡرَبُواْ هَنِيٓـَٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.translation: (To them will be said:) "Eat and drink ye, with profit and health, because of your (good) deeds

verses.text: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ سُرُرࣲ مَّصۡفُوفَةࣲۖ وَزَوَّجۡنَٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: They will recline (with ease) on Thrones (of dignity) arranged in ranks; and We shall join them to Companions, with beautiful big and lustrous eyes

verses.text: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَٱتَّبَعَتۡهُمۡ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمَٰنٍ أَلۡحَقۡنَا بِهِمۡ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمۡ وَمَآ أَلَتۡنَٰهُم مِّنۡ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَيۡءࣲۚ كُلُّ ٱمۡرِيِٕۭ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينࣱ‏
verses.translation: And those who believe and whose families follow them in Faith,- to them shall We join their families: Nor shall We deprive them (of the fruit) of aught of their works: (Yet) is each individual in pledge for his deeds

verses.text: وَأَمۡدَدۡنَٰهُم بِفَٰكِهَةࣲ وَلَحۡمࣲ مِّمَّا يَشۡتَهُونَ
verses.translation: And We shall bestow on them, of fruit and meat, anything they shall desire

verses.text: يَتَنَٰزَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأۡسࣰ ا لَّا لَغۡوࣱ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأۡثِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: They shall there exchange, one with another, a (loving) cup free of frivolity, free of all taint of ill

verses.text: ۞وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ غِلۡمَانࣱ لَّهُمۡ كَأَنَّهُمۡ لُؤۡلُؤࣱ مَّكۡنُونࣱ‏
verses.translation: Round about them will serve, (devoted) to them. Youths (handsome) as Pearls well-guarded

verses.text: وَأَقۡبَلَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضࣲ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.translation: They will advance to each other, engaging in mutual enquiry

verses.text: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبۡلُ فِيٓ أَهۡلِنَا مُشۡفِقِينَ
verses.translation: They will say: "Aforetime, we were not without fear for the sake of our people

verses.text: فَمَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡنَا وَوَقَىٰنَا عَذَابَ ٱلسَّمُومِ
verses.translation: But God has been good to us, and has delivered us from the Penalty of the Scorching Wind

verses.text: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبۡلُ نَدۡعُوهُۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلۡبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.translation: Truly, we did call unto Him from of old: truly it is He, the Beneficent, the Merciful

verses.text: فَذَكِّرۡ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِنِعۡمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنࣲ وَلَا مَجۡنُونٍ
verses.translation: Therefore proclaim thou the praises (of thy Lord): for by the Grace of thy Lord, thou art no (vulgar) soothsayer, nor art thou one possessed

verses.text: أَمۡ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرࣱ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِۦ رَيۡبَ ٱلۡمَنُونِ
verses.translation: Or do they say:- "A Poet! we await for him some calamity (hatched) by Time

verses.text: قُلۡ تَرَبَّصُواْ فَإِنِّي مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡمُتَرَبِّصِينَ
verses.translation: Say thou: "Await ye!- I too will wait along with you

verses.text: أَمۡ تَأۡمُرُهُمۡ أَحۡلَٰمُهُم بِهَٰذَآۚ أَمۡ هُمۡ قَوۡمࣱ طَاغُونَ
verses.translation: Is it that their faculties of understanding urge them to this, or are they but a people transgressing beyond bounds

verses.text: أَمۡ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُۥۚ بَل لَّا يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.translation: Or do they say, "He fabricated the (Message)"? Nay, they have no faith

verses.text: فَلۡيَأۡتُواْ بِحَدِيثࣲ مِّثۡلِهِۦٓ إِن كَانُواْ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.translation: Let them then produce a recital like unto it,- If (it be) they speak the truth

verses.text: أَمۡ خُلِقُواْ مِنۡ غَيۡرِ شَيۡءٍ أَمۡ هُمُ ٱلۡخَٰلِقُونَ
verses.translation: Were they created of nothing, or were they themselves the creators

verses.text: أَمۡ خَلَقُواْ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَۚ بَل لَّا يُوقِنُونَ
verses.translation: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? Nay, they have no firm belief

verses.text: أَمۡ عِندَهُمۡ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمۡ هُمُ ٱلۡمُصَۜيۡطِرُونَ
verses.translation: Or are the Treasures of thy Lord with them, or are they the managers (of affairs)

verses.text: أَمۡ لَهُمۡ سُلَّمࣱ يَسۡتَمِعُونَ فِيهِۖ فَلۡيَأۡتِ مُسۡتَمِعُهُم بِسُلۡطَٰنࣲ مُّبِينٍ
verses.translation: Or have they a ladder, by which they can (climb up to heaven and) listen (to its secrets)? Then let (such a) listener of theirs produce a manifest proof

verses.text: أَمۡ لَهُ ٱلۡبَنَٰتُ وَلَكُمُ ٱلۡبَنُونَ
verses.translation: Or has He only daughters and ye have sons

verses.text: أَمۡ تَسۡـَٔلُهُمۡ أَجۡرࣰ ا فَهُم مِّن مَّغۡرَمࣲ مُّثۡقَلُونَ
verses.translation: Or is it that thou dost ask for a reward, so that they are burdened with a load of debt

verses.text: أَمۡ عِندَهُمُ ٱلۡغَيۡبُ فَهُمۡ يَكۡتُبُونَ
verses.translation: Or that the Unseen in it their hands, and they write it down

verses.text: أَمۡ يُرِيدُونَ كَيۡدࣰ اۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ هُمُ ٱلۡمَكِيدُونَ
verses.translation: Or do they intend a plot (against thee)? But those who defy God are themselves involved in a Plot

verses.text: أَمۡ لَهُمۡ إِلَٰهٌ غَيۡرُ ٱللَّهِۚ سُبۡحَٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ
verses.translation: Or have they a god other than God? Exalted is God far above the things they associate with Him

verses.text: وَإِن يَرَوۡاْ كِسۡفࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطࣰ ا يَقُولُواْ سَحَابࣱ مَّرۡكُومࣱ‏
verses.translation: Were they to see a piece of the sky falling (on them), they would (only) say: "Clouds gathered in heaps

verses.text: فَذَرۡهُمۡ حَتَّىٰ يُلَٰقُواْ يَوۡمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِي فِيهِ يُصۡعَقُونَ
verses.translation: So leave them alone until they encounter that Day of theirs, wherein they shall (perforce) swoon (with terror)

verses.text: يَوۡمَ لَا يُغۡنِي عَنۡهُمۡ كَيۡدُهُمۡ شَيۡـࣰٔ ا وَلَا هُمۡ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.translation: The Day when their plotting will avail them nothing and no help shall be given them

verses.text: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ عَذَابࣰ ا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: And verily, for those who do wrong, there is another punishment besides this: But most of them understand not

verses.text: وَٱصۡبِرۡ لِحُكۡمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعۡيُنِنَاۖ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
verses.translation: Now await in patience the command of thy Lord: for verily thou art in Our eyes: and celebrate the praises of thy Lord the while thou standest forth

verses.text: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَسَبِّحۡهُ وَإِدۡبَٰرَ ٱلنُّجُومِ
verses.translation: And for part of the night also praise thou Him,- and at the retreat of the stars

verses.text: وَٱلنَّجۡمِ إِذَا هَوَىٰ
verses.translation: By the Star when it goes down

verses.text: مَا ضَلَّ صَاحِبُكُمۡ وَمَا غَوَىٰ
verses.translation: Your Companion is neither astray nor being misled

verses.text: وَمَا يَنطِقُ عَنِ ٱلۡهَوَىٰٓ
verses.translation: Nor does he say (aught) of (his own) Desire

verses.text: إِنۡ هُوَ إِلَّا وَحۡيࣱ يُوحَىٰ
verses.translation: It is no less than inspiration sent down to him

verses.text: عَلَّمَهُۥ شَدِيدُ ٱلۡقُوَىٰ
verses.translation: He was taught by one Mighty in Power

verses.text: ذُو مِرَّةࣲ فَٱسۡتَوَىٰ
verses.translation: Endued with Wisdom: for he appeared (in stately form)

verses.text: وَهُوَ بِٱلۡأُفُقِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰ
verses.translation: While he was in the highest part of the horizon

verses.text: ثُمَّ دَنَا فَتَدَلَّىٰ
verses.translation: Then he approached and came closer

verses.text: فَكَانَ قَابَ قَوۡسَيۡنِ أَوۡ أَدۡنَىٰ
verses.translation: And was at a distance of but two bow-lengths or (even) nearer

verses.text: فَأَوۡحَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ عَبۡدِهِۦ مَآ أَوۡحَىٰ
verses.translation: So did (God) convey the inspiration to His Servant- (conveyed) what He (meant) to convey

verses.text: مَا كَذَبَ ٱلۡفُؤَادُ مَا رَأَىٰٓ
verses.translation: The (Prophet's) (mind and) heart in no way falsified that which he saw

verses.text: أَفَتُمَٰرُونَهُۥ عَلَىٰ مَا يَرَىٰ
verses.translation: Will ye then dispute with him concerning what he saw

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ رَءَاهُ نَزۡلَةً أُخۡرَىٰ
verses.translation: For indeed he saw him at a second descent

verses.text: عِندَ سِدۡرَةِ ٱلۡمُنتَهَىٰ
verses.translation: Near the Lote-tree beyond which none may pass

verses.text: عِندَهَا جَنَّةُ ٱلۡمَأۡوَىٰٓ
verses.translation: Near it is the Garden of Abode

verses.text: إِذۡ يَغۡشَى ٱلسِّدۡرَةَ مَا يَغۡشَىٰ
verses.translation: Behold, the Lote-tree was shrouded (in mystery unspeakable)

verses.text: مَا زَاغَ ٱلۡبَصَرُ وَمَا طَغَىٰ
verses.translation: (His) sight never swerved, nor did it go wrong

verses.text: لَقَدۡ رَأَىٰ مِنۡ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّهِ ٱلۡكُبۡرَىٰٓ
verses.translation: For truly did he see, of the Signs of his Lord, the Greatest

verses.text: أَفَرَءَيۡتُمُ ٱللَّٰتَ وَٱلۡعُزَّىٰ
verses.translation: Have ye seen Lat. and 'Uzza

verses.text: وَمَنَوٰةَ ٱلثَّالِثَةَ ٱلۡأُخۡرَىٰٓ
verses.translation: And another, the third (goddess), Manat

verses.text: أَلَكُمُ ٱلذَّكَرُ وَلَهُ ٱلۡأُنثَىٰ
verses.translation: What! for you the male sex, and for Him, the female

verses.text: تِلۡكَ إِذࣰ ا قِسۡمَةࣱ ضِيزَىٰٓ
verses.translation: Behold, such would be indeed a division most unfair

verses.text: إِنۡ هِيَ إِلَّآ أَسۡمَآءࣱ سَمَّيۡتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمۡ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلۡطَٰنٍۚ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهۡوَى ٱلۡأَنفُسُۖ وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلۡهُدَىٰٓ
verses.translation: These are nothing but names which ye have devised,- ye and your fathers,- for which God has sent down no authority (whatever). They follow nothing but conjecture and what their own souls desire!- Even though there has already come to them Guid ance from their Lord

verses.text: أَمۡ لِلۡإِنسَٰنِ مَا تَمَنَّىٰ
verses.translation: Nay, shall man have (just) anything he hankers after

verses.text: فَلِلَّهِ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةُ وَٱلۡأُولَىٰ
verses.translation: But it is to God that the End and the Beginning (of all things) belong

verses.text: ۞وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكࣲ فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ لَا تُغۡنِي شَفَٰعَتُهُمۡ شَيۡـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعۡدِ أَن يَأۡذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرۡضَىٰٓ
verses.translation: How many-so-ever be the angels in the heavens, their intercession will avail nothing except after God has given leave for whom He pleases and that he is acceptable to Him

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ بِٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ لَيُسَمُّونَ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ تَسۡمِيَةَ ٱلۡأُنثَىٰ
verses.translation: Those who believe not in the Hereafter, name the angels with female names

verses.text: وَمَا لَهُم بِهِۦ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍۖ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّۖ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّنَّ لَا يُغۡنِي مِنَ ٱلۡحَقِّ شَيۡـࣰٔ ا
verses.translation: But they have no knowledge therein. They follow nothing but conjecture; and conjecture avails nothing against Truth

verses.text: فَأَعۡرِضۡ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكۡرِنَا وَلَمۡ يُرِدۡ إِلَّا ٱلۡحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا
verses.translation: Therefore shun those who turn away from Our Message and desire nothing but the life of this world

verses.text: ذَٰلِكَ مَبۡلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡعِلۡمِۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهۡتَدَىٰ
verses.translation: That is as far as knowledge will reach them. Verily thy Lord knoweth best those who stray from His Path, and He knoweth best those who receive guidance

verses.text: وَلِلَّهِ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ لِيَجۡزِيَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسَٰٓـُٔواْ بِمَا عَمِلُواْ وَيَجۡزِيَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَحۡسَنُواْ بِٱلۡحُسۡنَى
verses.translation: Yea, to God belongs all that is in the heavens and on earth: so that He rewards those who do evil, according to their deeds, and He rewards those who do good, with what is best

verses.text: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجۡتَنِبُونَ كَبَٰٓئِرَ ٱلۡإِثۡمِ وَٱلۡفَوَٰحِشَ إِلَّا ٱللَّمَمَۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ وَٰسِعُ ٱلۡمَغۡفِرَةِۚ هُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِكُمۡ إِذۡ أَنشَأَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَإِذۡ أَنتُمۡ أَجِنَّةࣱ فِي بُطُونِ أُمَّهَٰتِكُمۡۖ فَلَا تُزَكُّوٓاْ أَنفُسَكُمۡۖ هُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰٓ
verses.translation: Those who avoid great sins and shameful deeds, only (falling into) small faults,- verily thy Lord is ample in forgiveness. He knows you well when He brings you out of the earth, And when ye are hidden in your mothers' wombs. Therefore justify not yourselves: He knows best who it is that guards against evil

verses.text: أَفَرَءَيۡتَ ٱلَّذِي تَوَلَّىٰ
verses.translation: Seest thou one who turns back

verses.text: وَأَعۡطَىٰ قَلِيلࣰ ا وَأَكۡدَىٰٓ
verses.translation: Gives a little, then hardens (his heart)

verses.text: أَعِندَهُۥ عِلۡمُ ٱلۡغَيۡبِ فَهُوَ يَرَىٰٓ
verses.translation: What! Has he knowledge of the Unseen so that he can see

verses.text: أَمۡ لَمۡ يُنَبَّأۡ بِمَا فِي صُحُفِ مُوسَىٰ
verses.translation: Nay, is he not acquainted with what is in the Books of Moses

verses.text: وَإِبۡرَٰهِيمَ ٱلَّذِي وَفَّىٰٓ
verses.translation: And of Abraham who fulfilled his engagements

verses.text: أَلَّا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةࣱ وِزۡرَ أُخۡرَىٰ
verses.translation: Namely, that no bearer of burdens can bear the burden of another

verses.text: وَأَن لَّيۡسَ لِلۡإِنسَٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
verses.translation: That man can have nothing but what he strives for

verses.text: وَأَنَّ سَعۡيَهُۥ سَوۡفَ يُرَىٰ
verses.translation: That (the fruit of) his striving will soon come in sight

verses.text: ثُمَّ يُجۡزَىٰهُ ٱلۡجَزَآءَ ٱلۡأَوۡفَىٰ
verses.translation: Then will he be rewarded with a reward complete

verses.text: وَأَنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلۡمُنتَهَىٰ
verses.translation: That to thy Lord is the final Goal

verses.text: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَضۡحَكَ وَأَبۡكَىٰ
verses.translation: That it is He Who granteth Laughter and Tears

verses.text: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَمَاتَ وَأَحۡيَا
verses.translation: That it is He Who granteth Death and Life

verses.text: وَأَنَّهُۥ خَلَقَ ٱلزَّوۡجَيۡنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلۡأُنثَىٰ
verses.translation: That He did create in pairs,- male and female

verses.text: مِن نُّطۡفَةٍ إِذَا تُمۡنَىٰ
verses.translation: From a seed when lodged (in its place)

verses.text: وَأَنَّ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلنَّشۡأَةَ ٱلۡأُخۡرَىٰ
verses.translation: That He hath promised a Second Creation (Raising of the Dead)

verses.text: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَغۡنَىٰ وَأَقۡنَىٰ
verses.translation: That it is He Who giveth wealth and satisfaction

verses.text: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلشِّعۡرَىٰ
verses.translation: That He is the Lord of Sirius (the Mighty Star)

verses.text: وَأَنَّهُۥٓ أَهۡلَكَ عَادًا ٱلۡأُولَىٰ
verses.translation: And that it is He Who destroyed the (powerful) ancient 'Ad (people)

verses.text: وَثَمُودَاْ فَمَآ أَبۡقَىٰ
verses.translation: And the Thamud nor gave them a lease of perpetual life

verses.text: وَقَوۡمَ نُوحࣲ مِّن قَبۡلُۖ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ هُمۡ أَظۡلَمَ وَأَطۡغَىٰ
verses.translation: And before them, the people of Noah, for that they were (all) most unjust and most insolent transgressors

verses.text: وَٱلۡمُؤۡتَفِكَةَ أَهۡوَىٰ
verses.translation: And He destroyed the Overthrown Cities (of Sodom and Gomorrah)

verses.text: فَغَشَّىٰهَا مَا غَشَّىٰ
verses.translation: So that (ruins unknown) have covered them up

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكَ تَتَمَارَىٰ
verses.translation: Then which of the gifts of thy Lord, (O man,) wilt thou dispute about

verses.text: هَٰذَا نَذِيرࣱ مِّنَ ٱلنُّذُرِ ٱلۡأُولَىٰٓ
verses.translation: This is a Warner, of the (series of) Warners of old

verses.text: أَزِفَتِ ٱلۡأٓزِفَةُ
verses.translation: The (Judgment) ever approaching draws nigh

verses.text: لَيۡسَ لَهَا مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَاشِفَةٌ
verses.translation: No (soul) but God can lay it bare

verses.text: أَفَمِنۡ هَٰذَا ٱلۡحَدِيثِ تَعۡجَبُونَ
verses.translation: Do ye then wonder at this recital

verses.text: وَتَضۡحَكُونَ وَلَا تَبۡكُونَ
verses.translation: And will ye laugh and not weep

verses.text: وَأَنتُمۡ سَٰمِدُونَ
verses.translation: Wasting your time in vanities

verses.text: فَٱسۡجُدُواْۤ لِلَّهِۤ وَٱعۡبُدُواْ۩
verses.translation: But fall ye down in prostration to God, and adore (Him)

verses.text: ٱقۡتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلۡقَمَرُ
verses.translation: The Hour (of Judgment) is nigh, and the moon is cleft asunder

verses.text: وَإِن يَرَوۡاْ ءَايَةࣰ يُعۡرِضُواْ وَيَقُولُواْ سِحۡرࣱ مُّسۡتَمِرࣱّ‏
verses.translation: But if they see a Sign, they turn away, and say, "This is (but) transient magic

verses.text: وَكَذَّبُواْ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓاْ أَهۡوَآءَهُمۡۚ وَكُلُّ أَمۡرࣲ مُّسۡتَقِرࣱّ‏
verses.translation: They reject (the warning) and follow their (own) lusts but every matter has its appointed time

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزۡدَجَرٌ
verses.translation: There have already come to them Recitals wherein there is (enough) to check (them)

verses.text: حِكۡمَةُۢ بَٰلِغَةࣱۖ فَمَا تُغۡنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
verses.translation: Mature wisdom;- but (the preaching of) Warners profits them not

verses.text: فَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡۘ يَوۡمَ يَدۡعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَيۡءࣲ نُّكُرٍ
verses.translation: Therefore, (O Prophet,) turn away from them. The Day that the Caller will call (them) to a terrible affair

verses.text: خُشَّعًا أَبۡصَٰرُهُمۡ يَخۡرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡأَجۡدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمۡ جَرَادࣱ مُّنتَشِرࣱ‏
verses.translation: They will come forth,- their eyes humbled - from (their) graves, (torpid) like locusts scattered abroad

verses.text: مُّهۡطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِۖ يَقُولُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا يَوۡمٌ عَسِرࣱ‏
verses.translation: Hastening, with eyes transfixed, towards the Caller!- "Hard is this Day!", the Unbelievers will say

verses.text: ۞كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوحࣲ فَكَذَّبُواْ عَبۡدَنَا وَقَالُواْ مَجۡنُونࣱ وَٱزۡدُجِرَ
verses.translation: Before them the People of Noah rejected (their apostle): they rejected Our servant, and said, "Here is one possessed!", and he was driven out

verses.text: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّي مَغۡلُوبࣱ فَٱنتَصِرۡ
verses.translation: Then he called on his Lord: "I am one overcome: do Thou then help (me)

verses.text: فَفَتَحۡنَآ أَبۡوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءࣲ مُّنۡهَمِرࣲ‏
verses.translation: So We opened the gates of heaven, with water pouring forth

verses.text: وَفَجَّرۡنَا ٱلۡأَرۡضَ عُيُونࣰ ا فَٱلۡتَقَى ٱلۡمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمۡرࣲ قَدۡ قُدِرَ
verses.translation: And We caused the earth to gush forth with springs, so the waters met (and rose) to the extent decreed

verses.text: وَحَمَلۡنَٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلۡوَٰحࣲ وَدُسُرࣲ‏
verses.translation: But We bore him on an (Ark) made of broad planks and caulked with palm- fibre

verses.text: تَجۡرِي بِأَعۡيُنِنَا جَزَآءࣰ لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
verses.translation: She floats under our eyes (and care): a recompense to one who had been rejected (with scorn)

verses.text: وَلَقَد تَّرَكۡنَٰهَآ ءَايَةࣰ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرࣲ‏
verses.translation: And We have left this as a Sign (for all time): then is there any that will receive admonition

verses.text: فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
verses.translation: But how (terrible) was My Penalty and My Warning

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرࣲ‏
verses.translation: And We have indeed made the Qur'an easy to understand and remember: then is there any that will receive admonition

verses.text: كَذَّبَتۡ عَادࣱ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
verses.translation: The 'Ad (people) (too) rejected (Truth): then how terrible was My Penalty and My Warning

verses.text: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ رِيحࣰ ا صَرۡصَرࣰ ا فِي يَوۡمِ نَحۡسࣲ مُّسۡتَمِرࣲّ‏
verses.translation: For We sent against them a furious wind, on a Day of violent Disaster

verses.text: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمۡ أَعۡجَازُ نَخۡلࣲ مُّنقَعِرࣲ‏
verses.translation: Plucking out men as if they were roots of palm-trees torn up (from the ground)

verses.text: فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
verses.translation: Yea, how (terrible) was My Penalty and My Warning

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرࣲ‏
verses.translation: But We have indeed made the Qur'an easy to understand and remember: then is there any that will receive admonition

verses.text: كَذَّبَتۡ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.translation: The Thamud (also) rejected (their) Warners

verses.text: فَقَالُوٓاْ أَبَشَرࣰ ا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدࣰ ا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذࣰ ا لَّفِي ضَلَٰلࣲ وَسُعُرٍ
verses.translation: For they said: "What! a man! a Solitary one from among ourselves! shall we follow such a one? Truly should we then be straying in mind, and mad

verses.text: أَءُلۡقِيَ ٱلذِّكۡرُ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۢ بَيۡنِنَا بَلۡ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرࣱ‏
verses.translation: Is it that the Message is sent to him, of all people amongst us? Nay, he is a liar, an insolent one

verses.text: سَيَعۡلَمُونَ غَدࣰ ا مَّنِ ٱلۡكَذَّابُ ٱلۡأَشِرُ
verses.translation: Ah! they will know on the morrow, which is the liar, the insolent one

verses.text: إِنَّا مُرۡسِلُواْ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتۡنَةࣰ لَّهُمۡ فَٱرۡتَقِبۡهُمۡ وَٱصۡطَبِرۡ
verses.translation: For We will send the she-camel by way of trial for them. So watch them, (O Salih), and possess thyself in patience

verses.text: وَنَبِّئۡهُمۡ أَنَّ ٱلۡمَآءَ قِسۡمَةُۢ بَيۡنَهُمۡۖ كُلُّ شِرۡبࣲ مُّحۡتَضَرࣱ‏
verses.translation: And tell them that the water is to be divided between them: Each one's right to drink being brought forward (by suitable turns)

verses.text: فَنَادَوۡاْ صَاحِبَهُمۡ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
verses.translation: But they called to their companion, and he took a sword in hand, and hamstrung (her)

verses.text: فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
verses.translation: Ah! how (terrible) was My Penalty and My Warning

verses.text: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ صَيۡحَةࣰ وَٰحِدَةࣰ فَكَانُواْ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلۡمُحۡتَظِرِ
verses.translation: For We sent against them a single Mighty Blast, and they became like the dry stubble used by one who pens cattle

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرࣲ‏
verses.translation: And We have indeed made the Qur'an easy to understand and remember: then is there any that will receive admonition

verses.text: كَذَّبَتۡ قَوۡمُ لُوطِۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.translation: The people of Lut rejected (his) warning

verses.text: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطࣲۖ نَّجَّيۡنَٰهُم بِسَحَرࣲ‏
verses.translation: We sent against them a violent Tornado with showers of stones, (which destroyed them), except Lut's household: them We delivered by early Dawn

verses.text: نِّعۡمَةࣰ مِّنۡ عِندِنَاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي مَن شَكَرَ
verses.translation: As a Grace from Us: thus do We reward those who give thanks

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ أَنذَرَهُم بَطۡشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوۡاْ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.translation: And (Lut) did warn them of Our Punishment, but they disputed about the Warning

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيۡفِهِۦ فَطَمَسۡنَآ أَعۡيُنَهُمۡ فَذُوقُواْ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
verses.translation: And they even sought to snatch away his guests from him, but We blinded their eyes. (They heard:) "Now taste ye My Wrath and My Warning

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ صَبَّحَهُم بُكۡرَةً عَذَابࣱ مُّسۡتَقِرࣱّ‏
verses.translation: Early on the morrow an abiding Punishment seized them

verses.text: فَذُوقُواْ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
verses.translation: So taste ye My Wrath and My Warning

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرࣲ‏
verses.translation: And We have indeed made the Qur'an easy to understand and remember: then is there any that will receive admonition

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
verses.translation: To the People of Pharaoh, too, aforetime, came Warners (from God)

verses.text: كَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذۡنَٰهُمۡ أَخۡذَ عَزِيزࣲ مُّقۡتَدِرٍ
verses.translation: The (people) rejected all Our Signs; but We seized them with such Penalty (as comes) from One Exalted in Power, able to carry out His Will

verses.text: أَكُفَّارُكُمۡ خَيۡرࣱ مِّنۡ أُوْلَٰٓئِكُمۡ أَمۡ لَكُم بَرَآءَةࣱ فِي ٱلزُّبُرِ
verses.translation: Are your Unbelievers, (O Quraish), better than they? Or have ye an immunity in the Sacred Books

verses.text: أَمۡ يَقُولُونَ نَحۡنُ جَمِيعࣱ مُّنتَصِرࣱ‏
verses.translation: Or do they say: "We acting together can defend ourselves

verses.text: سَيُهۡزَمُ ٱلۡجَمۡعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
verses.translation: Soon will their multitude be put to flight, and they will show their backs

verses.text: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوۡعِدُهُمۡ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدۡهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
verses.translation: Nay, the Hour (of Judgment) is the time promised them (for their full recompense): And that Hour will be most grievous and most bitter

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ فِي ضَلَٰلࣲ وَسُعُرࣲ‏
verses.translation: Truly those in sin are the ones straying in mind, and mad

verses.text: يَوۡمَ يُسۡحَبُونَ فِي ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمۡ ذُوقُواْ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
verses.translation: The Day they will be dragged through the Fire on their faces, (they will hear:) "Taste ye the touch of Hell

verses.text: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَٰهُ بِقَدَرࣲ‏
verses.translation: Verily, all things have We created in proportion and measure

verses.text: وَمَآ أَمۡرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةࣱ كَلَمۡحِۭ بِٱلۡبَصَرِ
verses.translation: And Our Command is but a single (Act),- like the twinkling of an eye

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَآ أَشۡيَاعَكُمۡ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرࣲ‏
verses.translation: And (oft) in the past, have We destroyed gangs like unto you: then is there any that will receive admonition

verses.text: وَكُلُّ شَيۡءࣲ فَعَلُوهُ فِي ٱلزُّبُرِ
verses.translation: All that they do is noted in (their) Books (of Deeds)

verses.text: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرࣲ وَكَبِيرࣲ مُّسۡتَطَرٌ
verses.translation: Every matter, small and great, is on record

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّٰتࣲ وَنَهَرࣲ‏
verses.translation: As to the Righteous, they will be in the midst of Gardens and Rivers

verses.text: فِي مَقۡعَدِ صِدۡقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكࣲ مُّقۡتَدِرِۭ
verses.translation: In an Assembly of Truth, in the Presence of a Sovereign Omnipotent

verses.text: ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ
verses.translation: (God) Most Gracious

verses.text: عَلَّمَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ
verses.translation: It is He Who has taught the Qur'an

verses.text: خَلَقَ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ
verses.translation: He has created man

verses.text: عَلَّمَهُ ٱلۡبَيَانَ
verses.translation: He has taught him speech (and intelligence)

verses.text: ٱلشَّمۡسُ وَٱلۡقَمَرُ بِحُسۡبَانࣲ‏
verses.translation: The sun and the moon follow courses (exactly) computed

verses.text: وَٱلنَّجۡمُ وَٱلشَّجَرُ يَسۡجُدَانِ
verses.translation: And the herbs and the trees - both (alike) bow in adoration

verses.text: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ رَفَعَهَا وَوَضَعَ ٱلۡمِيزَانَ
verses.translation: And the Firmament has He raised high, and He has set up the Balance (of Justice)

verses.text: أَلَّا تَطۡغَوۡاْ فِي ٱلۡمِيزَانِ
verses.translation: In order that ye may not transgress (due) balance

verses.text: وَأَقِيمُواْ ٱلۡوَزۡنَ بِٱلۡقِسۡطِ وَلَا تُخۡسِرُواْ ٱلۡمِيزَانَ
verses.translation: So establish weight with justice and fall not short in the balance

verses.text: وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَضَعَهَا لِلۡأَنَامِ
verses.translation: It is He Who has spread out the earth for (His) creatures

verses.text: فِيهَا فَٰكِهَةࣱ وَٱلنَّخۡلُ ذَاتُ ٱلۡأَكۡمَامِ
verses.translation: Therein is fruit and date-palms, producing spathes (enclosing dates)

verses.text: وَٱلۡحَبُّ ذُو ٱلۡعَصۡفِ وَٱلرَّيۡحَانُ
verses.translation: Also corn, with (its) leaves and stalk for fodder, and sweet-smelling plants

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: خَلَقَ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ مِن صَلۡصَٰلࣲ كَٱلۡفَخَّارِ
verses.translation: He created man from sounding clay like unto pottery

verses.text: وَخَلَقَ ٱلۡجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجࣲ مِّن نَّارࣲ‏
verses.translation: And He created Jinns from fire free of smoke

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: رَبُّ ٱلۡمَشۡرِقَيۡنِ وَرَبُّ ٱلۡمَغۡرِبَيۡنِ
verses.translation: (He is) Lord of the two Easts and Lord of the two Wests

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: مَرَجَ ٱلۡبَحۡرَيۡنِ يَلۡتَقِيَانِ
verses.translation: He has let free the two bodies of flowing water, meeting together

verses.text: بَيۡنَهُمَا بَرۡزَخࣱ لَّا يَبۡغِيَانِ
verses.translation: Between them is a Barrier which they do not transgress

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡهُمَا ٱللُّؤۡلُؤُ وَٱلۡمَرۡجَانُ
verses.translation: Out of them come Pearls and Coral

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: وَلَهُ ٱلۡجَوَارِ ٱلۡمُنشَـَٔاتُ فِي ٱلۡبَحۡرِ كَٱلۡأَعۡلَٰمِ
verses.translation: And His are the Ships sailing smoothly through the seas, lofty as mountains

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: كُلُّ مَنۡ عَلَيۡهَا فَانࣲ‏
verses.translation: All that is on earth will perish

verses.text: وَيَبۡقَىٰ وَجۡهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلۡجَلَٰلِ وَٱلۡإِكۡرَامِ
verses.translation: But will abide (for ever) the Face of thy Lord,- full of Majesty, Bounty and Honour

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: يَسۡـَٔلُهُۥ مَن فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ كُلَّ يَوۡمٍ هُوَ فِي شَأۡنࣲ‏
verses.translation: Of Him seeks (its need) every creature in the heavens and on earth: every day in (new) Splendour doth He (shine)

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: سَنَفۡرُغُ لَكُمۡ أَيُّهَ ٱلثَّقَلَانِ
verses.translation: Soon shall We settle your affairs, O both ye worlds

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: يَٰمَعۡشَرَ ٱلۡجِنِّ وَٱلۡإِنسِ إِنِ ٱسۡتَطَعۡتُمۡ أَن تَنفُذُواْ مِنۡ أَقۡطَارِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَٱنفُذُواْۚ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلۡطَٰنࣲ‏
verses.translation: O ye assembly of Jinns and men! If it be ye can pass beyond the zones of the heavens and the earth, pass ye! not without authority shall ye be able to pass

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: يُرۡسَلُ عَلَيۡكُمَا شُوَاظࣱ مِّن نَّارࣲ وَنُحَاسࣱ فَلَا تَنتَصِرَانِ
verses.translation: On you will be sent (O ye evil ones twain!) a flame of fire (to burn) and a smoke (to choke): no defence will ye have

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: فَإِذَا ٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتۡ وَرۡدَةࣰ كَٱلدِّهَانِ
verses.translation: When the sky is rent asunder, and it becomes red like ointment

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: فَيَوۡمَئِذࣲ لَّا يُسۡـَٔلُ عَن ذَنۢبِهِۦٓ إِنسࣱ وَلَا جَآنࣱّ‏
verses.translation: On that Day no question will be asked of man or Jinn as to his sin

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: يُعۡرَفُ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمُونَ بِسِيمَٰهُمۡ فَيُؤۡخَذُ بِٱلنَّوَٰصِي وَٱلۡأَقۡدَامِ
verses.translation: (For) the sinners will be known by their marks: and they will be seized by their forelocks and their feet

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: هَٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِي يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا ٱلۡمُجۡرِمُونَ
verses.translation: This is the Hell which the Sinners deny

verses.text: يَطُوفُونَ بَيۡنَهَا وَبَيۡنَ حَمِيمٍ ءَانࣲ‏
verses.translation: In its midst and in the midst of boiling hot water will they wander round

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: وَلِمَنۡ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ جَنَّتَانِ
verses.translation: But for such as fear the time when they will stand before (the Judgment Seat of) their Lord, there will be two Gardens

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: ذَوَاتَآ أَفۡنَانࣲ‏
verses.translation: Containing all kinds (of trees and delights)

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: فِيهِمَا عَيۡنَانِ تَجۡرِيَانِ
verses.translation: In them (each) will be two Springs flowing (free)

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: فِيهِمَا مِن كُلِّ فَٰكِهَةࣲ زَوۡجَانِ
verses.translation: In them will be Fruits of every kind, two and two

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ فُرُشِۭ بَطَآئِنُهَا مِنۡ إِسۡتَبۡرَقࣲۚ وَجَنَى ٱلۡجَنَّتَيۡنِ دَانࣲ‏
verses.translation: They will recline on Carpets, whose inner linings will be of rich brocade: the Fruit of the Gardens will be near (and easy of reach)

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: فِيهِنَّ قَٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرۡفِ لَمۡ يَطۡمِثۡهُنَّ إِنسࣱ قَبۡلَهُمۡ وَلَا جَآنࣱّ‏
verses.translation: In them will be (Maidens), chaste, restraining their glances, whom no man or Jinn before them has touched

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: كَأَنَّهُنَّ ٱلۡيَاقُوتُ وَٱلۡمَرۡجَانُ
verses.translation: Like unto Rubies and coral

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: هَلۡ جَزَآءُ ٱلۡإِحۡسَٰنِ إِلَّا ٱلۡإِحۡسَٰنُ
verses.translation: Is there any Reward for Good - other than Good

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: وَمِن دُونِهِمَا جَنَّتَانِ
verses.translation: And besides these two, there are two other Gardens

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: مُدۡهَآمَّتَانِ
verses.translation: Dark-green in colour (from plentiful watering)

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: فِيهِمَا عَيۡنَانِ نَضَّاخَتَانِ
verses.translation: In them (each) will be two Springs pouring forth water in continuous abundance

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: فِيهِمَا فَٰكِهَةࣱ وَنَخۡلࣱ وَرُمَّانࣱ‏
verses.translation: In them will be Fruits, and dates and pomegranates

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: فِيهِنَّ خَيۡرَٰتٌ حِسَانࣱ‏
verses.translation: In them will be fair (Companions), good, beautiful

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: حُورࣱ مَّقۡصُورَٰتࣱ فِي ٱلۡخِيَامِ
verses.translation: Companions restrained (as to their glances), in (goodly) pavilions

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: لَمۡ يَطۡمِثۡهُنَّ إِنسࣱ قَبۡلَهُمۡ وَلَا جَآنࣱّ‏
verses.translation: Whom no man or Jinn before them has touched

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ رَفۡرَفٍ خُضۡرࣲ وَعَبۡقَرِيٍّ حِسَانࣲ‏
verses.translation: Reclining on green Cushions and rich Carpets of beauty

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.translation: Then which of the favours of your Lord will ye deny

verses.text: تَبَٰرَكَ ٱسۡمُ رَبِّكَ ذِي ٱلۡجَلَٰلِ وَٱلۡإِكۡرَامِ
verses.translation: Blessed be the name of thy Lord, full of Majesty, Bounty and Honour

verses.text: إِذَا وَقَعَتِ ٱلۡوَاقِعَةُ
verses.translation: When the Event inevitable cometh to pass

verses.text: لَيۡسَ لِوَقۡعَتِهَا كَاذِبَةٌ
verses.translation: Then will no (soul) entertain falsehood concerning its coming

verses.text: خَافِضَةࣱ رَّافِعَةٌ
verses.translation: (Many) will it bring low; (many) will it exalt

verses.text: إِذَا رُجَّتِ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ رَجࣰّ ا
verses.translation: When the earth shall be shaken to its depths

verses.text: وَبُسَّتِ ٱلۡجِبَالُ بَسࣰّ ا
verses.translation: And the mountains shall be crumbled to atoms

verses.text: فَكَانَتۡ هَبَآءࣰ مُّنۢبَثࣰّ ا
verses.translation: Becoming dust scattered abroad

verses.text: وَكُنتُمۡ أَزۡوَٰجࣰ ا ثَلَٰثَةࣰ‏
verses.translation: And ye shall be sorted out into three classes

verses.text: فَأَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡمَيۡمَنَةِ مَآ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡمَيۡمَنَةِ
verses.translation: Then (there will be) the Companions of the Right Hand;- What will be the Companions of the Right Hand

verses.text: وَأَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡمَشۡـَٔمَةِ مَآ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡمَشۡـَٔمَةِ
verses.translation: And the Companions of the Left Hand,- what will be the Companions of the Left Hand

verses.text: وَٱلسَّٰبِقُونَ ٱلسَّٰبِقُونَ
verses.translation: And those Foremost (in Faith) will be Foremost (in the Hereafter)

verses.text: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ ٱلۡمُقَرَّبُونَ
verses.translation: These will be those Nearest to God

verses.text: فِي جَنَّٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.translation: In Gardens of Bliss

verses.text: ثُلَّةࣱ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.translation: A number of people from those of old

verses.text: وَقَلِيلࣱ مِّنَ ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
verses.translation: And a few from those of later times

verses.text: عَلَىٰ سُرُرࣲ مَّوۡضُونَةࣲ‏
verses.translation: (They will be) on Thrones encrusted (with gold and precious stones)

verses.text: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَيۡهَا مُتَقَٰبِلِينَ
verses.translation: Reclining on them, facing each other

verses.text: يَطُوفُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وِلۡدَٰنࣱ مُّخَلَّدُونَ
verses.translation: Round about them will (serve) youths of perpetual (freshness)

verses.text: بِأَكۡوَابࣲ وَأَبَارِيقَ وَكَأۡسࣲ مِّن مَّعِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: With goblets, (shining) beakers, and cups (filled) out of clear-flowing fountains

verses.text: لَّا يُصَدَّعُونَ عَنۡهَا وَلَا يُنزِفُونَ
verses.translation: No after-ache will they receive therefrom, nor will they suffer intoxication

verses.text: وَفَٰكِهَةࣲ مِّمَّا يَتَخَيَّرُونَ
verses.translation: And with fruits, any that they may select
