verses.translation: It may be, if he divorced you (all), that God will give him in exchange consorts better than you,- who submit (their wills), who believe, who are devout, who turn to God in repentance, who worship (in humility), who travel (for Faith) and fast, - previously married or virgins

verses.text: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ قُوٓاْ أَنفُسَكُمۡ وَأَهۡلِيكُمۡ نَارࣰ ا وَقُودُهَا ٱلنَّاسُ وَٱلۡحِجَارَةُ عَلَيۡهَا مَلَٰٓئِكَةٌ غِلَاظࣱ شِدَادࣱ لَّا يَعۡصُونَ ٱللَّهَ مَآ أَمَرَهُمۡ وَيَفۡعَلُونَ مَا يُؤۡمَرُونَ
verses.translation: O ye who believe! save yourselves and your families from a Fire whose fuel is Men and Stones, over which are (appointed) angels stern (and) severe, who flinch not (from executing) the Commands they receive from God, but do (precisely) what the y are commanded

verses.text: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لَا تَعۡتَذِرُواْ ٱلۡيَوۡمَۖ إِنَّمَا تُجۡزَوۡنَ مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.translation: (They will say), "O ye Unbelievers! Make no excuses this Day! Ye are being but requited for all that ye did

verses.text: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ تُوبُوٓاْ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ تَوۡبَةࣰ نَّصُوحًا عَسَىٰ رَبُّكُمۡ أَن يُكَفِّرَ عَنكُمۡ سَيِّـَٔاتِكُمۡ وَيُدۡخِلَكُمۡ جَنَّٰتࣲ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُ يَوۡمَ لَا يُخۡزِي ٱللَّهُ ٱلنَّبِيَّ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مَعَهُۥۖ نُورُهُمۡ يَسۡعَىٰ بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ وَبِأَيۡمَٰنِهِمۡ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَآ أَتۡمِمۡ لَنَا نُورَنَا وَٱغۡفِرۡ لَنَآۖ إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءࣲ قَدِيرࣱ‏
verses.translation: O ye who believe! Turn to God with sincere repentance: In the hope that your Lord will remove from you your ills and admit you to Gardens beneath which Rivers flow,- the Day that God will not permit to be humiliated the Prophet and those who b elieve with him. Their Light will run forward before them and by their right hands, while they say, "Our Lord! Perfect our Light for us, and grant us Forgiveness: for Thou hast power over all things

verses.text: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِيُّ جَٰهِدِ ٱلۡكُفَّارَ وَٱلۡمُنَٰفِقِينَ وَٱغۡلُظۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡۚ وَمَأۡوَىٰهُمۡ جَهَنَّمُۖ وَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
verses.translation: O Prophet! Strive hard against the Unbelievers and the Hypocrites, and be firm against them. Their abode is Hell,- an evil refuge (indeed)

verses.text: ضَرَبَ ٱللَّهُ مَثَلࣰ ا لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ ٱمۡرَأَتَ نُوحࣲ وَٱمۡرَأَتَ لُوطࣲۖ كَانَتَا تَحۡتَ عَبۡدَيۡنِ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا صَٰلِحَيۡنِ فَخَانَتَاهُمَا فَلَمۡ يُغۡنِيَا عَنۡهُمَا مِنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيۡـࣰٔ ا وَقِيلَ ٱدۡخُلَا ٱلنَّارَ مَعَ ٱلدَّٰخِلِينَ
verses.translation: God sets forth, for an example to the Unbelievers, the wife of Noah and the wife of Lut: they were (respectively) under two of our righteous servants, but they were false to their (husbands), and they profited nothing before God on their accoun t, but were told: "Enter ye the Fire along with (others) that enter

verses.text: وَضَرَبَ ٱللَّهُ مَثَلࣰ ا لِّلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ ٱمۡرَأَتَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ إِذۡ قَالَتۡ رَبِّ ٱبۡنِ لِي عِندَكَ بَيۡتࣰ ا فِي ٱلۡجَنَّةِ وَنَجِّنِي مِن فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَعَمَلِهِۦ وَنَجِّنِي مِنَ ٱلۡقَوۡمِ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
verses.translation: And God sets forth, as an example to those who believe the wife of Pharaoh: Behold she said: "O my Lord! Build for me, in nearness to Thee, a mansion in the Garden, and save me from Pharaoh and his doings, and save me from those that do wrong

verses.text: وَمَرۡيَمَ ٱبۡنَتَ عِمۡرَٰنَ ٱلَّتِيٓ أَحۡصَنَتۡ فَرۡجَهَا فَنَفَخۡنَا فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِنَا وَصَدَّقَتۡ بِكَلِمَٰتِ رَبِّهَا وَكُتُبِهِۦ وَكَانَتۡ مِنَ ٱلۡقَٰنِتِينَ
verses.translation: And Mary the daughter of 'Imran, who guarded her chastity; and We breathed into (her body) of Our spirit; and she testified to the truth of the words of her Lord and of His Revelations, and was one of the devout (servants)

verses.text: تَبَٰرَكَ ٱلَّذِي بِيَدِهِ ٱلۡمُلۡكُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءࣲ قَدِيرٌ
verses.translation: Blessed be He in Whose hands is Dominion; and He over all things hath Power

verses.text: ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ ٱلۡمَوۡتَ وَٱلۡحَيَوٰةَ لِيَبۡلُوَكُمۡ أَيُّكُمۡ أَحۡسَنُ عَمَلࣰ اۚ وَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡغَفُورُ
verses.translation: He Who created Death and Life, that He may try which of you is best in deed: and He is the Exalted in Might, Oft-Forgiving

verses.text: ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ سَبۡعَ سَمَٰوَٰتࣲ طِبَاقࣰ اۖ مَّا تَرَىٰ فِي خَلۡقِ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ مِن تَفَٰوُتࣲۖ فَٱرۡجِعِ ٱلۡبَصَرَ هَلۡ تَرَىٰ مِن فُطُورࣲ‏
verses.translation: He Who created the seven heavens one above another: No want of proportion wilt thou see in the Creation of (God) Most Gracious. So turn thy vision again: seest thou any flaw

verses.text: ثُمَّ ٱرۡجِعِ ٱلۡبَصَرَ كَرَّتَيۡنِ يَنقَلِبۡ إِلَيۡكَ ٱلۡبَصَرُ خَاسِئࣰ ا وَهُوَ حَسِيرࣱ‏
verses.translation: Again turn thy vision a second time: (thy) vision will come back to thee dull and discomfited, in a state worn out

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا بِمَصَٰبِيحَ وَجَعَلۡنَٰهَا رُجُومࣰ ا لِّلشَّيَٰطِينِۖ وَأَعۡتَدۡنَا لَهُمۡ عَذَابَ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.translation: And we have, (from of old), adorned the lowest heaven with Lamps, and We have made such (Lamps) (as) missiles to drive away the Evil Ones, and have prepared for them the Penalty of the Blazing Fire

verses.text: وَلِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِرَبِّهِمۡ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَۖ وَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
verses.translation: For those who reject their Lord (and Cherisher) is the Penalty of Hell: and evil is (such), Destination

verses.text: إِذَآ أُلۡقُواْ فِيهَا سَمِعُواْ لَهَا شَهِيقࣰ ا وَهِيَ تَفُورُ
verses.translation: When they are cast therein, they will hear the (terrible) drawing in of its breath even as it blazes forth

verses.text: تَكَادُ تَمَيَّزُ مِنَ ٱلۡغَيۡظِۖ كُلَّمَآ أُلۡقِيَ فِيهَا فَوۡجࣱ سَأَلَهُمۡ خَزَنَتُهَآ أَلَمۡ يَأۡتِكُمۡ نَذِيرࣱ‏
verses.translation: Almost bursting with fury: Every time a Group is cast therein, its Keepers will ask, "Did no Warner come to you

verses.text: قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ قَدۡ جَآءَنَا نَذِيرࣱ فَكَذَّبۡنَا وَقُلۡنَا مَا نَزَّلَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَيۡءٍ إِنۡ أَنتُمۡ إِلَّا فِي ضَلَٰلࣲ كَبِيرࣲ‏
verses.translation: They will say: "Yes indeed; a Warner did come to us, but we rejected him and said, 'God never sent down any (Message): ye are nothing but an egregious delusion

verses.text: وَقَالُواْ لَوۡ كُنَّا نَسۡمَعُ أَوۡ نَعۡقِلُ مَا كُنَّا فِيٓ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.translation: They will further say: "Had we but listened or used our intelligence, we should not (now) be among the Companions of the Blazing Fire

verses.text: فَٱعۡتَرَفُواْ بِذَنۢبِهِمۡ فَسُحۡقࣰ ا لِّأَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.translation: They will then confess their sins: but far will be (Forgiveness) from the Companions of the Blazing Fire

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخۡشَوۡنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلۡغَيۡبِ لَهُم مَّغۡفِرَةࣱ وَأَجۡرࣱ كَبِيرࣱ‏
verses.translation: As for those who fear their Lord unseen, for them is Forgiveness and a great Reward

verses.text: وَأَسِرُّواْ قَوۡلَكُمۡ أَوِ ٱجۡهَرُواْ بِهِۦٓۖ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمُۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.translation: And whether ye hide your word or publish it, He certainly has (full) knowledge, of the secrets of (all) hearts

verses.text: أَلَا يَعۡلَمُ مَنۡ خَلَقَ وَهُوَ ٱللَّطِيفُ ٱلۡخَبِيرُ
verses.translation: Should He not know,- He that created? and He is the One that understands the finest mysteries (and) is well-acquainted (with them)

verses.text: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ ذَلُولࣰ ا فَٱمۡشُواْ فِي مَنَاكِبِهَا وَكُلُواْ مِن رِّزۡقِهِۦۖ وَإِلَيۡهِ ٱلنُّشُورُ
verses.translation: It is He Who has made the earth manageable for you, so traverse ye through its tracts and enjoy of the Sustenance which He furnishes: but unto Him is the Resurrection

verses.text: ءَأَمِنتُم مَّن فِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يَخۡسِفَ بِكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ فَإِذَا هِيَ تَمُورُ
verses.translation: Do ye feel secure that He Who is in heaven will not cause you to be swallowed up by the earth when it shakes (as in an earthquake)

verses.text: أَمۡ أَمِنتُم مَّن فِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ حَاصِبࣰ اۖ فَسَتَعۡلَمُونَ كَيۡفَ نَذِيرِ
verses.translation: Or do ye feel secure that He Who is in Heaven will not send against you a violent tornado (with showers of stones), so that ye shall know how (terrible) was My warning

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ
verses.translation: But indeed men before them rejected (My warning): then how (terrible) was My rejection (of them)

verses.text: أَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ إِلَى ٱلطَّيۡرِ فَوۡقَهُمۡ صَٰٓفَّٰتࣲ وَيَقۡبِضۡنَۚ مَا يُمۡسِكُهُنَّ إِلَّا ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءِۭ بَصِيرٌ
verses.translation: Do they not observe the birds above them, spreading their wings and folding them in? None can uphold them except (God) Most Gracious: Truly (God) Most Gracious: Truly it is He that watches over all things

verses.text: أَمَّنۡ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي هُوَ جُندࣱ لَّكُمۡ يَنصُرُكُم مِّن دُونِ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِۚ إِنِ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ إِلَّا فِي غُرُورٍ
verses.translation: Nay, who is there that can help you, (even as) an army, besides (God) Most Merciful? In nothing but delusion are the Unbelievers

verses.text: أَمَّنۡ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي يَرۡزُقُكُمۡ إِنۡ أَمۡسَكَ رِزۡقَهُۥۚ بَل لَّجُّواْ فِي عُتُوࣲّ وَنُفُورٍ
verses.translation: Or who is there that can provide you with Sustenance if He were to withhold His provision? Nay, they obstinately persist in insolent impiety and flight (from the Truth)

verses.text: أَفَمَن يَمۡشِي مُكِبًّا عَلَىٰ وَجۡهِهِۦٓ أَهۡدَىٰٓ أَمَّن يَمۡشِي سَوِيًّا عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطࣲ مُّسۡتَقِيمࣲ‏
verses.translation: Is then one who walks headlong, with his face grovelling, better guided,- or one who walks evenly on a Straight Way

verses.text: قُلۡ هُوَ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَنشَأَكُمۡ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمۡعَ وَٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرَ وَٱلۡأَفۡـِٔدَةَۚ قَلِيلࣰ ا مَّا تَشۡكُرُونَ
verses.translation: Say: "It is He Who has created you (and made you grow), and made for you the faculties of hearing, seeing, feeling and understanding: little thanks it is ye give

verses.text: قُلۡ هُوَ ٱلَّذِي ذَرَأَكُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَإِلَيۡهِ تُحۡشَرُونَ
verses.translation: Say: "It is He Who has multiplied you through the earth, and to Him shall ye be gathered together

verses.text: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا ٱلۡوَعۡدُ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.translation: They ask: When will this promise be (fulfilled)? - If ye are telling the truth

verses.text: قُلۡ إِنَّمَا ٱلۡعِلۡمُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَإِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرࣱ مُّبِينࣱ‏
verses.translation: Say: "As to the knowledge of the time, it is with God alone: I am (sent) only to warn plainly in public

verses.text: فَلَمَّا رَأَوۡهُ زُلۡفَةࣰ سِيٓـَٔتۡ وُجُوهُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَقِيلَ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَدَّعُونَ
verses.translation: At length, when they see it close at hand, grieved will be the faces of the Unbelievers, and it will be said (to them): "This is (the promise fulfilled), which ye were calling for

verses.text: قُلۡ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ إِنۡ أَهۡلَكَنِيَ ٱللَّهُ وَمَن مَّعِيَ أَوۡ رَحِمَنَا فَمَن يُجِيرُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ مِنۡ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمࣲ‏
verses.translation: Say: "See ye?- If God were to destroy me, and those with me, or if He bestows His Mercy on us,- yet who can deliver the Unbelievers from a grievous Penalty

verses.text: قُلۡ هُوَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ وَعَلَيۡهِ تَوَكَّلۡنَاۖ فَسَتَعۡلَمُونَ مَنۡ هُوَ فِي ضَلَٰلࣲ مُّبِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: Say: "He is (God) Most Gracious: We have believed in Him, and on Him have we put our trust: So, soon will ye know which (of us) it is that is in manifest error

verses.text: قُلۡ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ إِنۡ أَصۡبَحَ مَآؤُكُمۡ غَوۡرࣰ ا فَمَن يَأۡتِيكُم بِمَآءࣲ مَّعِينِۭ
verses.translation: Say: "See ye?- If your stream be some morning lost (in the underground earth), who then can supply you with clear-flowing water

verses.text: نٓۚ وَٱلۡقَلَمِ وَمَا يَسۡطُرُونَ
verses.translation: Nun. By the Pen and the (Record) which (men) write

verses.text: مَآ أَنتَ بِنِعۡمَةِ رَبِّكَ بِمَجۡنُونࣲ‏
verses.translation: Thou art not, by the Grace of thy Lord, mad or possessed

verses.text: وَإِنَّ لَكَ لَأَجۡرًا غَيۡرَ مَمۡنُونࣲ‏
verses.translation: Nay, verily for thee is a Reward unfailing

verses.text: وَإِنَّكَ لَعَلَىٰ خُلُقٍ عَظِيمࣲ‏
verses.translation: And thou (standest) on an exalted standard of character

verses.text: فَسَتُبۡصِرُ وَيُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.translation: Soon wilt thou see, and they will see

verses.text: بِأَييِّكُمُ ٱلۡمَفۡتُونُ
verses.translation: Which of you is afflicted with madness

verses.text: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِٱلۡمُهۡتَدِينَ
verses.translation: Verily it is thy Lord that knoweth best, which (among men) hath strayed from His Path: and He knoweth best those who receive (true) Guidance

verses.text: فَلَا تُطِعِ ٱلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.translation: So hearken not to those who deny (the Truth)

verses.text: وَدُّواْ لَوۡ تُدۡهِنُ فَيُدۡهِنُونَ
verses.translation: Their desire is that thou shouldst be pliant: so would they be pliant

verses.text: وَلَا تُطِعۡ كُلَّ حَلَّافࣲ مَّهِينٍ
verses.translation: Heed not the type of despicable men,- ready with oaths

verses.text: هَمَّازࣲ مَّشَّآءِۭ بِنَمِيمࣲ‏
verses.translation: A slanderer, going about with calumnies

verses.text: مَّنَّاعࣲ لِّلۡخَيۡرِ مُعۡتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
verses.translation: (Habitually) hindering (all) good, transgressing beyond bounds, deep in sin

verses.text: عُتُلِّۭ بَعۡدَ ذَٰلِكَ زَنِيمٍ
verses.translation: Violent (and cruel),- with all that, base-born

verses.text: أَن كَانَ ذَا مَالࣲ وَبَنِينَ
verses.translation: Because he possesses wealth and (numerous) sons

verses.text: إِذَا تُتۡلَىٰ عَلَيۡهِ ءَايَٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.translation: When to him are rehearsed Our Signs, "Tales of the ancients", he cries

verses.text: سَنَسِمُهُۥ عَلَى ٱلۡخُرۡطُومِ
verses.translation: Soon shall We brand (the beast) on the snout

verses.text: إِنَّا بَلَوۡنَٰهُمۡ كَمَا بَلَوۡنَآ أَصۡحَٰبَ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ إِذۡ أَقۡسَمُواْ لَيَصۡرِمُنَّهَا مُصۡبِحِينَ
verses.translation: Verily We have tried them as We tried the People of the Garden, when they resolved to gather the fruits of the (garden) in the morning

verses.text: وَلَا يَسۡتَثۡنُونَ
verses.translation: But made no reservation, ("If it be God's Will)

verses.text: فَطَافَ عَلَيۡهَا طَآئِفࣱ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمۡ نَآئِمُونَ
verses.translation: Then there came on the (garden) a visitation from thy Lord, (which swept away) all around, while they were asleep

verses.text: فَأَصۡبَحَتۡ كَٱلصَّرِيمِ
verses.translation: So the (garden) became, by the morning, like a dark and desolate spot, (whose fruit had been gathered)

verses.text: فَتَنَادَوۡاْ مُصۡبِحِينَ
verses.translation: As the morning broke, they called out, one to another

verses.text: أَنِ ٱغۡدُواْ عَلَىٰ حَرۡثِكُمۡ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰرِمِينَ
verses.translation: Go ye to your tilth (betimes) in the morning, if ye would gather the fruits

verses.text: فَٱنطَلَقُواْ وَهُمۡ يَتَخَٰفَتُونَ
verses.translation: So they departed, conversing in secret low tones, (saying)

verses.text: أَن لَّا يَدۡخُلَنَّهَا ٱلۡيَوۡمَ عَلَيۡكُم مِّسۡكِينࣱ‏
verses.translation: Let not a single indigent person break in upon you into the (garden) this day

verses.text: وَغَدَوۡاْ عَلَىٰ حَرۡدࣲ قَٰدِرِينَ
verses.translation: And they opened the morning, strong in an (unjust) resolve

verses.text: فَلَمَّا رَأَوۡهَا قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا لَضَآلُّونَ
verses.translation: But when they saw the (garden), they said: "We have surely lost our way

verses.text: بَلۡ نَحۡنُ مَحۡرُومُونَ
verses.translation: Indeed we are shut out (of the fruits of our labour)

verses.text: قَالَ أَوۡسَطُهُمۡ أَلَمۡ أَقُل لَّكُمۡ لَوۡلَا تُسَبِّحُونَ
verses.translation: Said one of them, more just (than the rest): "Did I not say to you, 'Why not glorify (God)

verses.text: قَالُواْ سُبۡحَٰنَ رَبِّنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَٰلِمِينَ
verses.translation: They said: "Glory to our Lord! Verily we have been doing wrong

verses.text: فَأَقۡبَلَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضࣲ يَتَلَٰوَمُونَ
verses.translation: Then they turned, one against another, in reproach

verses.text: قَالُواْ يَٰوَيۡلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا طَٰغِينَ
verses.translation: They said: "Alas for us! We have indeed transgressed

verses.text: عَسَىٰ رَبُّنَآ أَن يُبۡدِلَنَا خَيۡرࣰ ا مِّنۡهَآ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا رَٰغِبُونَ
verses.translation: It may be that our Lord will give us in exchange a better (garden) than this: for we do turn to Him (in repentance)

verses.text: كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡعَذَابُۖ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ أَكۡبَرُۚ لَوۡ كَانُواْ يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: Such is the Punishment (in this life); but greater is the Punishment in the Hereafter,- if only they knew

verses.text: إِنَّ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمۡ جَنَّٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.translation: Verily, for the Righteous, are Gardens of Delight, in the Presence of their Lord

verses.text: أَفَنَجۡعَلُ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِينَ كَٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
verses.translation: Shall We then treat the People of Faith like the People of Sin

verses.text: مَا لَكُمۡ كَيۡفَ تَحۡكُمُونَ
verses.translation: What is the matter with you? How judge ye

verses.text: أَمۡ لَكُمۡ كِتَٰبࣱ فِيهِ تَدۡرُسُونَ
verses.translation: Or have ye a book through which ye learn

verses.text: إِنَّ لَكُمۡ فِيهِ لَمَا تَخَيَّرُونَ
verses.translation: That ye shall have, through it whatever ye choose

verses.text: أَمۡ لَكُمۡ أَيۡمَٰنٌ عَلَيۡنَا بَٰلِغَةٌ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ إِنَّ لَكُمۡ لَمَا تَحۡكُمُونَ
verses.translation: Or have ye Covenants with Us to oath, reaching to the Day of Judgment, (providing) that ye shall have whatever ye shall demand

verses.text: سَلۡهُمۡ أَيُّهُم بِذَٰلِكَ زَعِيمٌ
verses.translation: Ask thou of them, which of them will stand surety for that

verses.text: أَمۡ لَهُمۡ شُرَكَآءُ فَلۡيَأۡتُواْ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمۡ إِن كَانُواْ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.translation: Or have they some "Partners" (in Godhead)? Then let them produce their "partners", if they are truthful

verses.text: يَوۡمَ يُكۡشَفُ عَن سَاقࣲ وَيُدۡعَوۡنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ فَلَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ
verses.translation: The Day that the shin shall be laid bare, and they shall be summoned to bow in adoration, but they shall not be able

verses.text: خَٰشِعَةً أَبۡصَٰرُهُمۡ تَرۡهَقُهُمۡ ذِلَّةࣱۖ وَقَدۡ كَانُواْ يُدۡعَوۡنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ وَهُمۡ سَٰلِمُونَ
verses.translation: Their eyes will be cast down,- ignominy will cover them; seeing that they had been summoned aforetime to bow in adoration, while they were whole, (and had refused)

verses.text: فَذَرۡنِي وَمَن يُكَذِّبُ بِهَٰذَا ٱلۡحَدِيثِۖ سَنَسۡتَدۡرِجُهُم مِّنۡ حَيۡثُ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: Then leave Me alone with such as reject this Message: by degrees shall We punish them from directions they perceive not

verses.text: وَأُمۡلِي لَهُمۡۚ إِنَّ كَيۡدِي مَتِينٌ
verses.translation: A (long) respite will I grant them: truly powerful is My Plan

verses.text: أَمۡ تَسۡـَٔلُهُمۡ أَجۡرࣰ ا فَهُم مِّن مَّغۡرَمࣲ مُّثۡقَلُونَ
verses.translation: Or is it that thou dost ask them for a reward, so that they are burdened with a load of debt

verses.text: أَمۡ عِندَهُمُ ٱلۡغَيۡبُ فَهُمۡ يَكۡتُبُونَ
verses.translation: Or that the Unseen is in their hands, so that they can write it down

verses.text: فَٱصۡبِرۡ لِحُكۡمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تَكُن كَصَاحِبِ ٱلۡحُوتِ إِذۡ نَادَىٰ وَهُوَ مَكۡظُومࣱ‏
verses.translation: So wait with patience for the Command of thy Lord, and be not like the Companion of the Fish,- when he cried out in agony

verses.text: لَّوۡلَآ أَن تَدَٰرَكَهُۥ نِعۡمَةࣱ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ لَنُبِذَ بِٱلۡعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ مَذۡمُومࣱ‏
verses.translation: Had not Grace from his Lord reached him, he would indeed have been cast off on the naked shore, in disgrace

verses.text: فَٱجۡتَبَٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَجَعَلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰلِحِينَ
verses.translation: Thus did his Lord choose him and make him of the Company of the Righteous

verses.text: وَإِن يَكَادُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لَيُزۡلِقُونَكَ بِأَبۡصَٰرِهِمۡ لَمَّا سَمِعُواْ ٱلذِّكۡرَ وَيَقُولُونَ إِنَّهُۥ لَمَجۡنُونࣱ‏
verses.translation: And the Unbelievers would almost trip thee up with their eyes when they hear the Message; and they say: "Surely he is possessed

verses.text: وَمَا هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكۡرࣱ لِّلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translation: But it is nothing less than a Message to all the worlds

verses.text: ٱلۡحَآقَّةُ
verses.translation: The Sure Reality

verses.text: مَا ٱلۡحَآقَّةُ
verses.translation: What is the Sure Reality

verses.text: وَمَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلۡحَآقَّةُ
verses.translation: And what will make thee realise what the Sure Reality is

verses.text: كَذَّبَتۡ ثَمُودُ وَعَادُۢ بِٱلۡقَارِعَةِ
verses.translation: The Thamud and the 'Ad People (branded) as false the Stunning Calamity

verses.text: فَأَمَّا ثَمُودُ فَأُهۡلِكُواْ بِٱلطَّاغِيَةِ
verses.translation: But the Thamud,- they were destroyed by a terrible Storm of thunder and lightning

verses.text: وَأَمَّا عَادࣱ فَأُهۡلِكُواْ بِرِيحࣲ صَرۡصَرٍ عَاتِيَةࣲ‏
verses.translation: And the 'Ad, they were destroyed by a furious Wind, exceedingly violent

verses.text: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ سَبۡعَ لَيَالࣲ وَثَمَٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومࣰ اۖ فَتَرَى ٱلۡقَوۡمَ فِيهَا صَرۡعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمۡ أَعۡجَازُ نَخۡلٍ خَاوِيَةࣲ‏
verses.translation: He made it rage against them seven nights and eight days in succession: so that thou couldst see the (whole) people lying prostrate in its (path), as they had been roots of hollow palm-trees tumbled down

verses.text: فَهَلۡ تَرَىٰ لَهُم مِّنۢ بَاقِيَةࣲ‏
verses.translation: Then seest thou any of them left surviving

verses.text: وَجَآءَ فِرۡعَوۡنُ وَمَن قَبۡلَهُۥ وَٱلۡمُؤۡتَفِكَٰتُ بِٱلۡخَاطِئَةِ
verses.translation: And Pharaoh, and those before him, and the Cities Overthrown, committed habitual Sin

verses.text: فَعَصَوۡاْ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمۡ فَأَخَذَهُمۡ أَخۡذَةࣰ رَّابِيَةً
verses.translation: And disobeyed (each) the apostle of their Lord; so He punished them with an abundant Penalty

verses.text: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلۡمَآءُ حَمَلۡنَٰكُمۡ فِي ٱلۡجَارِيَةِ
verses.translation: We, when the water (of Noah's Flood) overflowed beyond its limits, carried you (mankind), in the floating (Ark)

verses.text: لِنَجۡعَلَهَا لَكُمۡ تَذۡكِرَةࣰ وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنࣱ وَٰعِيَةࣱ‏
verses.translation: That We might make it a Message unto you, and that ears (that should hear the tale and) retain its memory should bear its (lessons) in remembrance

verses.text: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِي ٱلصُّورِ نَفۡخَةࣱ وَٰحِدَةࣱ‏
verses.translation: Then, when one blast is sounded on the Trumpet

verses.text: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَٱلۡجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةࣰ وَٰحِدَةࣰ‏
verses.translation: And the earth is moved, and its mountains, and they are crushed to powder at one stroke

verses.text: فَيَوۡمَئِذࣲ وَقَعَتِ ٱلۡوَاقِعَةُ
verses.translation: On that Day shall the (Great) Event come to pass

verses.text: وَٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَهِيَ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ وَاهِيَةࣱ‏
verses.translation: And the sky will be rent asunder, for it will that Day be flimsy

verses.text: وَٱلۡمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرۡجَآئِهَاۚ وَيَحۡمِلُ عَرۡشَ رَبِّكَ فَوۡقَهُمۡ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ ثَمَٰنِيَةࣱ‏
verses.translation: And the angels will be on its sides, and eight will, that Day, bear the Throne of thy Lord above them

verses.text: يَوۡمَئِذࣲ تُعۡرَضُونَ لَا تَخۡفَىٰ مِنكُمۡ خَافِيَةࣱ‏
verses.translation: That Day shall ye be brought to Judgment: not an act of yours that ye hide will be hidden

verses.text: فَأَمَّا مَنۡ أُوتِيَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقۡرَءُواْ كِتَٰبِيَهۡ
verses.translation: Then he that will be given his Record in his right hand will say: "Ah here! Read ye my Record

verses.text: إِنِّي ظَنَنتُ أَنِّي مُلَٰقٍ حِسَابِيَهۡ
verses.translation: I did really understand that my Account would (One Day) reach me

verses.text: فَهُوَ فِي عِيشَةࣲ رَّاضِيَةࣲ‏
verses.translation: And he will be in a life of Bliss

verses.text: فِي جَنَّةٍ عَالِيَةࣲ‏
verses.translation: In a Garden on high

verses.text: قُطُوفُهَا دَانِيَةࣱ‏
verses.translation: The Fruits whereof (will hang in bunches) low and near

verses.text: كُلُواْ وَٱشۡرَبُواْ هَنِيٓـَٔۢا بِمَآ أَسۡلَفۡتُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَيَّامِ ٱلۡخَالِيَةِ
verses.translation: Eat ye and drink ye, with full satisfaction; because of the (good) that ye sent before you, in the days that are gone

verses.text: وَأَمَّا مَنۡ أُوتِيَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يَٰلَيۡتَنِي لَمۡ أُوتَ كِتَٰبِيَهۡ
verses.translation: And he that will be given his Record in his left hand, will say: "Ah! Would that my Record had not been given to me

verses.text: وَلَمۡ أَدۡرِ مَا حِسَابِيَهۡ
verses.translation: And that I had never realised how my account (stood)

verses.text: يَٰلَيۡتَهَا كَانَتِ ٱلۡقَاضِيَةَ
verses.translation: Ah! Would that (Death) had made an end of me

verses.text: مَآ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنِّي مَالِيَهۡۜ
verses.translation: Of no profit to me has been my wealth

verses.text: هَلَكَ عَنِّي سُلۡطَٰنِيَهۡ
verses.translation: My power has perished from me

verses.text: خُذُوهُ فَغُلُّوهُ
verses.translation: (The stern command will say): "Seize ye him, and bind ye him

verses.text: ثُمَّ ٱلۡجَحِيمَ صَلُّوهُ
verses.translation: And burn ye him in the Blazing Fire

verses.text: ثُمَّ فِي سِلۡسِلَةࣲ ذَرۡعُهَا سَبۡعُونَ ذِرَاعࣰ ا فَٱسۡلُكُوهُ
verses.translation: Further, make him march in a chain, whereof the length is seventy cubits

verses.text: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.translation: This was he that would not believe in God Most High

verses.text: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلۡمِسۡكِينِ
verses.translation: And would not encourage the feeding of the indigent

verses.text: فَلَيۡسَ لَهُ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ هَٰهُنَا حَمِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: So no friend hath he here this Day

verses.text: وَلَا طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِنۡ غِسۡلِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: Nor hath he any food except the corruption from the washing of wounds

verses.text: لَّا يَأۡكُلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلۡخَٰطِـُٔونَ
verses.translation: Which none do eat but those in sin

verses.text: فَلَآ أُقۡسِمُ بِمَا تُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.translation: So I do call to witness what ye see

verses.text: وَمَا لَا تُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.translation: And what ye see not

verses.text: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوۡلُ رَسُولࣲ كَرِيمࣲ‏
verses.translation: That this is verily the word of an honoured apostle

verses.text: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوۡلِ شَاعِرࣲۚ قَلِيلࣰ ا مَّا تُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.translation: It is not the word of a poet: little it is ye believe

verses.text: وَلَا بِقَوۡلِ كَاهِنࣲۚ قَلِيلࣰ ا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.translation: Nor is it the word of a soothsayer: little admonition it is ye receive

verses.text: تَنزِيلࣱ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translation: (This is) a Message sent down from the Lord of the Worlds

verses.text: وَلَوۡ تَقَوَّلَ عَلَيۡنَا بَعۡضَ ٱلۡأَقَاوِيلِ
verses.translation: And if the apostle were to invent any sayings in Our name

verses.text: لَأَخَذۡنَا مِنۡهُ بِٱلۡيَمِينِ
verses.translation: We should certainly seize him by his right hand

verses.text: ثُمَّ لَقَطَعۡنَا مِنۡهُ ٱلۡوَتِينَ
verses.translation: And We should certainly then cut off the artery of his heart

verses.text: فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنۡ أَحَدٍ عَنۡهُ حَٰجِزِينَ
verses.translation: Nor could any of you withhold him (from Our wrath)

verses.text: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَتَذۡكِرَةࣱ لِّلۡمُتَّقِينَ
verses.translation: But verily this is a Message for the God-fearing

verses.text: وَإِنَّا لَنَعۡلَمُ أَنَّ مِنكُم مُّكَذِّبِينَ
verses.translation: And We certainly know that there are amongst you those that reject (it)

verses.text: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَحَسۡرَةٌ عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.translation: But truly (Revelation) is a cause of sorrow for the Unbelievers

verses.text: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَحَقُّ ٱلۡيَقِينِ
verses.translation: But verily it is Truth of assured certainty

verses.text: فَسَبِّحۡ بِٱسۡمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.translation: So glorify the name of thy Lord Most High

verses.text: سَأَلَ سَآئِلُۢ بِعَذَابࣲ وَاقِعࣲ‏
verses.translation: A questioner asked about a Penalty to befall

verses.text: لِّلۡكَٰفِرِينَ لَيۡسَ لَهُۥ دَافِعࣱ‏
verses.translation: The Unbelievers, the which there is none to ward off

verses.text: مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ ذِي ٱلۡمَعَارِجِ
verses.translation: (A Penalty) from God, Lord of the Ways of Ascent

verses.text: تَعۡرُجُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ إِلَيۡهِ فِي يَوۡمࣲ كَانَ مِقۡدَارُهُۥ خَمۡسِينَ أَلۡفَ سَنَةࣲ‏
verses.translation: The angels and the spirit ascend unto him in a Day the measure whereof is (as) fifty thousand years

verses.text: فَٱصۡبِرۡ صَبۡرࣰ ا جَمِيلًا
verses.translation: Therefore do thou hold Patience,- a Patience of beautiful (contentment)

verses.text: إِنَّهُمۡ يَرَوۡنَهُۥ بَعِيدࣰ ا
verses.translation: They see the (Day) indeed as a far-off (event)

verses.text: وَنَرَىٰهُ قَرِيبࣰ ا
verses.translation: But We see it (quite) near

verses.text: يَوۡمَ تَكُونُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ كَٱلۡمُهۡلِ
verses.translation: The Day that the sky will be like molten brass

verses.text: وَتَكُونُ ٱلۡجِبَالُ كَٱلۡعِهۡنِ
verses.translation: And the mountains will be like wool

verses.text: وَلَا يَسۡـَٔلُ حَمِيمٌ حَمِيمࣰ ا
verses.translation: And no friend will ask after a friend

verses.text: يُبَصَّرُونَهُمۡۚ يَوَدُّ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمُ لَوۡ يَفۡتَدِي مِنۡ عَذَابِ يَوۡمِئِذِۭ بِبَنِيهِ
verses.translation: Though they will be put in sight of each other,- the sinner's desire will be: Would that he could redeem himself from the Penalty of that Day by (sacrificing) his children

verses.text: وَصَٰحِبَتِهِۦ وَأَخِيهِ
verses.translation: His wife and his brother

verses.text: وَفَصِيلَتِهِ ٱلَّتِي تُـٔۡوِيهِ
verses.translation: His kindred who sheltered him

verses.text: وَمَن فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ جَمِيعࣰ ا ثُمَّ يُنجِيهِ
verses.translation: And all, all that is on earth,- so it could deliver him

verses.text: كَلَّآۖ إِنَّهَا لَظَىٰ
verses.translation: By no means! for it would be the Fire of Hell

verses.text: نَزَّاعَةࣰ لِّلشَّوَىٰ
verses.translation: Plucking out (his being) right to the skull

verses.text: تَدۡعُواْ مَنۡ أَدۡبَرَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
verses.translation: Inviting (all) such as turn their backs and turn away their faces (from the Right)

verses.text: وَجَمَعَ فَأَوۡعَىٰٓ
verses.translation: And collect (wealth) and hide it (from use)

verses.text: ۞إِنَّ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ خُلِقَ هَلُوعًا
verses.translation: Truly man was created very impatient

verses.text: إِذَا مَسَّهُ ٱلشَّرُّ جَزُوعࣰ ا
verses.translation: Fretful when evil touches him

verses.text: وَإِذَا مَسَّهُ ٱلۡخَيۡرُ مَنُوعًا
verses.translation: And niggardly when good reaches him

verses.text: إِلَّا ٱلۡمُصَلِّينَ
verses.translation: Not so those devoted to Prayer

verses.text: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمۡ دَآئِمُونَ
verses.translation: Those who remain steadfast to their prayer

verses.text: وَٱلَّذِينَ فِيٓ أَمۡوَٰلِهِمۡ حَقࣱّ مَّعۡلُومࣱ‏
verses.translation: And those in whose wealth is a recognised right

verses.text: لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلۡمَحۡرُومِ
verses.translation: For the (needy) who asks and him who is prevented (for some reason from asking)

verses.text: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُصَدِّقُونَ بِيَوۡمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.translation: And those who hold to the truth of the Day of Judgment

verses.text: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنۡ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِم مُّشۡفِقُونَ
verses.translation: And those who fear the displeasure of their Lord

verses.text: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّهِمۡ غَيۡرُ مَأۡمُونࣲ‏
verses.translation: For their Lord's displeasure is the opposite of Peace and Tranquillity

verses.text: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ لِفُرُوجِهِمۡ حَٰفِظُونَ
verses.translation: And those who guard their chastity

verses.text: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزۡوَٰجِهِمۡ أَوۡ مَا مَلَكَتۡ أَيۡمَٰنُهُمۡ فَإِنَّهُمۡ غَيۡرُ مَلُومِينَ
verses.translation: Except with their wives and the (captives) whom their right hands possess,- for (then) they are not to be blamed

verses.text: فَمَنِ ٱبۡتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡعَادُونَ
verses.translation: But those who trespass beyond this are transgressors

verses.text: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ لِأَمَٰنَٰتِهِمۡ وَعَهۡدِهِمۡ رَٰعُونَ
verses.translation: And those who respect their trusts and covenants

verses.text: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِشَهَٰدَٰتِهِمۡ قَآئِمُونَ
verses.translation: And those who stand firm in their testimonies

verses.text: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمۡ يُحَافِظُونَ
verses.translation: And those who guard (the sacredness) of their worship

verses.text: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ فِي جَنَّٰتࣲ مُّكۡرَمُونَ
verses.translation: Such will be the honoured ones in the Gardens (of Bliss)

verses.text: فَمَالِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ قِبَلَكَ مُهۡطِعِينَ
verses.translation: Now what is the matter with the Unbelievers that they rush madly before thee

verses.text: عَنِ ٱلۡيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ عِزِينَ
verses.translation: From the right and from the left, in crowds

verses.text: أَيَطۡمَعُ كُلُّ ٱمۡرِيࣲٕ مِّنۡهُمۡ أَن يُدۡخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيمࣲ‏
verses.translation: Does every man of them long to enter the Garden of Bliss

verses.text: كَلَّآۖ إِنَّا خَلَقۡنَٰهُم مِّمَّا يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: By no means! For We have created them out of the (base matter) they know

verses.text: فَلَآ أُقۡسِمُ بِرَبِّ ٱلۡمَشَٰرِقِ وَٱلۡمَغَٰرِبِ إِنَّا لَقَٰدِرُونَ
verses.translation: Now I do call to witness the Lord of all points in the East and the West that We can certainly

verses.text: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ خَيۡرࣰ ا مِّنۡهُمۡ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَسۡبُوقِينَ
verses.translation: Substitute for them better (men) than they; And We are not to be defeated (in Our Plan)

verses.text: فَذَرۡهُمۡ يَخُوضُواْ وَيَلۡعَبُواْ حَتَّىٰ يُلَٰقُواْ يَوۡمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِي يُوعَدُونَ
verses.translation: So leave them to plunge in vain talk and play about, until they encounter that Day of theirs which they have been promised

verses.text: يَوۡمَ يَخۡرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡأَجۡدَاثِ سِرَاعࣰ ا كَأَنَّهُمۡ إِلَىٰ نُصُبࣲ يُوفِضُونَ
verses.translation: The Day whereon they will issue from their sepulchres in sudden haste as if they were rushing to a goal-post (fixed for them)

verses.text: خَٰشِعَةً أَبۡصَٰرُهُمۡ تَرۡهَقُهُمۡ ذِلَّةࣱۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمُ ٱلَّذِي كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ
verses.translation: Their eyes lowered in dejection,- ignominy covering them (all over)! such is the Day the which they are promised

verses.text: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوۡمِهِۦٓ أَنۡ أَنذِرۡ قَوۡمَكَ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن يَأۡتِيَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمࣱ‏
verses.translation: We sent Noah to his People (with the Command): "Do thou warn thy People before there comes to them a grievous Penalty

verses.text: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ إِنِّي لَكُمۡ نَذِيرࣱ مُّبِينٌ
verses.translation: He said: "O my People! I am to you a Warner, clear and open

verses.text: أَنِ ٱعۡبُدُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَٱتَّقُوهُ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.translation: That ye should worship God, fear Him and obey me

verses.text: يَغۡفِرۡ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمۡ وَيُؤَخِّرۡكُمۡ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلࣲ مُّسَمًّىۚ إِنَّ أَجَلَ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُۚ لَوۡ كُنتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: So He may forgive you your sins and give you respite for a stated Term: for when the Term given by God is accomplished, it cannot be put forward: if ye only knew

verses.text: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّي دَعَوۡتُ قَوۡمِي لَيۡلࣰ ا وَنَهَارࣰ ا
verses.translation: He said: "O my Lord! I have called to my People night and day

verses.text: فَلَمۡ يَزِدۡهُمۡ دُعَآءِيٓ إِلَّا فِرَارࣰ ا
verses.translation: But my call only increases (their) flight (from the Right)

verses.text: وَإِنِّي كُلَّمَا دَعَوۡتُهُمۡ لِتَغۡفِرَ لَهُمۡ جَعَلُوٓاْ أَصَٰبِعَهُمۡ فِيٓ ءَاذَانِهِمۡ وَٱسۡتَغۡشَوۡاْ ثِيَابَهُمۡ وَأَصَرُّواْ وَٱسۡتَكۡبَرُواْ ٱسۡتِكۡبَارࣰ ا
verses.translation: And every time I have called to them, that Thou mightest forgive them, they have (only) thrust their fingers into their ears, covered themselves up with their garments, grown obstinate, and given themselves up to arrogance

verses.text: ثُمَّ إِنِّي دَعَوۡتُهُمۡ جِهَارࣰ ا
verses.translation: So I have called to them aloud

verses.text: ثُمَّ إِنِّيٓ أَعۡلَنتُ لَهُمۡ وَأَسۡرَرۡتُ لَهُمۡ إِسۡرَارࣰ ا
verses.translation: Further I have spoken to them in public and secretly in private

verses.text: فَقُلۡتُ ٱسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ رَبَّكُمۡ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفَّارࣰ ا
verses.translation: Saying, 'Ask forgiveness from your Lord; for He is Oft-Forgiving

verses.text: يُرۡسِلِ ٱلسَّمَآءَ عَلَيۡكُم مِّدۡرَارࣰ ا
verses.translation: He will send rain to you in abundance

verses.text: وَيُمۡدِدۡكُم بِأَمۡوَٰلࣲ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجۡعَل لَّكُمۡ جَنَّٰتࣲ وَيَجۡعَل لَّكُمۡ أَنۡهَٰرࣰ ا
verses.translation: Give you increase in wealth and sons; and bestow on you gardens and bestow on you rivers (of flowing water)

verses.text: مَّا لَكُمۡ لَا تَرۡجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارࣰ ا
verses.translation: What is the matter with you, that ye place not your hope for kindness and long-suffering in God

verses.text: وَقَدۡ خَلَقَكُمۡ أَطۡوَارًا
verses.translation: Seeing that it is He that has created you in diverse stages

verses.text: أَلَمۡ تَرَوۡاْ كَيۡفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبۡعَ سَمَٰوَٰتࣲ طِبَاقࣰ ا
verses.translation: See ye not how God has created the seven heavens one above another

verses.text: وَجَعَلَ ٱلۡقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورࣰ ا وَجَعَلَ ٱلشَّمۡسَ سِرَاجࣰ ا
verses.translation: And made the moon a light in their midst, and made the sun as a (Glorious) Lamp

verses.text: وَٱللَّهُ أَنۢبَتَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ نَبَاتࣰ ا
verses.translation: And God has produced you from the earth growing (gradually)

verses.text: ثُمَّ يُعِيدُكُمۡ فِيهَا وَيُخۡرِجُكُمۡ إِخۡرَاجࣰ ا
verses.translation: And in the End He will return you into the (earth), and raise you forth (again at the Resurrection)

verses.text: وَٱللَّهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بِسَاطࣰ ا
verses.translation: And God has made the earth for you as a carpet (spread out)

verses.text: لِّتَسۡلُكُواْ مِنۡهَا سُبُلࣰ ا فِجَاجࣰ ا
verses.translation: That ye may go about therein, in spacious roads

verses.text: قَالَ نُوحࣱ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمۡ عَصَوۡنِي وَٱتَّبَعُواْ مَن لَّمۡ يَزِدۡهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارࣰ ا
verses.translation: Noah said: "O my Lord! They have disobeyed me, but they follow (men) whose wealth and children give them no increase but only Loss

verses.text: وَمَكَرُواْ مَكۡرࣰ ا كُبَّارࣰ ا
verses.translation: And they have devised a tremendous Plot

verses.text: وَقَالُواْ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمۡ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدࣰّ ا وَلَا سُوَاعࣰ ا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسۡرࣰ ا
verses.translation: And they have said (to each other), 'Abandon not your gods: Abandon neither Wadd nor Suwa', neither Yaguth nor Ya'uq, nor Nasr

verses.text: وَقَدۡ أَضَلُّواْ كَثِيرࣰ اۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَٰلࣰ ا
verses.translation: They have already misled many; and grant Thou no increase to the wrong- doers but in straying (from their mark)

verses.text: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـَٰٔتِهِمۡ أُغۡرِقُواْ فَأُدۡخِلُواْ نَارࣰ ا فَلَمۡ يَجِدُواْ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارࣰ ا
verses.translation: Because of their sins they were drowned (in the flood), and were made to enter the Fire (of Punishment): and they found- in lieu of God- none to help them

verses.text: وَقَالَ نُوحࣱ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرۡ عَلَى ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مِنَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
verses.translation: And Noah, said: "O my Lord! Leave not of the Unbelievers, a single one on earth

verses.text: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرۡهُمۡ يُضِلُّواْ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓاْ إِلَّا فَاجِرࣰ ا كَفَّارࣰ ا
verses.translation: For, if Thou dost leave (any of) them, they will but mislead Thy devotees, and they will breed none but wicked ungrateful ones

verses.text: رَّبِّ ٱغۡفِرۡ لِي وَلِوَٰلِدَيَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيۡتِيَ مُؤۡمِنࣰ ا وَلِلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَٰتِۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارَۢا
verses.translation: O my Lord! Forgive me, my parents, all who enter my house in Faith, and (all) believing men and believing women: and to the wrong-doers grant Thou no increase but in perdition

verses.text: قُلۡ أُوحِيَ إِلَيَّ أَنَّهُ ٱسۡتَمَعَ نَفَرࣱ مِّنَ ٱلۡجِنِّ فَقَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا سَمِعۡنَا قُرۡءَانًا عَجَبࣰ ا
verses.translation: Say: It has been revealed to me that a company of Jinns listened (to the Qur'an). They said, 'We have really heard a wonderful Recital

verses.text: يَهۡدِيٓ إِلَى ٱلرُّشۡدِ فَـَٔامَنَّا بِهِۦۖ وَلَن نُّشۡرِكَ بِرَبِّنَآ أَحَدࣰ ا
verses.translation: It gives guidance to the Right, and we have believed therein: we shall not join (in worship) any (gods) with our Lord

verses.text: وَأَنَّهُۥ تَعَٰلَىٰ جَدُّ رَبِّنَا مَا ٱتَّخَذَ صَٰحِبَةࣰ وَلَا وَلَدࣰ ا
verses.translation: And Exalted is the Majesty of our Lord: He has taken neither a wife nor a son

verses.text: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ يَقُولُ سَفِيهُنَا عَلَى ٱللَّهِ شَطَطࣰ ا
verses.translation: There were some foolish ones among us, who used to utter extravagant lies against God

verses.text: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن تَقُولَ ٱلۡإِنسُ وَٱلۡجِنُّ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبࣰ ا
verses.translation: But we do think that no man or spirit should say aught that untrue against God

verses.text: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ رِجَالࣱ مِّنَ ٱلۡإِنسِ يَعُوذُونَ بِرِجَالࣲ مِّنَ ٱلۡجِنِّ فَزَادُوهُمۡ رَهَقࣰ ا
verses.translation: True, there were persons among mankind who took shelter with persons among the Jinns, but they increased them in folly

verses.text: وَأَنَّهُمۡ ظَنُّواْ كَمَا ظَنَنتُمۡ أَن لَّن يَبۡعَثَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدࣰ ا
verses.translation: And they (came to) think as ye thought, that God would not raise up any one (to Judgment)

verses.text: وَأَنَّا لَمَسۡنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ فَوَجَدۡنَٰهَا مُلِئَتۡ حَرَسࣰ ا شَدِيدࣰ ا وَشُهُبࣰ ا
verses.translation: And we pried into the secrets of heaven; but we found it filled with stern guards and flaming fires

verses.text: وَأَنَّا كُنَّا نَقۡعُدُ مِنۡهَا مَقَٰعِدَ لِلسَّمۡعِۖ فَمَن يَسۡتَمِعِ ٱلۡأٓنَ يَجِدۡ لَهُۥ شِهَابࣰ ا رَّصَدࣰ ا
verses.translation: We used, indeed, to sit there in (hidden) stations, to (steal) a hearing; but any who listen now will find a flaming fire watching him in ambush

verses.text: وَأَنَّا لَا نَدۡرِيٓ أَشَرٌّ أُرِيدَ بِمَن فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ أَمۡ أَرَادَ بِهِمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ رَشَدࣰ ا
verses.translation: And we understand not whether ill is intended to those on earth, or whether their Lord (really) intends to guide them to right conduct

verses.text: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلصَّٰلِحُونَ وَمِنَّا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَۖ كُنَّا طَرَآئِقَ قِدَدࣰ ا
verses.translation: There are among us some that are righteous, and some the contrary: we follow divergent paths

verses.text: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن نُّعۡجِزَ ٱللَّهَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَن نُّعۡجِزَهُۥ هَرَبࣰ ا
verses.translation: But we think that we can by no means frustrate God throughout the earth, nor can we frustrate Him by flight

verses.text: وَأَنَّا لَمَّا سَمِعۡنَا ٱلۡهُدَىٰٓ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦۖ فَمَن يُؤۡمِنۢ بِرَبِّهِۦ فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخۡسࣰ ا وَلَا رَهَقࣰ ا
verses.translation: And as for us, since we have listened to the Guidance, we have accepted it: and any who believes in his Lord has no fear, either of a short (account) or of any injustice

verses.text: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلۡمُسۡلِمُونَ وَمِنَّا ٱلۡقَٰسِطُونَۖ فَمَنۡ أَسۡلَمَ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ تَحَرَّوۡاْ رَشَدࣰ ا
verses.translation: Amongst us are some that submit their wills (to God), and some that swerve from justice. Now those who submit their wills - they have sought out (the path) of right conduct

verses.text: وَأَمَّا ٱلۡقَٰسِطُونَ فَكَانُواْ لِجَهَنَّمَ حَطَبࣰ ا
verses.translation: But those who swerve,- they are (but) fuel for Hell-fire

verses.text: وَأَلَّوِ ٱسۡتَقَٰمُواْ عَلَى ٱلطَّرِيقَةِ لَأَسۡقَيۡنَٰهُم مَّآءً غَدَقࣰ ا
verses.translation: (And God's Message is): "If they (the Pagans) had (only) remained on the (right) Way, We should certainly have bestowed on them Rain in abundance

verses.text: لِّنَفۡتِنَهُمۡ فِيهِۚ وَمَن يُعۡرِضۡ عَن ذِكۡرِ رَبِّهِۦ يَسۡلُكۡهُ عَذَابࣰ ا صَعَدࣰ ا
verses.translation: That We might try them by that (means). But if any turns away from the remembrance of his Lord, He will cause him to undergo a severe Penalty

verses.text: وَأَنَّ ٱلۡمَسَٰجِدَ لِلَّهِ فَلَا تَدۡعُواْ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدࣰ ا
verses.translation: And the places of worship are for God (alone): So invoke not any one along with God

verses.text: وَأَنَّهُۥ لَمَّا قَامَ عَبۡدُ ٱللَّهِ يَدۡعُوهُ كَادُواْ يَكُونُونَ عَلَيۡهِ لِبَدࣰ ا
verses.translation: Yet when the Devotee of God stands forth to invoke Him, they just make round him a dense crowd

verses.text: قُلۡ إِنَّمَآ أَدۡعُواْ رَبِّي وَلَآ أُشۡرِكُ بِهِۦٓ أَحَدࣰ ا
verses.translation: Say: "I do no more than invoke my Lord, and I join not with Him any (false god)

verses.text: قُلۡ إِنِّي لَآ أَمۡلِكُ لَكُمۡ ضَرࣰّ ا وَلَا رَشَدࣰ ا
verses.translation: Say: "It is not in my power to cause you harm, or to bring you to right conduct

verses.text: قُلۡ إِنِّي لَن يُجِيرَنِي مِنَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدࣱ وَلَنۡ أَجِدَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مُلۡتَحَدًا
verses.translation: Say: "No one can deliver me from God (If I were to disobey Him), nor should I find refuge except in Him

verses.text: إِلَّا بَلَٰغࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِسَٰلَٰتِهِۦۚ وَمَن يَعۡصِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ نَارَ جَهَنَّمَ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا
verses.translation: Unless I proclaim what I receive from God and His Messages: for any that disobey God and His Apostle,- for them is Hell: they shall dwell therein for ever

verses.text: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوۡاْ مَا يُوعَدُونَ فَسَيَعۡلَمُونَ مَنۡ أَضۡعَفُ نَاصِرࣰ ا وَأَقَلُّ عَدَدࣰ ا
verses.translation: At length, when they see (with their own eyes) that which they are promised,- then will they know who it is that is weakest in (his) helper and least important in point of numbers

verses.text: قُلۡ إِنۡ أَدۡرِيٓ أَقَرِيبࣱ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ أَمۡ يَجۡعَلُ لَهُۥ رَبِّيٓ أَمَدًا
verses.translation: Say: "I know not whether the (Punishment) which ye are promised is near, or whether my Lord will appoint for it a distant term

verses.text: عَٰلِمُ ٱلۡغَيۡبِ فَلَا يُظۡهِرُ عَلَىٰ غَيۡبِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا
verses.translation: He (alone) knows the Unseen, nor does He make any one acquainted with His Mysteries

verses.text: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱرۡتَضَىٰ مِن رَّسُولࣲ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَسۡلُكُ مِنۢ بَيۡنِ يَدَيۡهِ وَمِنۡ خَلۡفِهِۦ رَصَدࣰ ا
verses.translation: Except an apostle whom He has chosen: and then He makes a band of watchers march before him and behind him

verses.text: لِّيَعۡلَمَ أَن قَدۡ أَبۡلَغُواْ رِسَٰلَٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَأَحَاطَ بِمَا لَدَيۡهِمۡ وَأَحۡصَىٰ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ عَدَدَۢا
verses.translation: That He may know that they have (truly) brought and delivered the Messages of their Lord: and He surrounds (all the mysteries) that are with them, and takes account of every single thing

verses.text: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلۡمُزَّمِّلُ
verses.translation: O thou folded in garments

verses.text: قُمِ ٱلَّيۡلَ إِلَّا قَلِيلࣰ ا
verses.translation: Stand (to prayer) by night, but not all night

verses.text: نِّصۡفَهُۥٓ أَوِ ٱنقُصۡ مِنۡهُ قَلِيلًا
verses.translation: Half of it,- or a little less

verses.text: أَوۡ زِدۡ عَلَيۡهِ وَرَتِّلِ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ تَرۡتِيلًا
verses.translation: Or a little more; and recite the Qur'an in slow, measured rhythmic tones

verses.text: إِنَّا سَنُلۡقِي عَلَيۡكَ قَوۡلࣰ ا ثَقِيلًا
verses.translation: Soon shall We send down to thee a weighty Message

verses.text: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيۡلِ هِيَ أَشَدُّ وَطۡـࣰٔ ا وَأَقۡوَمُ قِيلًا
verses.translation: Truly the rising by night is most potent for governing (the soul), and most suitable for (framing) the Word (of Prayer and Praise)

verses.text: إِنَّ لَكَ فِي ٱلنَّهَارِ سَبۡحࣰ ا طَوِيلࣰ ا
verses.translation: True, there is for thee by day prolonged occupation with ordinary duties

verses.text: وَٱذۡكُرِ ٱسۡمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلۡ إِلَيۡهِ تَبۡتِيلࣰ ا
verses.translation: But keep in remembrance the name of thy Lord and devote thyself to Him whole-heartedly

verses.text: رَّبُّ ٱلۡمَشۡرِقِ وَٱلۡمَغۡرِبِ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَٱتَّخِذۡهُ وَكِيلࣰ ا
verses.translation: (He is) Lord of the East and the West: there is no god but He: take Him therefore for (thy) Disposer of Affairs

verses.text: وَٱصۡبِرۡ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱهۡجُرۡهُمۡ هَجۡرࣰ ا جَمِيلࣰ ا
verses.translation: And have patience with what they say, and leave them with noble (dignity)

verses.text: وَذَرۡنِي وَٱلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ أُوْلِي ٱلنَّعۡمَةِ وَمَهِّلۡهُمۡ قَلِيلًا
verses.translation: And leave Me (alone to deal with) those in possession of the good things of life, who (yet) deny the Truth; and bear with them for a little while

verses.text: إِنَّ لَدَيۡنَآ أَنكَالࣰ ا وَجَحِيمࣰ ا
verses.translation: With Us are Fetters (to bind them), and a Fire (to burn them)

verses.text: وَطَعَامࣰ ا ذَا غُصَّةࣲ وَعَذَابًا أَلِيمࣰ ا
verses.translation: And a Food that chokes, and a Penalty Grievous

verses.text: يَوۡمَ تَرۡجُفُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَٱلۡجِبَالُ وَكَانَتِ ٱلۡجِبَالُ كَثِيبࣰ ا مَّهِيلًا
verses.translation: One Day the earth and the mountains will be in violent commotion. And the mountains will be as a heap of sand poured out and flowing down

verses.text: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡكُمۡ رَسُولࣰ ا شَٰهِدًا عَلَيۡكُمۡ كَمَآ أَرۡسَلۡنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ رَسُولࣰ ا
verses.translation: We have sent to you, (O men!) an apostle, to be a witness concerning you, even as We sent an apostle to Pharaoh

verses.text: فَعَصَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَأَخَذۡنَٰهُ أَخۡذࣰ ا وَبِيلࣰ ا
verses.translation: But Pharaoh disobeyed the apostle; so We seized him with a heavy Punishment

verses.text: فَكَيۡفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرۡتُمۡ يَوۡمࣰ ا يَجۡعَلُ ٱلۡوِلۡدَٰنَ شِيبًا
verses.translation: Then how shall ye, if ye deny (God), guard yourselves against a Day that will make children hoary-headed

verses.text: ٱلسَّمَآءُ مُنفَطِرُۢ بِهِۦۚ كَانَ وَعۡدُهُۥ مَفۡعُولًا
verses.translation: Whereon the sky will be cleft asunder? His Promise needs must be accomplished

verses.text: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِۦ تَذۡكِرَةࣱۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
verses.translation: Verily this is an Admonition: therefore, whoso will, let him take a (straight) path to his Lord

verses.text: ۞إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَعۡلَمُ أَنَّكَ تَقُومُ أَدۡنَىٰ مِن ثُلُثَيِ ٱلَّيۡلِ وَنِصۡفَهُۥ وَثُلُثَهُۥ وَطَآئِفَةࣱ مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَعَكَۚ وَٱللَّهُ يُقَدِّرُ ٱلَّيۡلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَۚ عَلِمَ أَن لَّن تُحۡصُوهُ فَتَابَ عَلَيۡكُمۡۖ فَٱقۡرَءُواْ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانِۚ عَلِمَ أَن سَيَكُونُ مِنكُم مَّرۡضَىٰ وَءَاخَرُونَ يَضۡرِبُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ يَبۡتَغُونَ مِن فَضۡلِ ٱللَّهِ وَءَاخَرُونَ يُقَٰتِلُونَ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِۖ فَٱقۡرَءُواْ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنۡهُۚ وَأَقِيمُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُواْ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَقۡرِضُواْ ٱللَّهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنࣰ اۚ وَمَا تُقَدِّمُواْ لِأَنفُسِكُم مِّنۡ خَيۡرࣲ تَجِدُوهُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ هُوَ خَيۡرࣰ ا وَأَعۡظَمَ أَجۡرࣰ اۚ وَٱسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ ٱللَّهَۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورࣱ رَّحِيمُۢ
verses.translation: Thy Lord doth know that thou standest forth (to prayer) nigh two-thirds of the night, or half the night, or a third of the night, and so doth a party of those with thee. But God doth appoint night and day in due measure He knoweth that ye are unable to keep count thereof. So He hath turned to you (in mercy): read ye, therefore, of the Qur'an as much as may be easy for you. He knoweth that there may be (some) among you in ill-health; others travelling through the land, seeking of God's bounty ; yet others fighting in God's Cause, read ye, therefore, as much of the Qur'an as may be easy (for you); and establish regular Prayer and give regular Charity; and loan to God a Beautiful Loan. And whatever good ye send forth for your souls ye shall f ind it in God's Presence,- yea, better and greater, in Reward and seek ye the Grace of God: for God is Oft-Forgiving, Most Merciful

verses.text: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلۡمُدَّثِّرُ
verses.translation: O thou wrapped up (in the mantle)

verses.text: قُمۡ فَأَنذِرۡ
verses.translation: Arise and deliver thy warning

verses.text: وَرَبَّكَ فَكَبِّرۡ
verses.translation: And thy Lord do thou magnify

verses.text: وَثِيَابَكَ فَطَهِّرۡ
verses.translation: And thy garments keep free from stain

verses.text: وَٱلرُّجۡزَ فَٱهۡجُرۡ
verses.translation: And all abomination shun

verses.text: وَلَا تَمۡنُن تَسۡتَكۡثِرُ
verses.translation: Nor expect, in giving, any increase (for thyself)

verses.text: وَلِرَبِّكَ فَٱصۡبِرۡ
verses.translation: But, for thy Lord's (Cause), be patient and constant

verses.text: فَإِذَا نُقِرَ فِي ٱلنَّاقُورِ
verses.translation: Finally, when the Trumpet is sounded

verses.text: فَذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ يَوۡمٌ عَسِيرٌ
verses.translation: That will be- that Day - a Day of Distress

verses.text: عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ غَيۡرُ يَسِيرࣲ‏
verses.translation: Far from easy for those without Faith

verses.text: ذَرۡنِي وَمَنۡ خَلَقۡتُ وَحِيدࣰ ا
verses.translation: Leave Me alone, (to deal) with the (creature) whom I created (bare and) alone

verses.text: وَجَعَلۡتُ لَهُۥ مَالࣰ ا مَّمۡدُودࣰ ا
verses.translation: To whom I granted resources in abundance

verses.text: وَبَنِينَ شُهُودࣰ ا
verses.translation: And sons to be by his side

verses.text: وَمَهَّدتُّ لَهُۥ تَمۡهِيدࣰ ا
verses.translation: To whom I made (life) smooth and comfortable

verses.text: ثُمَّ يَطۡمَعُ أَنۡ أَزِيدَ
verses.translation: Yet is he greedy-that I should add (yet more)

verses.text: كَلَّآۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لِأٓيَٰتِنَا عَنِيدࣰ ا
verses.translation: By no means! For to Our Signs he has been refractory

verses.text: سَأُرۡهِقُهُۥ صَعُودًا
verses.translation: Soon will I visit him with a mount of calamities

verses.text: إِنَّهُۥ فَكَّرَ وَقَدَّرَ
verses.translation: For he thought and he plotted

verses.text: فَقُتِلَ كَيۡفَ قَدَّرَ
verses.translation: And woe to him! How he plotted

verses.text: ثُمَّ قُتِلَ كَيۡفَ قَدَّرَ
verses.translation: Yea, Woe to him; How he plotted

verses.text: ثُمَّ نَظَرَ
verses.translation: Then he looked round

verses.text: ثُمَّ عَبَسَ وَبَسَرَ
verses.translation: Then he frowned and he scowled

verses.text: ثُمَّ أَدۡبَرَ وَٱسۡتَكۡبَرَ
verses.translation: Then he turned back and was haughty

verses.text: فَقَالَ إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحۡرࣱ يُؤۡثَرُ
verses.translation: Then said he: "This is nothing but magic, derived from of old

verses.text: إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا قَوۡلُ ٱلۡبَشَرِ
verses.translation: This is nothing but the word of a mortal

verses.text: سَأُصۡلِيهِ سَقَرَ
verses.translation: Soon will I cast him into Hell-Fire

verses.text: وَمَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا سَقَرُ
verses.translation: And what will explain to thee what Hell-Fire is

verses.text: لَا تُبۡقِي وَلَا تَذَرُ
verses.translation: Naught doth it permit to endure, and naught doth it leave alone

verses.text: لَوَّاحَةࣱ لِّلۡبَشَرِ
verses.translation: Darkening and changing the colour of man

verses.text: عَلَيۡهَا تِسۡعَةَ عَشَرَ
verses.translation: Over it are Nineteen

verses.text: وَمَا جَعَلۡنَآ أَصۡحَٰبَ ٱلنَّارِ إِلَّا مَلَٰٓئِكَةࣰۖ وَمَا جَعَلۡنَا عِدَّتَهُمۡ إِلَّا فِتۡنَةࣰ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِيَسۡتَيۡقِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ وَيَزۡدَادَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ إِيمَٰنࣰ ا وَلَا يَرۡتَابَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ وَلِيَقُولَ ٱلَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضࣱ وَٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ مَاذَآ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَٰذَا مَثَلࣰ اۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَهۡدِي مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَمَا يَعۡلَمُ جُنُودَ رَبِّكَ إِلَّا هُوَۚ وَمَا هِيَ إِلَّا ذِكۡرَىٰ لِلۡبَشَرِ
verses.translation: And We have set none but angels as Guardians of the Fire; and We have fixed their number only as a trial for Unbelievers,- in order that the People of the Book may arrive at certainty, and the Believers may increase in Faith,- and that no doub ts may be left for the People of the Book and the Believers, and that those in whose hearts is a disease and the Unbelievers may say, "What symbol doth God intend by this ?" Thus doth God leave to stray whom He pleaseth, and guide whom He pleaseth: an d none can know the forces of thy Lord, except He and this is no other than a warning to mankind

verses.text: كَلَّا وَٱلۡقَمَرِ
verses.translation: Nay, verily: By the Moon

verses.text: وَٱلَّيۡلِ إِذۡ أَدۡبَرَ
verses.translation: And by the Night as it retreateth

verses.text: وَٱلصُّبۡحِ إِذَآ أَسۡفَرَ
verses.translation: And by the Dawn as it shineth forth

verses.text: إِنَّهَا لَإِحۡدَى ٱلۡكُبَرِ
verses.translation: This is but one of the mighty (portents)

verses.text: نَذِيرࣰ ا لِّلۡبَشَرِ
verses.translation: A warning to mankind

verses.text: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمۡ أَن يَتَقَدَّمَ أَوۡ يَتَأَخَّرَ
verses.translation: To any of you that chooses to press forward, or to follow behind

verses.text: كُلُّ نَفۡسِۭ بِمَا كَسَبَتۡ رَهِينَةٌ
verses.translation: Every soul will be (held) in pledge for its deeds

verses.text: إِلَّآ أَصۡحَٰبَ ٱلۡيَمِينِ
verses.translation: Except the Companions of the Right Hand

verses.text: فِي جَنَّٰتࣲ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.translation: (They will be) in Gardens (of Delight): they will question each other

verses.text: عَنِ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
verses.translation: And (ask) of the Sinners

verses.text: مَا سَلَكَكُمۡ فِي سَقَرَ
verses.translation: What led you into Hell Fire

verses.text: قَالُواْ لَمۡ نَكُ مِنَ ٱلۡمُصَلِّينَ
verses.translation: They will say: "We were not of those who prayed

verses.text: وَلَمۡ نَكُ نُطۡعِمُ ٱلۡمِسۡكِينَ
verses.translation: Nor were we of those who fed the indigent

verses.text: وَكُنَّا نَخُوضُ مَعَ ٱلۡخَآئِضِينَ
verses.translation: But we used to talk vanities with vain talkers

verses.text: وَكُنَّا نُكَذِّبُ بِيَوۡمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.translation: And we used to deny the Day of Judgment

verses.text: حَتَّىٰٓ أَتَىٰنَا ٱلۡيَقِينُ
verses.translation: Until there came to us (the Hour) that is certain

verses.text: فَمَا تَنفَعُهُمۡ شَفَٰعَةُ ٱلشَّٰفِعِينَ
verses.translation: Then will no intercession of (any) intercessors profit them

verses.text: فَمَا لَهُمۡ عَنِ ٱلتَّذۡكِرَةِ مُعۡرِضِينَ
verses.translation: Then what is the matter with them that they turn away from admonition

verses.text: كَأَنَّهُمۡ حُمُرࣱ مُّسۡتَنفِرَةࣱ‏
verses.translation: As if they were affrighted asses

verses.text: فَرَّتۡ مِن قَسۡوَرَةِۭ
verses.translation: Fleeing from a lion

verses.text: بَلۡ يُرِيدُ كُلُّ ٱمۡرِيࣲٕ مِّنۡهُمۡ أَن يُؤۡتَىٰ صُحُفࣰ ا مُّنَشَّرَةࣰ‏
verses.translation: Forsooth, each one of them wants to be given scrolls (of revelation) spread out

verses.text: كَلَّاۖ بَل لَّا يَخَافُونَ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةَ
verses.translation: By no means! But they fear not the Hereafter

verses.text: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُۥ تَذۡكِرَةࣱ‏
verses.translation: Nay, this surely is an admonition

verses.text: فَمَن شَآءَ ذَكَرَهُۥ
verses.translation: Let any who will, keep it in remembrance

verses.text: وَمَا يَذۡكُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُۚ هُوَ أَهۡلُ ٱلتَّقۡوَىٰ وَأَهۡلُ ٱلۡمَغۡفِرَةِ
verses.translation: But none will keep it in remembrance except as God wills: He is the Lord of Righteousness, and the Lord of Forgiveness

verses.text: لَآ أُقۡسِمُ بِيَوۡمِ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ
verses.translation: I do call to witness the Resurrection Day

verses.text: وَلَآ أُقۡسِمُ بِٱلنَّفۡسِ ٱللَّوَّامَةِ
verses.translation: And I do call to witness the self-reproaching spirit: (Eschew Evil)

verses.text: أَيَحۡسَبُ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ أَلَّن نَّجۡمَعَ عِظَامَهُۥ
verses.translation: Does man think that We cannot assemble his bones

verses.text: بَلَىٰ قَٰدِرِينَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّسَوِّيَ بَنَانَهُۥ
verses.translation: Nay, We are able to put together in perfect order the very tips of his fingers

verses.text: بَلۡ يُرِيدُ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ لِيَفۡجُرَ أَمَامَهُۥ
verses.translation: But man wishes to do wrong (even) in the time in front of him

verses.text: يَسۡـَٔلُ أَيَّانَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ
verses.translation: He questions: "When is the Day of Resurrection

verses.text: فَإِذَا بَرِقَ ٱلۡبَصَرُ
verses.translation: At length, when the sight is dazed

verses.text: وَخَسَفَ ٱلۡقَمَرُ
verses.translation: And the moon is buried in darkness

verses.text: وَجُمِعَ ٱلشَّمۡسُ وَٱلۡقَمَرُ
verses.translation: And the sun and moon are joined together

verses.text: يَقُولُ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ يَوۡمَئِذٍ أَيۡنَ ٱلۡمَفَرُّ
verses.translation: That Day will Man say: "Where is the refuge

verses.text: كَلَّا لَا وَزَرَ
verses.translation: By no means! No place of safety

verses.text: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوۡمَئِذٍ ٱلۡمُسۡتَقَرُّ
verses.translation: Before thy Lord (alone), that Day will be the place of rest

verses.text: يُنَبَّؤُاْ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ يَوۡمَئِذِۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَأَخَّرَ
verses.translation: That Day will Man be told (all) that he put forward, and all that he put back

verses.text: بَلِ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ عَلَىٰ نَفۡسِهِۦ بَصِيرَةࣱ‏
verses.translation: Nay, man will be evidence against himself

verses.text: وَلَوۡ أَلۡقَىٰ مَعَاذِيرَهُۥ
verses.translation: Even though he were to put up his excuses

verses.text: لَا تُحَرِّكۡ بِهِۦ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعۡجَلَ بِهِۦٓ
verses.translation: Move not thy tongue concerning the (Qur'an) to make haste therewith

verses.text: إِنَّ عَلَيۡنَا جَمۡعَهُۥ وَقُرۡءَانَهُۥ
verses.translation: It is for Us to collect it and to promulgate it

verses.text: فَإِذَا قَرَأۡنَٰهُ فَٱتَّبِعۡ قُرۡءَانَهُۥ
verses.translation: But when We have promulgated it, follow thou its recital (as promulgated)

verses.text: ثُمَّ إِنَّ عَلَيۡنَا بَيَانَهُۥ
verses.translation: Nay more, it is for Us to explain it (and make it clear)

verses.text: كَلَّا بَلۡ تُحِبُّونَ ٱلۡعَاجِلَةَ
verses.translation: Nay, (ye men!) but ye love the fleeting life

verses.text: وَتَذَرُونَ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةَ
verses.translation: And leave alone the Hereafter

verses.text: وُجُوهࣱ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ نَّاضِرَةٌ
verses.translation: Some faces, that Day, will beam (in brightness and beauty)

verses.text: إِلَىٰ رَبِّهَا نَاظِرَةࣱ‏
verses.translation: Looking towards their Lord

verses.text: وَوُجُوهࣱ يَوۡمَئِذِۭ بَاسِرَةࣱ‏
verses.translation: And some faces, that Day, will be sad and dismal

verses.text: تَظُنُّ أَن يُفۡعَلَ بِهَا فَاقِرَةࣱ‏
verses.translation: In the thought that some back-breaking calamity was about to be inflicted on them

verses.text: كَلَّآ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ ٱلتَّرَاقِيَ
verses.translation: Yea, when (the soul) reaches to the collar-bone (in its exit)

verses.text: وَقِيلَ مَنۡۜ رَاقࣲ‏
verses.translation: And there will be a cry, "Who is a magician (to restore him)

verses.text: وَظَنَّ أَنَّهُ ٱلۡفِرَاقُ
verses.translation: And he will conclude that it was (the Time) of Parting

verses.text: وَٱلۡتَفَّتِ ٱلسَّاقُ بِٱلسَّاقِ
verses.translation: And one leg will be joined with another

verses.text: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوۡمَئِذٍ ٱلۡمَسَاقُ
verses.translation: That Day the Drive will be (all) to thy Lord

verses.text: فَلَا صَدَّقَ وَلَا صَلَّىٰ
verses.translation: So he gave nothing in charity, nor did he pray

verses.text: وَلَٰكِن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
verses.translation: But on the contrary, he rejected Truth and turned away

verses.text: ثُمَّ ذَهَبَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِۦ يَتَمَطَّىٰٓ
verses.translation: Then did he stalk to his family in full conceit

verses.text: أَوۡلَىٰ لَكَ فَأَوۡلَىٰ
verses.translation: Woe to thee, (O men!), yea, woe

verses.text: ثُمَّ أَوۡلَىٰ لَكَ فَأَوۡلَىٰٓ
verses.translation: Again, Woe to thee, (O men!), yea, woe

verses.text: أَيَحۡسَبُ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ أَن يُتۡرَكَ سُدًى
verses.translation: Does man think that he will be left uncontrolled, (without purpose)

verses.text: أَلَمۡ يَكُ نُطۡفَةࣰ مِّن مَّنِيࣲّ يُمۡنَىٰ
verses.translation: Was he not a drop of sperm emitted (in lowly form)

verses.text: ثُمَّ كَانَ عَلَقَةࣰ فَخَلَقَ فَسَوَّىٰ
verses.translation: Then did he become a leech-like clot; then did (God) make and fashion (him) in due proportion

verses.text: فَجَعَلَ مِنۡهُ ٱلزَّوۡجَيۡنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلۡأُنثَىٰٓ
verses.translation: And of him He made two sexes, male and female

verses.text: أَلَيۡسَ ذَٰلِكَ بِقَٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحۡـِۧيَ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ
verses.translation: Has not He, (the same), the power to give life to the dead

verses.text: هَلۡ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلۡإِنسَٰنِ حِينࣱ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهۡرِ لَمۡ يَكُن شَيۡـࣰٔ ا مَّذۡكُورًا
verses.translation: Has there not been over Man a long period of Time, when he was nothing - (not even) mentioned

verses.text: إِنَّا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ مِن نُّطۡفَةٍ أَمۡشَاجࣲ نَّبۡتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلۡنَٰهُ سَمِيعَۢا بَصِيرًا
verses.translation: Verily We created Man from a drop of mingled sperm, in order to try him: So We gave him (the gifts), of Hearing and Sight

verses.text: إِنَّا هَدَيۡنَٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرࣰ ا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
verses.translation: We showed him the Way: whether he be grateful or ungrateful (rests on his will)

verses.text: إِنَّآ أَعۡتَدۡنَا لِلۡكَٰفِرِينَ سَلَٰسِلَاْ وَأَغۡلَٰلࣰ ا وَسَعِيرًا
verses.translation: For the Rejecters we have prepared chains, yokes, and a blazing Fire

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱلۡأَبۡرَارَ يَشۡرَبُونَ مِن كَأۡسࣲ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
verses.translation: As to the Righteous, they shall drink of a Cup (of Wine) mixed with Kafur

verses.text: عَيۡنࣰ ا يَشۡرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفۡجِيرࣰ ا
verses.translation: A Fountain where the Devotees of God do drink, making it flow in unstinted abundance

verses.text: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذۡرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوۡمࣰ ا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسۡتَطِيرࣰ ا
verses.translation: They perform (their) vows, and they fear a Day whose evil flies far and wide

verses.text: وَيُطۡعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسۡكِينࣰ ا وَيَتِيمࣰ ا وَأَسِيرًا
verses.translation: And they feed, for the love of God, the indigent, the orphan, and the captive

verses.text: إِنَّمَا نُطۡعِمُكُمۡ لِوَجۡهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمۡ جَزَآءࣰ وَلَا شُكُورًا
verses.translation: (Saying),"We feed you for the sake of God alone: no reward do we desire from you, nor thanks

verses.text: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوۡمًا عَبُوسࣰ ا قَمۡطَرِيرࣰ ا
verses.translation: We only fear a Day of distressful Wrath from the side of our Lord

verses.text: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمۡ نَضۡرَةࣰ وَسُرُورࣰ ا
verses.translation: But God will deliver them from the evil of that Day, and will shed over them a Light of Beauty and (blissful) Joy

verses.text: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُواْ جَنَّةࣰ وَحَرِيرࣰ ا
verses.translation: And because they were patient and constant, He will reward them with a Garden and (garments of) silk

verses.text: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلۡأَرَآئِكِۖ لَا يَرَوۡنَ فِيهَا شَمۡسࣰ ا وَلَا زَمۡهَرِيرࣰ ا
verses.translation: Reclining in the (Garden) on raised thrones, they will see there neither the sun's (excessive heat) nor (the moon's) excessive cold

verses.text: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيۡهِمۡ ظِلَٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتۡ قُطُوفُهَا تَذۡلِيلࣰ ا
verses.translation: And the shades of the (Garden) will come low over them, and the bunches (of fruit), there, will hang low in humility

verses.text: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِم بِـَٔانِيَةࣲ مِّن فِضَّةࣲ وَأَكۡوَابࣲ كَانَتۡ قَوَارِيرَا۠
verses.translation: And amongst them will be passed round vessels of silver and goblets of crystal

verses.text: قَوَارِيرَاْ مِن فِضَّةࣲ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقۡدِيرࣰ ا
verses.translation: Crystal-clear, made of silver: they will determine the measure thereof (according to their wishes)

verses.text: وَيُسۡقَوۡنَ فِيهَا كَأۡسࣰ ا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
verses.translation: And they will be given to drink there of a Cup (of Wine) mixed with Zanjabil

verses.text: عَيۡنࣰ ا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلۡسَبِيلࣰ ا
verses.translation: A fountain there, called Salsabil

verses.text: ۞وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وِلۡدَٰنࣱ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيۡتَهُمۡ حَسِبۡتَهُمۡ لُؤۡلُؤࣰ ا مَّنثُورࣰ ا
verses.translation: And round about them will (serve) youths of perpetual (freshness): If thou seest them, thou wouldst think them scattered Pearls

verses.text: وَإِذَا رَأَيۡتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيۡتَ نَعِيمࣰ ا وَمُلۡكࣰ ا كَبِيرًا
verses.translation: And when thou lookest, it is there thou wilt see a Bliss and a Realm Magnificent

verses.text: عَٰلِيَهُمۡ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضۡرࣱ وَإِسۡتَبۡرَقࣱۖ وَحُلُّوٓاْ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةࣲ وَسَقَىٰهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ شَرَابࣰ ا طَهُورًا
verses.translation: Upon them will be green Garments of fine silk and heavy brocade, and they will be adorned with Bracelets of silver; and their Lord will give to them to drink of a Wine Pure and Holy

verses.text: إِنَّ هَٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمۡ جَزَآءࣰ وَكَانَ سَعۡيُكُم مَّشۡكُورًا
verses.translation: Verily this is a Reward for you, and your Endeavour is accepted and recognised

verses.text: إِنَّا نَحۡنُ نَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ تَنزِيلࣰ ا
verses.translation: It is We Who have sent down the Qur'an to thee by stages

verses.text: فَٱصۡبِرۡ لِحُكۡمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعۡ مِنۡهُمۡ ءَاثِمًا أَوۡ كَفُورࣰ ا
verses.translation: Therefore be patient with constancy to the Command of thy Lord, and hearken not to the sinner or the ingrate among them

verses.text: وَٱذۡكُرِ ٱسۡمَ رَبِّكَ بُكۡرَةࣰ وَأَصِيلࣰ ا
verses.translation: And celebrate the name or thy Lord morning and evening

verses.text: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَٱسۡجُدۡ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحۡهُ لَيۡلࣰ ا طَوِيلًا
verses.translation: And part of the night, prostrate thyself to Him; and glorify Him a long night through

verses.text: إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلۡعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمۡ يَوۡمࣰ ا ثَقِيلࣰ ا
verses.translation: As to these, they love the fleeting life, and put away behind them a Day (that will be) hard

verses.text: نَّحۡنُ خَلَقۡنَٰهُمۡ وَشَدَدۡنَآ أَسۡرَهُمۡۖ وَإِذَا شِئۡنَا بَدَّلۡنَآ أَمۡثَٰلَهُمۡ تَبۡدِيلًا
verses.translation: It is We Who created them, and We have made their joints strong; but, when We will, We can substitute the like of them by a complete change

verses.text: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِۦ تَذۡكِرَةࣱۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلࣰ ا
verses.translation: This is an admonition: Whosoever will, let him take a (straight) Path to his Lord

verses.text: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمࣰ ا
verses.translation: But ye will not, except as God wills; for God is full of Knowledge and Wisdom

verses.text: يُدۡخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِي رَحۡمَتِهِۦۚ وَٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمۡ عَذَابًا أَلِيمَۢا
verses.translation: He will admit to His Mercy whom He will; But the wrong-doers,- for them has He prepared a grievous Penalty

verses.text: وَٱلۡمُرۡسَلَٰتِ عُرۡفࣰ ا
verses.translation: By the (Winds) sent forth one after another (to man's profit)

verses.text: فَٱلۡعَٰصِفَٰتِ عَصۡفࣰ ا
verses.translation: Which then blow violently in tempestuous Gusts

verses.text: وَٱلنَّٰشِرَٰتِ نَشۡرࣰ ا
verses.translation: And scatter (things) far and wide

verses.text: فَٱلۡفَٰرِقَٰتِ فَرۡقࣰ ا
verses.translation: Then separate them, one from another

verses.text: فَٱلۡمُلۡقِيَٰتِ ذِكۡرًا
verses.translation: Then spread abroad a Message

verses.text: عُذۡرًا أَوۡ نُذۡرًا
verses.translation: Whether of Justification or of Warning

verses.text: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَوَٰقِعࣱ‏
verses.translation: Assuredly, what ye are promised must come to pass

verses.text: فَإِذَا ٱلنُّجُومُ طُمِسَتۡ
verses.translation: Then when the stars become dim

verses.text: وَإِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ فُرِجَتۡ
verses.translation: When the heaven is cleft asunder

verses.text: وَإِذَا ٱلۡجِبَالُ نُسِفَتۡ
verses.translation: When the mountains are scattered (to the winds) as dust

verses.text: وَإِذَا ٱلرُّسُلُ أُقِّتَتۡ
verses.translation: And when the apostles are (all) appointed a time (to collect)

verses.text: لِأَيِّ يَوۡمٍ أُجِّلَتۡ
verses.translation: For what Day are these (portents) deferred

verses.text: لِيَوۡمِ ٱلۡفَصۡلِ
verses.translation: For the Day of Sorting out

verses.text: وَمَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا يَوۡمُ ٱلۡفَصۡلِ
verses.translation: And what will explain to thee what is the Day of Sorting out

verses.text: وَيۡلࣱ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.translation: Ah woe, that Day, to the Rejecters of Truth

verses.text: أَلَمۡ نُهۡلِكِ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.translation: Did We not destroy the men of old (for their evil)

verses.text: ثُمَّ نُتۡبِعُهُمُ ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
verses.translation: So shall We make later (generations) follow them

verses.text: كَذَٰلِكَ نَفۡعَلُ بِٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
verses.translation: Thus do We deal with men of sin

verses.text: وَيۡلࣱ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.translation: Ah woe, that Day, to the Rejecters of Truth

verses.text: أَلَمۡ نَخۡلُقكُّم مِّن مَّآءࣲ مَّهِينࣲ‏
verses.translation: Have We not created you from a fluid (held) despicable

verses.text: فَجَعَلۡنَٰهُ فِي قَرَارࣲ مَّكِينٍ
verses.translation: The which We placed in a place of rest, firmly fixed

verses.text: إِلَىٰ قَدَرࣲ مَّعۡلُومࣲ‏
verses.translation: For a period (of gestation), determined (according to need)

verses.text: فَقَدَرۡنَا فَنِعۡمَ ٱلۡقَٰدِرُونَ
verses.translation: For We do determine (according to need); for We are the best to determine (things)

verses.text: وَيۡلࣱ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.translation: Ah woe, that Day! to the Rejecters of Truth

verses.text: أَلَمۡ نَجۡعَلِ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ كِفَاتًا
verses.translation: Have We not made the earth (as a place) to draw together

verses.text: أَحۡيَآءࣰ وَأَمۡوَٰتࣰ ا
verses.translation: The living and the dead

verses.text: وَجَعَلۡنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِيَ شَٰمِخَٰتࣲ وَأَسۡقَيۡنَٰكُم مَّآءࣰ فُرَاتࣰ ا
verses.translation: And made therein mountains standing firm, lofty (in stature); and provided for you water sweet (and wholesome)

verses.text: وَيۡلࣱ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.translation: Ah woe, that Day, to the Rejecters of Truth

verses.text: ٱنطَلِقُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.translation: (It will be said:) "Depart ye to that which ye used to reject as false

verses.text: ٱنطَلِقُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ ظِلࣲّ ذِي ثَلَٰثِ شُعَبࣲ‏
verses.translation: Depart ye to a Shadow (of smoke ascending) in three columns

verses.text: لَّا ظَلِيلࣲ وَلَا يُغۡنِي مِنَ ٱللَّهَبِ
verses.translation: (Which yields) no shade of coolness, and is of no use against the fierce Blaze

verses.text: إِنَّهَا تَرۡمِي بِشَرَرࣲ كَٱلۡقَصۡرِ
verses.translation: Indeed it throws about sparks (huge) as Forts

verses.text: كَأَنَّهُۥ جِمَٰلَتࣱ صُفۡرࣱ‏
verses.translation: As if there were (a string of) yellow camels (marching swiftly)

verses.text: وَيۡلࣱ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.translation: Ah woe, that Day, to the Rejecters of Truth

verses.text: هَٰذَا يَوۡمُ لَا يَنطِقُونَ
verses.translation: That will be a Day when they shall not be able to speak

verses.text: وَلَا يُؤۡذَنُ لَهُمۡ فَيَعۡتَذِرُونَ
verses.translation: Nor will it be open to them to put forth pleas

verses.text: وَيۡلࣱ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.translation: Ah woe, that Day, to the Rejecters of Truth

verses.text: هَٰذَا يَوۡمُ ٱلۡفَصۡلِۖ جَمَعۡنَٰكُمۡ وَٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.translation: That will be a Day of Sorting out! We shall gather you together and those before (you)

verses.text: فَإِن كَانَ لَكُمۡ كَيۡدࣱ فَكِيدُونِ
verses.translation: Now, if ye have a trick (or plot), use it against Me

verses.text: وَيۡلࣱ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.translation: Ah woe, that Day, to the Rejecters of Truth

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ فِي ظِلَٰلࣲ وَعُيُونࣲ‏
verses.translation: As to the Righteous, they shall be amidst (cool) shades and springs (of water)

verses.text: وَفَوَٰكِهَ مِمَّا يَشۡتَهُونَ
verses.translation: And (they shall have) fruits,- all they desire

verses.text: كُلُواْ وَٱشۡرَبُواْ هَنِيٓـَٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.translation: Eat ye and drink ye to your heart's content: for that ye worked (Righteousness)

verses.text: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.translation: Thus do We certainly reward the Doers of Good

verses.text: وَيۡلࣱ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.translation: Ah woe, that Day, to the Rejecters of Truth

verses.text: كُلُواْ وَتَمَتَّعُواْ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكُم مُّجۡرِمُونَ
verses.translation: (O ye unjust!) Eat ye and enjoy yourselves (but) a little while, for that ye are Sinners

verses.text: وَيۡلࣱ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.translation: Ah woe, that Day, to the Rejecters of Truth

verses.text: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱرۡكَعُواْ لَا يَرۡكَعُونَ
verses.translation: And when it is said to them, "Prostrate yourselves!" they do not so

verses.text: وَيۡلࣱ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.translation: Ah woe, that Day, to the Rejecters of Truth

verses.text: فَبِأَيِّ حَدِيثِۭ بَعۡدَهُۥ يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.translation: Then what Message, after that, will they believe in

verses.text: عَمَّ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.translation: Concerning what are they disputing

verses.text: عَنِ ٱلنَّبَإِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.translation: Concerning the Great News

verses.text: ٱلَّذِي هُمۡ فِيهِ مُخۡتَلِفُونَ
verses.translation: About which they cannot agree

verses.text: كَلَّا سَيَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: Verily, they shall soon (come to) know

verses.text: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَيَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: Verily, verily they shall soon (come to) know

verses.text: أَلَمۡ نَجۡعَلِ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ مِهَٰدࣰ ا
verses.translation: Have We not made the earth as a wide expanse

verses.text: وَٱلۡجِبَالَ أَوۡتَادࣰ ا
verses.translation: And the mountains as pegs

verses.text: وَخَلَقۡنَٰكُمۡ أَزۡوَٰجࣰ ا
verses.translation: And (have We not) created you in pairs

verses.text: وَجَعَلۡنَا نَوۡمَكُمۡ سُبَاتࣰ ا
verses.translation: And made your sleep for rest

verses.text: وَجَعَلۡنَا ٱلَّيۡلَ لِبَاسࣰ ا
verses.translation: And made the night as a covering

verses.text: وَجَعَلۡنَا ٱلنَّهَارَ مَعَاشࣰ ا
verses.translation: And made the day as a means of subsistence

verses.text: وَبَنَيۡنَا فَوۡقَكُمۡ سَبۡعࣰ ا شِدَادࣰ ا
verses.translation: And (have We not) built over you the seven firmaments

verses.text: وَجَعَلۡنَا سِرَاجࣰ ا وَهَّاجࣰ ا
verses.translation: And placed (therein) a Light of Splendour

verses.text: وَأَنزَلۡنَا مِنَ ٱلۡمُعۡصِرَٰتِ مَآءࣰ ثَجَّاجࣰ ا
verses.translation: And do We not send down from the clouds water in abundance

verses.text: لِّنُخۡرِجَ بِهِۦ حَبࣰّ ا وَنَبَاتࣰ ا
verses.translation: That We may produce therewith corn and vegetables

verses.text: وَجَنَّٰتٍ أَلۡفَافًا
verses.translation: And gardens of luxurious growth

verses.text: إِنَّ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡفَصۡلِ كَانَ مِيقَٰتࣰ ا
verses.translation: Verily the Day of Sorting out is a thing appointed

verses.text: يَوۡمَ يُنفَخُ فِي ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأۡتُونَ أَفۡوَاجࣰ ا
verses.translation: The Day that the Trumpet shall be sounded, and ye shall come forth in crowds

verses.text: وَفُتِحَتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبࣰ ا
verses.translation: And the heavens shall be opened as if there were doors

verses.text: وَسُيِّرَتِ ٱلۡجِبَالُ فَكَانَتۡ سَرَابًا
verses.translation: And the mountains shall vanish, as if they were a mirage

verses.text: إِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ كَانَتۡ مِرۡصَادࣰ ا
verses.translation: Truly Hell is as a place of ambush

verses.text: لِّلطَّٰغِينَ مَـَٔابࣰ ا
verses.translation: For the transgressors a place of destination

verses.text: لَّٰبِثِينَ فِيهَآ أَحۡقَابࣰ ا
verses.translation: They will dwell therein for ages

verses.text: لَّا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرۡدࣰ ا وَلَا شَرَابًا
verses.translation: Nothing cool shall they taste therein, nor any drink

verses.text: إِلَّا حَمِيمࣰ ا وَغَسَّاقࣰ ا
verses.translation: Save a boiling fluid and a fluid, dark, murky, intensely cold

verses.text: جَزَآءࣰ وِفَاقًا
verses.translation: A fitting recompense (for them)

verses.text: إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ لَا يَرۡجُونَ حِسَابࣰ ا
verses.translation: For that they used not to fear any account (for their deeds)

verses.text: وَكَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا كِذَّابࣰ ا
verses.translation: But they (impudently) treated Our Signs as false

verses.text: وَكُلَّ شَيۡءٍ أَحۡصَيۡنَٰهُ كِتَٰبࣰ ا
verses.translation: And all things have We preserved on record

verses.text: فَذُوقُواْ فَلَن نَّزِيدَكُمۡ إِلَّا عَذَابًا
verses.translation: So taste ye (the fruits of your deeds); for no increase shall We grant you, except in Punishment

verses.text: إِنَّ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ مَفَازًا
verses.translation: Verily for the Righteous there will be a fulfilment of (the heart's) desires

verses.text: حَدَآئِقَ وَأَعۡنَٰبࣰ ا
verses.translation: Gardens enclosed, and grapevines

verses.text: وَكَوَاعِبَ أَتۡرَابࣰ ا
verses.translation: Companions of equal age

verses.text: وَكَأۡسࣰ ا دِهَاقࣰ ا
verses.translation: And a cup full (to the brim)

verses.text: لَّا يَسۡمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغۡوࣰ ا وَلَا كِذَّٰبࣰ ا
